Name: Corporación Fernandez S.A.
Description:
Corporación Fernández S.A. es una Empresa Nacional comercializadora, productora y procesadora de productos cárnicos y alimentos de consumo masivo en beneficio del bienestar y nutrición de sus clientes en armonía con el medio ambiente.

Mejora continuamente sus procesos para generar eficacia y eficiencia en su Sistema de Gestión, implementado Calidad, Buenas Prácticas de Manufactura y Pecuarias, Seguridad Alimentaria, Seguridad en el Medio Ambiente, Seguridad Industrial y Salud Ocupacional, además de mantener el compromiso con la Responsabilidad Social, la Satisfacción al Cliente y el cumplimiento de la legislación técnico legal vigente, siendo su base valores compartidos que caracterizan su Cultura Organizacional.
 
Corporación Fernández S.A cumple con su política y la socializa a sus partes interesadas, asignando los recursos económicos, técnicos  y tecnológicos necesarios para contribuir al Desarrollo Organizacional.

Name: Frigorífico Better Beef
Description:
Somos a unidade frigorífica do Better Group, especializada em carne bovina de alta qualidade desde 2003. Operamos com unidades industriais em Rancharia/SP e Araçatuba/SP, totalizando 1.500 abates/dia, e contamos com centros de distribuição em Itapevi/SP e Limeira/SP, garantindo agilidade logística e padronização de entrega.

A qualidade dos nossos cortes nasce na Agropecuária Vista Alegre: O maior confinamento coberto da América Latina, com capacidade para 40 mil animais, onde aplicamos bem-estar animal, manejo sanitário avançado e rastreabilidade total.

Nossa operação verticalizada, nos permite garantir QUALIDADE DO COMEÇO AO FIM, QUE VOCÊ VÊ, SENTE E CONFIA, além de estar alinhada às exigências globais mais restritivas: bem-estar animal, segurança alimentar, sustentabilidade, gestão de risco e transparência nos processos fazem parte do nosso propósito.

Produzimos com responsabilidade, tecnologia e critérios técnicos claros. A mesma carne que exportamos para mercados exigentes é a mesma que oferecemos ao mercado interno, com sabor, maciez e segurança.

Better Beef. 
Qualidade do começo ao fim, que você vê, sente e confia.

Name: Al Zain Poultry Farms LLC
Description:
Al Zain Poultry Farm was established in 2011 in Sultanate  Of  Oman,  in line with the vision of His Majesty Sultan Qaboos Bin Said to maintain food sustainability in Oman and ensure Good Quality locally produce. Within short period of time Al Zain Farms has started production of farm fresh Eggs, liquid Eggs, fresh and frozen Chickens. Al Zain Poultry farm is located at Bumsika, Sinaw  in the Sultanate of Oman. 


All our products are 100% halal and hygienically packed in state of the art facilities that are away from urban areas, polluted air and water. We truly give you freshness that you can savor and this is not just our promise but a way of life at Al Zain Farms.
We promise our consumers “fresh quality, healthy product & value for money”.
AL-ZAIN FARM LLC is HACCP & ISO 22000:2005 certified company

Name: BRF_SA
Description: BRF S.A. is a Brazilian food processing company with over 30 brands in its portfolio. They include Sadia, Perdigão, Qualy, Paty, Dánica and Bocatti. Its products are sold in over 150 countries, in five continents. More than 100 thousand employees work at the company, which owns more than 50 factories in eight countries: Argentina, Brazil, United Arab Emirates, Netherlands, Malaysia, United Kingdom, Thailand and Turkey.. we are mainly specialize in the supply of meat products such as frozen chicken part, frozen pork parts and cow meat

Name: Golden Meat-Farm
Description: Golden Meat Company, established in 2019, is one of the leading companies in the field of animal production and among the largest farms in the region today. We are dedicated to providing premium-quality, fresh, and healthy meat. We focus on natural livestock raising, and delivering exceptional products to our customers. With a commitment to quality and care, we ensure every step—from farm to table—meets the highest standards.

Name: Villani SpA
Description:
Since 1886 we have been producing special cold cuts, a skilful expression of a careful selection of territories in Italy, created with care by the expert hands of our masters, with a constant drive towards the highest levels of quality and perfection.

We are modern day masters of the Italian art of cold cuts preparation. Our products are rooted in expertise but look towards the future.

Quality is what drives our work. Passionate about our work, we are constantly committed to perfecting our specialities, driven by the desire to surprise and delight anyone who chooses our products.

People, with their talents, sensitivity and experience, guide our entire process, respecting the necessary production times and the cycles of nature. All of us at Villani, share the same company culture and the same common objective: a perfectly made product. 

We are proud to spread around the world a heritage of knowledge and flavours, which are the proud expression of our identity.

Name: Frigorífico Grupo Tresnal
Description: Desde nuestra planta frigorífica ubicada en Navarro, provincia de Buenos Aires trabajamos para satisfacer a nuestros clientes con el objetivo de fidelizar las relaciones comerciales y potenciar su crecimiento brindando productos cárnicos de excelente calidad.

Name: Good Ranchers
Description:
Our mission is to bring people to the table. Good Ranchers exists to connect the American family to the American farm, so that every person can know and trust where their meat comes from. We aim to provide high-quality meat at an affordable price while strengthening the American agriculture supply chain. 

With every order, a portion goes to support the Paralyzed Veterans Of America. To bring all veterans to the table, Good Ranchers will donate proceeds from every purchase to PVA, launch exclusive boxes for Veteran's Day and Memorial Day, and much more! We are excited for the good we can do together as we continue to grow. Taste the difference of the highest quality meat America has to offer while making a difference in your community.

Name: CoopeMontecillos
Description:
Cooperativa costarricense líder en el mercado de la industria cárnica. Contamos con una experiencia de más de 60 años y cerca de dos mil asociados, entre productores y colaboradores.
Nos enfocamos en la captación y procesamiento de ganado bovino y porcino para alimentos, así como la comercialización de cueros salados y la fabricación  de jabones.
Cada día trabajamos con el objetivo de ofrecer al consumidor productos de primera calidad en nuestros 30 Centros de Carne.

Name: QMP
Description:
Quality Meat Packers (QMP) is a privately owned company with a commitment to quality and innovation. Our company is guided by a family commitment to quality that goes back to our founding in 1970, when the company established its first butchery outlet in a posh Nairobi suburb to provide quality real halal meat products to the local community. Today QMP operates the largest slaughterhouse and meat processing plant in Kenya.

Our Beef, Lamb and processed products are unique as we are one of the few vertically integrated agribusiness in the region. This vertical integration gives us total control of the origin and freshness of all products and enables us to ensure quality at every step. This begins with a robust harvesting program at farms, continues through the implementation of good manufacturing practices at the factory floor and all the way to cold chain delivery through our own fleet of refrigerated vesicles.

As a company owned by a Muslim family with high values, QMP places the highest emphasis on full Halal compliance at all times. We are amongst the few meat processors in East Africa who do not deal with any non-halal products.  

Our slaughterhouse is the first privately owned slaughterhouse and meat processing plant to be declared 100% export compliant by Government of Kenya  in 1998. We have the gazette approvals from government of UAE, KSA, Egypt and other Middle East and African countries.  We have ISO 22000;2018, ISO TS 22002-1:2009 and additional FSSC 22000 requirements V5 by BVQ1.

Name: P.G.NIKAS SA
Description:
P.G. NIKAS SA was founded in 1966 inspired by a man's vision to create unique cured meat products based on high quality and top safety. 
We are a historical brand, looking forward to meeting contemporary consumer needs.

Name: Van Rooi Meat BV
Description:
Het familiebedrijf Van Rooi heeft een lange historie in de varkenshouderij en vleesverwerking. Martien van Rooi begon meer dan een halve eeuw geleden met een veehandel. Dit werd later uitgebreid met slachterij en vleesverwerking. Inmiddels bestaat de Van Rooi Group uit veehandel in Lieshout, een slachthuis, productielocatie en vrieshuis in Helmond, een productielocatie in Someren en enkele vestigingen in het buitenland. Hiermee wordt een jaaromzet van meer dan € 500 miljoen gerealiseerd.
Door uitbreiding van de moderne productielocatie in Helmond, is Van Rooi Group de eerste vleesverwerker die het hele proces van boer tot bord onder één dak heeft. Alle stappen in het proces – van slachten naar uitsnijden en uitbenen tot verwerken, verpakken en invriezen – worden onder één dak gedaan. Dit zorgt voor korte lijnen, efficiency, optimale versheid en kwaliteit. De voortdurende groei en optimalisatie maken het mogelijk om sneller en gemakkelijker in te spelen op onder meer nieuwe trends, zoals biologisch vlees, Milieukeur en Beter Leven. Klantgericht produceren en flexibiliteit ten behoeve van een duurzame relatie staan al jaren voorop bij Van Rooi Group.

Name: Frigorifico Rioplatense
Description:
Procesamiento de Carne de Ganado Bovino 
Elaboración y conservación de carne, actividad frigorífica, entendida como la matanza de ganado, producción, procesamiento y conservación de carne vacuna.

La actividad frigorífica se ocupa de la faena por un lado, y del procesamiento, conservación y comercialización de las carnes por el otro. La faena incluye tanto el sacrificio del animal, separación del cuero, vísceras y restos (sangre, pezuñas y astas, principalmente), como la división en dos medias reses
y el despostado de distintos cortes, obteniéndose alrededor de cuarenta
categorías de subproductos. Esta actividad puede realizarse en frigoríficos o
mataderos, siendo el destino final de los cortes la venta al público local o la
exportación. La conservación consiste en todo lo relacionado al tratamiento de la cadena de frío.

Name: Kaloti Precious Metals
Description:
Established in the UAE in 1988, Kaloti Jewellery Group has benefited from the strategic location of its Dubai headquarters. Dubai is known worldwide as a trading crossroads - where East meets West and North meets South. Kaloti Jewellery Group has leveraged this exceptional position to create a company with a truly global outlook.

An international corporation, with interests that span the globe from the Far East to the Americas, Kaloti Jewellery Group has integrated its operations under the mantle of Dubai Multi Commodities Centre (DMCC). From this location the Group has expanded and now operates in a number of complementary areas.

The Group provides complete precious metal solutions, from the financing of raw material mining in the depths of Latin America, via complex supply and logistics chains, all the way through to the end product – whether beautifully crafted pieces of handmade jewellery or commercial bullion bars.

Furthermore, the Group has attained ISO certification in a number of fields due to an unrelenting focus on quality. With a base in one of the world’s foremost gold trading cities, and Dubai’s tax-free status and smooth trading environment, the Group is confidently anticipating continued growth - both financially and geographically.

Responsibility is at the forefront of our corporate strategy and has a vital place in moulding our societal impact. As one of the aspects that drives and improves performance at Kaloti, Corporate Social Responsibility is a key contributor to our Corporate Brand Equity and an essential consideration of our manufacturing philosophy.
At Kaloti, responsible business and sustainability is regulated through the governance system and our workforce ensures that sustainability is part of our day to day business activities. We monitor performance of our CSR activities through external reviews and certifications by Environmental, Municipality & Quality Standard Institutions including ISO, Dubai Municipality, and OHSAS.
Location: Hum Hom, Kowloon, Hong Kong, Hong Kong

Name: Alimentos L'Prado
Description: En Alimentos L'Prado nos dedicamos a la elaboración y comercialización de productos embutidos, ahumados y curados.

Name: Nutrili
Description:
Uma história que começou em 2001, mas que se transformou completamente no ano de 2010. A Nutrili Alimentos Ltda nasceu em cima dos pilares do sabor e da qualidade, valores que temos em cada novo produto.

Agora nós fazemos parte do dia a dia de milhões de pessoas em todos os momentos. Com mais de 80 produtos diferentes feitos especialmente para você nós levamos junto conosco a nossa vocação de sermos Especialistas em Carne Suína.

A Nutrili atende hoje a mais de 150 cidades em todo o Sul de Minas Gerais. Também estamos expandindo nosso mercado para o Centro-Oeste de Minas, São Paulo e Rio de Janeiro. Hoje contamos com produtos Nutrili em mais de 2.500 pontos de venda que recebem nossa linha completa de produtos para chegar a mais de 5 milhões de pessoas.

Levamos até você produtos que vão deixar suas refeições muito mais gostosas. Onde tem Nutrili tem muito +Sabor!

Name: Guarani SACI
Description:
El Frigorífico Guarani nace con el propósito de atender el mercado local e iniciar operaciones a nivel internacional.
La visión de negocio, el trabajo en equipo y el deseo de brindar los mejores productos, hicieron que el proyecto se convierta en lo que somos hoy: líderes en calidad de productos cárnicos y sus derivados.

Name: Union Meat Group
Description:
Welcome to Union Meat Group, your ultimate destination for premium meat products, exceptional services, and efficient logistics solutions. Based in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania, we are a comprehensive one-stop shop for all your meat industry needs.

As a unified entity, we oversee the entire value chain, from livestock rearing to processing, distribution, and logistics. With strategic partnerships and a robust network of ranches, we prioritize responsible breeding and welfare, ensuring the highest quality livestock that meets global standards.

Our state-of-the-art facilities employ cutting-edge technology and stringent quality control measures, upholding the highest standards of food safety, animal welfare, and product integrity. Our dedicated team of professionals delivers premium meat cuts and innovative processed products to cater to diverse customer requirements.

In addition to our production capabilities, our in-house logistics division provides end-to-end solutions for efficient and reliable transport. From meticulous cold chain management to airport and sea cargo handling, we ensure the timely delivery of our chilled or frozen products worldwide.

At Union Meat Group, transparency, sustainability, and customer satisfaction are our guiding principles. We continuously strive for excellence, employing the latest innovations and ethical practices to exceed expectations.

Experience the taste of excellence and convenience with Union Meat Group, your trusted partner in the global meat industry. Join us as we raise the bar together.
Location: Dar es Salaam, Dar es Salaam

Name: BFA Alimentos
Description:
Empresa especializada no processamento de carnes de origem bovina, suína e de aves, com foco em cortes como cubos, iscas, bifes e carne moída.

Nossa missão é atender com excelência as demandas do mercado Food Service, oferecendo produtos de qualidade e padronização, voltados especialmente para cozinhas industriais, distribuidores de alimentos, programas de merenda escolar e demais parceiros do setor.

Name: Botswana Meat Commission
Description:
Botswana Meat Commission (BMC) is a body corporate established in 1966 through an Act of the Parliament of the Republic of Botswana (BMC Act).  It was established to procure livestock, slaughter same and sell the products of such slaughter locally, regionally and internationally at best achievable prices.  It also promotes livestock production schemes so as to ensure adequacy and sustainability of cattle supply to its abbattoirs.  

BMC has 3 main abbattoirs in Lobatse (main), Francistown and Maun, Botswana as well as a Tannery and Cannery in Lobatse.  Its head office is in Lobatse. The premises are an integrated complex housing the main administration block, an abattoir, cannery and byproducts plant.  It has subsidiaries in London, UK (sales); Cape Town, South Africa (Cold Storage); Cayman Islands (insurance); Germany (sales and distribution). 

BMC mostly exports to the EU and RSA.  Its two abbattoirs in Lobatse and Francistown are licensed to sell in the EU as they meet all the EU animal welfare and food safety standards. .  Besides owning three abattoirs in Botswana, BMC has cold storage facilities in South Africa with marketing
subsidiaries in the United Kingdom, Germany, Holland and South Africa.

Name: CENTRO CARNI COMPANY SPA
Description:
Centro Carni Company rappresenta oggi una delle maggiori aziende italiane nel settore della lavorazione della carne bovina ed è sicuramente tra i leader nell’ambito specifico del disosso.
L'azienda propone sul mercato prodotti freschi e surgelati dalla ricetta unica, prodotti porzionati confezionati in sottovuoto, skin, atm, sia freschi che surgelati e tagli anatomici selezionati forniti sottovuoto, freschi o frollati.
Centro Carni Company è presente nel settore food con marchi propri: per il settore GDO i marchi You&Meat e Greel, nel settore Ho.re.ca. con i marchi Unika e St. Patrick's Farm.

Un'azienda dalla lunga storia ed esperienza, iniziata nel settore dell'allevamento e commercio di bestiame, fino ad arrivare ai giorni nostri con un'organizzazione industriale con partnership in Italia e all'estero.

Name: La Montserratina, C.A.
Description:
CONOCE NUESTRA HISTORIA
En el año 1949, en la ciudad de Caracas, fue creada la empresa de charcutería “La Montserratina” por inmigrantes españoles de la región de Cataluña, quienes decidieron elaborar embutidos y butifarras al estilo de su región natal.  El nombre de la marca rinde homenaje a la Virgen de Montserrat, Patrona de Cataluña, cuya imagen se venera en el Monasterio de Montserrat, ubicado en las montañas del mismo nombre.
Para el año 1970, se llevó a cabo la construcción de una fábrica en Las Tejerías, y veinte años después, en 1990, motivado a la necesidad de satisfacer la demanda, se cambia de localidad en la misma zona industrial de Las Tejerías, adquiriendo una planta con mayor capacidad productiva, de almacenamiento y estructura logística. En ella, se realizaron ampliaciones en las líneas de trabajo y se adquirieron máquinas y equipos de alta tecnología; desde entonces forma parte importante de la producción alimenticia venezolana como empresa fabricante de una gran variedad de productos embutidos elaborados con materias primas e insumos de primera calidad.
En Marzo 2011, La Montserratina pasa de ser una empresa familiar a ser parte de una gran corporación, modernizando la estructura de trabajo con la incorporación de nuevas líneas de productos pre-empacados (autoservicio) y ampliando el catálogo de productos con diversos lanzamientos para una mayor oferta al consumidor, pero siempre conservando las recetas artesanales y tradicionales que han distinguido a la marca por más de 65 años. En la actualidad La Montserratina tiene un robusto portafolio con 60 presentaciones, los cuales se agrupan en la línea de Parrilla, línea de Madurados, línea de Jamones (cerdo y aves) y línea de Especialidades. La marca ha logrado posicionarse como la líder en productos parrilleros, no solo por la tradición que representa sino por la calidad con la que los mismos se elaboran.

Name: IMS of Smithfield
Description: Award Winning Catering Butchers Based in Waltham Cross with 54 years experience within the meat and poultry sector supplying UK farm assured fresh meat, poultry & game, we are BRCGS accredited, Red Tractor, Soil Association accredited and we also have an segregated halal accredited processing division as well Tel: & email 020 7383 3080. sales@imsofsmithfield.com Website www.imsofsmithfield.com

Name: DB Foods Limited
Description:
The leading wholesaler to the butchery and food service industry in the UK, DB Foods supply a comprehensive range of quality wholesale meat, poultry, game and deli products.  We have a renowned track record in providing quality products, competitively priced, with an exceptional level of service.  The national distribution centres, located in Banbury, Oxfordshire and head office in Poole, Dorset, were purpose built utilising the latest industry technology.

We are here to support the high street, those out for a bite to eat and the bulk buyers of meat.  We understand that being independent is tough.  We know that managing large scale business is too, we all need support, and that is exactly what we are here for.  Whether it’s our great quality meat essentials, or the huge range of choice, DB Foods is built around you.

•	We are the people that say yes
•	We are the people you can rely on
•	We are the people who recognise your needs
•	We are DB Foods and we are here to support you

Name: Excellent Meat
Description:
Excellent Meat is a group of companies that offer the very best in wholesale, fresh meat and deli production, import and export, as well as retail in lamb, mutton, beef, and poultry. 

Starting out in 1970 as a single butchery it has now grown into a group of companies offering B2B and B2C products & services.

Name: Corrales del Sur
Description:
Nuestras carnes provienen de las mejores razas, como Angus y Hereford, procedentes del sur de Chile. 

Cuando se habla de sabor, infiltración de grasa y terneza, estas razas son consideradas como las mejores del mundo y reconocidas por expertos parrilleros como las mejores carnes de Chile.

La estructura, firmeza y textura de las carnes Corrales del Sur es perfecta, haciendo de la experiencia del consumidor algo inigualable.

Name: Bovmeat Processadora de Carnes e Derivados LTDA
Description:
Sobre a BOVMEAT

Um presente de sucesso construído sobre alicerces sólidos. Na BOVMEAT construímos nosso prestígio no processamento de carnes a partir de um forte compromisso com a qualidade, incluindo nele o máximo rigor científico na produção.

É assim que há mais de 15 anos produzimos hambúrgueres com características artesanais
e nos últimos 15 anos a aceitação do público nos levou a aumentar significativamente a produção e a implantarmos um inovador processo que permite atender as exigências de um mercado em evolução e crescimento, porém mantendo essa característica artesanal muito apreciada pelos consumidores. Para atender esse interesse e manter o crescimento da empresa, nosso departamento de desenvolvimento, juntamente com a cozinha experimental criam novos produtos com o selo de qualidade BOVMEAT e sob a rigorosa observância das baixas temperaturas e controle ambiental. Tudo de
acordo a padrões estabelecidos pelo SIF do Ministério da Agricultura para a cadeia de produtos industrializados e supercongelados; desde as matérias primas, até o produto acabado, embalado, estocado e transportado. É também assim que o processo permite manter o sabor e textura de nossos produtos até o consumidor final.

Em nossa planta, com área total de 78.000 m² e 6.000 m² de área construída, são respeitados todos os padrões legais para este segmento de atividades e cumprem-se também com naturalidade, mas com rigor, as normas de preservação do meio ambiente.

Name: Toma Meats (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
Toma Meats (Pvt) Ltd is Pakistan's finest meat exporting company satisfying all the international standards. Based in Karachi Pakistan, Toma Meats possesses various facilities to provide fresh and healthy meat to our valued customers in GCC Countries.

Toma Meats aspires to maintain its distinction as the premier supplier of the highest quality beef and mutton products available in Pakistan to international markets, and to continue setting the benchmark of quality for the Pakistani meat and livestock industry. At every stage of the process, quality control is of the utmost importance. 

Toma Meats seeks to be recognised for the commitment of its people to the highest standards of productivity, hygiene, house keeping & general maintenance, and desires to position itself for sustainable growth in line with the demand by its consumers.

Toma Meats specializes in fattening of animals as per customer’s need in order to optimize diversity in production. we stand out to be one of the few emerging companies of Pakistan to export meat to GCC Countries Meat markets.

Name: Cervalle
Description:
En Cervalle, apostamos por una alimentación saludable y equilibrada! Somos una empresa colombiana con más de 20 años de experiencia en la producción y comercialización de carne de cerdo. 

Nos enorgullece integrar un proceso de producción tecnificada que nos permite ofrecer la mejor carne de cerdo, cumpliendo con rigurosos estándares de calidad e innovación.

Nuestra misión es proporcionar productos que no solo sean deliciosos, sino también fáciles de adquirir, preparar y listos para disfrutar. En Cervalle, cada paso del camino es vital; por eso, desde la granja hasta tu mesa cada proceso y producto está cuidadosamente gestionado para garantizar la excelencia en cada bocado. 

Descubre el sabor de la auténtica carne de cerdo con nosotros!

Name: Kilcoy Global Foods North America
Description:
Our roots run deep, first taking hold in Chicago's fabled meatpacking district in 1860. Today, we provide premium food solutions to retailers, wholesalers, food service providers, and institutional clients in more than 35 countries across the globe.

We offer whole muscle imports, customizable fully cooked sous vide proteins and value-added raw proteins, crafted with precision and care to meet the highest standards of quality and taste. Our commitment to innovation and customization allows us to cater to the unique needs of our diverse clientele, delivering unparalleled products that exceed expectations.

With a legacy built on quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we continue to uphold our commitment to excellence in every aspect of our business

Name: DC Meat
Description:
DC Meat manufacture, wholesale and retail premium quality meat products. 

With two manufacturing facilities and 15 DC Meat Market retail stores we are always on the lookout for dedicated and driven candidates to join our team.

Across our various sectors, we offer roles in areas such as store/department management, production, sales, logistics and administration. Each position provides a unique opportunity to make a significant impact and be part of our collective success.

Name: Prime Meats LLC
Description:
Prime Meats distributes top-quality beef, pork, poultry, and seafood products to many of the restaurants, supermarkets, and butcher shops in the Southeast. 
We strive to meet customers needs placing QUALITY SERVICE AND TRADITION as our top priority.

Name: Finlar S.A.
Description:
Finlar S.A. se encuentra ubicada al sur de la Provincia de Santa Fe, integrando una de las regiones ganaderas más importantes del país.
Sus orígenes datan de 1970, como iniciativa de una familia de larga tradición, en la cadena de producción de carne bovina Argentina. Desde esa estrecha relación familiar, se forjó la orientación y el desarrollo empresario, sumado el asesoramiento profesional y la fecunda labor de sus integrantes.
La actividad de la empresa comprende, desde la compra de animales livianos de recría y el engorde, hasta la faena de los mismos, comercialización y distribución.
Para el desarrollo de la misma, la empresa posee, un feed lot, situado en la localidad de Theobald (Villa Constitución), con una estructura instalada para 32.000 cabezas; una planta frigorífica ubicada en el pueblo de Andino, con una capacidad de faena de 180.000 cabezas bovinas anuales. Y una amplia flota de camiones propios, que garantizan el traslado con las máximas condiciones fitosanitarias.

Finlar se fue consolidando en el mercado cárnico bovino, con un destacado y sostenido crecimiento, obteniendo la fidelidad de los clientes y la garantía de sus productos.

Name: Sheikh at the Farm (Pvt.) Ltd.
Description:
We are a vibrant team of young visionaries, redefining the halal meat industry. Our cattle and livestock, raised with unparalleled love and care, are a testament to our commitment. Guided by a passionate and skilled staff, we’ve transformed traditional farming with a blend of innovation and care. 

We deliver premium quality red meat to the global community. Our clients are based in Qatar, UAE, Saudia Arabia and other gulf countries. Tapping into the edible meat and offal market, we aim to bridge the untouched gaps with our groundbreaking strategies in the meat sector. 

Our private limited company closely incorporates sustainability into its core operations as shown by the implementation of eco-friendly packaging solutions and a persistent focus on promoting diversity and equal opportunities, thereby actively contributing to a more inclusive and environmentally responsible business landscape.

Name: Sierra Meat & Seafood
Description:
Sierra Meat and Seafood is a third generation family business operating five distinct businesses:

* Reno Tahoe Meat and Seafood Distributor to Hotels, Restaurants and Institutions
* Private Label Manufacturer of Portion Control Meat & Seafood
* Manufacturer and Distributor of Specialty and Exotic Proteins
* Ranchers of Bison on our 65,000 acre bison ranch in Wyoming
* Flocchini Family Provisions, makers of handcrafted sausage and deli meats

Name: SYRA FOODS
Description:
Welcome to SYRA FOODS, where quality meets taste! We are a dedicated team of poultry enthusiasts, specialising in the finest chicken processing and distribution. With a passion for excellence, we strive to provide our customers with the freshest and most delicious chicken products on the market.
At our state-of-the-art facility, we employ cutting-edge technology and adhere to strict quality control processes to ensure that every chicken that leaves our unit meets the highest standards of hygiene and taste. From sourcing the healthiest chickens to utilising innovative processing techniques, we leave no stone unturned when it comes to delivering a superior product.

Name: Alcar Uno
Description:
Over the last six decades Alcar Uno has sourced and purchased primary pork cuts, customising them according to the market's demands. The whole production process is based on a flexible and reactive system, able to comply with charcuterie industries' expectations and demands.
Following traditional techniques combined with the latest technology we cure and debone Prosciutto Crudo (dry cured ham), Prosciutto di Parma DPO and Prosciutto di San Daniele DPO, Culatta and sweet Speck.
Complete manufacturing process taylored to meet the cutomers' demands: from raw materials selection to packaging and labelling specifications.

Name: BOIBRAS FOODS
Description:
Há mais de 20 anos, a Boibras vem construindo uma história de tradição, qualidade e respeito aos nossos clientes e parceiros!

Com tecnologia, cuidado e compromisso, seguimos firmes, levando o melhor da nossa produção até você e sua família.

BOIBRAS EXCELÊNCIA EM TODOS OS PONTOS!

Name: Bravofoods
Description:
Meat wholesaler supplying premium cuts of beef, lamb, pork, poultry, smallgoods and value-added products to the food service industry.

Bravofoods is a leading wholesaler of quality meats servicing the hospitality sector across Sydney and other parts of New South Wales. We are an Australian owned, family business that started out as a small boutique wholesaler at Kirrawee in Sydney’s south and has since become a leading and trusted brand in the meat game.

Name: De Koning Vlees B.V.
Description: The most exquisite meat for the industry!

Name: Fontana Ermes S.p.A
Description:
Fontana Ermes S.p.A. is a family-owned company specializing in the production of Parma Ham (Prosciutto di Parma) and a full range of traditional Italian cured and cooked meats.

Founded by Ermes Fontana in 1959, the business has always been driven by the dedication and passion of the Fontana family. Today, his children manage the company, while the third generation is already working alongside them, learning the craft and the love for the product that are passed down from parent to child, ensuring continuity over time.

What began with just 17 hams carefully salted and cured has grown into more than 500,000 hams per year. After years of investment, Fontana Ermes now operates on a production site of around 45,000 m² and relies on a team of over 200 employees, contributing to an annual turnover of approximately €70,000,000.

Name: D'Orsogna
Description: D'Orsogna is a proud family-owned business with 75+ years of tradition, offering award-winning hams, bacon, salami, and continental meats. True to its Italian roots, D'Orsogna stands for authentic taste, quality, and trusted customer service.

Name: Frilara Oficial
Description:
Com 14 anos de atuação no mercado, o Frilara possuí os melhores cortes, trazendo a melhor experiência para o seu dia a dia ou até mesmo para o churrasco do fim de semana! 

Frilara - Carnes, Cortes e Experiências!

Name: Pescafresh
Description:
We are Pescafresh! India's first direct-to-consumer brand in seafood and meats.  And we are now PescaLive! The WORLD'S first Live, real-time seafood and meats market!
Established in 2004 by Sangram Sawant, a seafood aficionado, Pescafresh has served more than 10 lakh households till date and continues to delight its customers.
In addition to Pescablue, our seafood brand with more than 75+ offerings, our No Antibiotics Ever (NAE) Chicken and NAE free range Eggs are bestsellers. Tender Red Mutton - Pescafresh's mutton products comes from ethically sourced and naturally raised goats. 
Recently, we also added our newest brand for ready to eat and ready to cook products- SASH22. The portfolio currently includes 10+ unique spreads, with flavours like Citrus Salmon and Butter Garlic Lobster flying off our shelves. 
Our pork deli meats were also launched, which are made with 100% English breed Yorkshire pigs, that are fed on a formulated corn and soy diet (never on hotel wastage). 
With our state of the art central factory in the heart of Mumbai, we have also added multiple fulfillment centres across the city to ensure quick delivery of our products to our customers. 
Pescafresh is all set to take over the Pune market soon, with its endeavor to serve customers with the most premium quality raw meats and seafood, and its RTE, and RTC offerings.

Name: Dunleavy Meats
Description:
Michael Dunleavy established Dunleavy Meats in 1961 as a local butcher shop and wholesale supplier, as well as running the family farm in the small town of Ballina, Co, Mayo. The reputation for the product and quality grew; due to demand in 1998 the company started work on a new abattoir and deboning facility. In 2001 Dunleavy Meats acquired its EU Licence and began to target mainland Europe.

Since then through a high level of investment and building relationships with our customers and suppliers we have developed the business and are working with companies all over Europe and outside the EU.

dunleavy-meats-ballina-mayo-about-us2
The business is now in its third generation and family experience has been a major growth factor in the growth of Dunleavy Meats.

Our background has gained us a strong respect for the traditions of Cattle raising and traditional butchery styles but we are also excited about providing consumers with new and exciting products.

We take pride providing to the needs of all our customers from wholesalers, producers right through to chefs leading the family table.

We offer a wide range of products from carcass to primal cuts. We are now committed to expanding our customer base in all international food markets and developing long term mutually beneficial partnerships.

Name: Siciliani Spa
Description: Siciliani is recognised as a leader in the meat industry for three simple reasons: passion, innovation, and quality. Our story began in the mid-1920s, when the Siciliani family started a meat trading business. In the late 1970s, Siciliani S.p.A. was established. Thanks to constant and targeted investment efforts, we have grown into one of the most important production companies in central and southern Italy.

Name: O'guste
Description:
Depuis 1974, c'est au cœur du bocage vendéen à Mortagne-sur-Sèvre que la centaine de salariés d'O'GUSTE élaborent avec passion, des produits carnés surgelés multi-espèces. 
 
Toujours à l’écoute de notre marché, les équipes d’O’GUSTE élaborent des offres viande sur-mesure, pour répondre aux attentes de tous les professionnels de l’alimentaire (restauration hors domicile, distribution et industrie agroalimentaire). 
 
Nous vous proposons un assortiment varié de plus de 500 références de viandes et abats surgelés crus (tranchés, cubés, piecés, émincés) ainsi que des produits élaborés crus ou cuits en bœuf, veau, porc, agneau, mouton… 
 
L’ensemble de nos démarches ainsi que notre unité de production sont certifiés IFS (International Food Standard), attestant d’un haut niveau de maîtrise de la qualité et de la sécurité alimentaire.

Name: Deeplant, Inc.
Description: Deeplant has a patented Deep Aging technology, which enhances meat quality in tenderness, juiciness, and flavor by treating for only 1 or 2 hours without any chemical additives. Low-fat lean meat can be high-value added and supplied to food companies or restaurants or produced as healthy meat products.

Name: Craft Butcher
Description: Craft Butcher is an online butchery specialising in supplying superior quality meat to all kinds of consumers: individuals, restaurants, catering schools. hotels and guesthouses. We aim to bring the highest quality at the lowest prices for you to enjoy. Contact us for more information on 072 497 2579 or info@craftbutcher.co.za or visit our website www.craftbutcher.co.za

Name: Mazratna
Description:
Mazratna vision
Mazratna to be the best in class
of meat industry

To be the best in class of meat
industry through creative
mindset agile management
smart ideas, qualified team work
that enhance the work flow as

farm to fork within the
highest level of quality, trust,
integrity, honesty and guarantee
  how to make our customers happy.

Name: EREN ET VE GIDA SAN. TİC. LTD. ŞTİ.
Description: Eren Et, 1997 yılında İstanbul Göztepe’de, lezzetini ve kaliteli hizmetini tüketicisiyle tanıştırdı.100 m² alan içerisinde günlük perakende satışı yanında portföyündeki müşteri çeşitliliğine restaurantları da ekleyip hedefine çok kısa bir zaman içerisinde ulaşmaya başladı. İlk günkü isteği, hırsı ve hizmet kalitesinden ödün vermeyen Eren Et, müşteri memnuniyetini ilke edinen ve tüketicinin zaman içinde değişen isteklerine cevap verebilecek kaliteli üretim anlayışını 23 yıllık deneyim ve tecrübesiyle toptan sektörüne de taşıdı.

Name: Camal Inversiones Asincar - Camaná
Description: Camal dedicado a la producción de carnes de bovinos y porcinos, con el objetivo de abastecer a Camaná con carne de calidad

Name: Pollos de Laiño
Description:
Pollos de Laiño es una empresa familiar apasionada por brindar productos avícolas excepcionales con más de 50 años de experiencia situada en Dodro, A Coruña. Especializados en pollos de corral 100% gallego, destacamos por nuestra sostenibilidad y bienestar animal.
Criamos pollos de forma natural y sostenible, sin hormonas ni antibióticos. Nuestro enfoque en el bienestar animal les proporciona una vida digna y saludable. Les alimentamos con una dieta de calidad, basada en cereales y legumbres, logrando productos finales de excelente sabor y textura.
Con una trayectoria destacada, hemos ganado reputación por la calidad inigualable de nuestros productos. Los clientes confían en la frescura y pureza de nuestros pollos de corral, provenientes de una crianza responsable y ética. 
Trabajamos de cerca con agricultores locales, fomentando prácticas agrícolas sostenibles y apoyando la economía local. Creemos que la calidad de los alimentos impacta en nuestra salud y bienestar, así como en el medio ambiente compartido.
Si buscas excelencia, sostenibilidad y bienestar animal, Pollos de Laiño es la elección perfecta. Valoramos la calidad, el sabor auténtico y la responsabilidad social. Únete a nuestro viaje culinario, donde cada plato de pollo se convierte en una experiencia gastronómica única y consciente.
Con nosotros, disfrutarás del auténtico sabor de la crianza sostenible del pollo gallego. No dudes en contactarnos hoy mismo y descubrir por qué nuestros productos son la elección preferida de los amantes de la buena comida.

Name: Szajek Zakłady Mięsne
Description: Zakłady Mięsne "Szajek" jest jedną z najstarszych firm w Polsce zajmujących się przetwórstwem

Name: FRIGOSAM
Description: Fábrica de embutidos de Venezuela

Name: Industrias Cárnicas Santa Marina
Description: En Industrias Cárnicas Santa Marina, llevamos más de 50 años haciendo lo que más nos gusta,  elaboramos productos cárnicos frescos y se los hacemos llegar a nuestros clientes con las más altas garantías de higiene y calidad.

Name: Chevideco NV
Description: Horsemeat

Name: Frigoríficos Bandeira
Description: Frigoríficos Bandeira S.L., es una compañía fundada en el año 1997, dedicada al sacrificio y despiece de ganado bovino. La gran experiencia adquirida a lo largo de tres generaciones en el trato de ganado nos ha situado como una de las empresas líderes en el sector, tanto a nivel nacional como internacional.

Name: MacelleriaSparacello.it
Description:
Dal 1989 Macelleria Sparacello è una storia di famiglia, mani che lavorano e scelte precise. Siamo nati dietro un banco e ci siamo rimasti per lo stesso motivo di allora: portare sulle tavole e nelle cucine professionali carni siciliane selezionate con cura ogni giorno.

Crediamo nelle cose fatte bene: artigianalità, qualità, filiera corta. Per questo lavoriamo solo carni 100% siciliane e certificate O.P. Sicilia: perché la fiducia si costruisce con i fatti, non con le promesse.

Oggi quella stessa cura la mettiamo in tre rami che parlano la stessa lingua:
macelleria, salumeria artigianale, gastronomia.

Siamo un partner per il mondo Ho.Re.Ca. in tutta Italia: forniture pensate per chi ha bisogno di continuità, precisione e prodotto affidabile, con un rapporto diretto e concreto.

E per chi vuole portarci a casa, c’è anche il nostro e-commerce: ordini online e spedizioni in tutta Italia.

Name: Heemskerk Surifood
Description: Wij voorzien, in en om Amsterdam , verschillende toko’s van onze producten. Zodat u niet altijd speciaal naar de markten in zuid-oost hoeft te komen. Daarnaast leveren wij ook in de buurt van Rotterdam enkele groothandelaren, Zodat ook in deze regio onze producten verkrijgbaar zijn.

Name: Fleischerei Richter Erzgebirge
Description:
Die Fleischerei Richter wurde 1969 als Familienunternehmen gegründet – und das ist es bis heute. Mit 700 Mitarbeitern verteilt über 120 Filialen und am Produktionsstandort in Oederan verstehen wir uns als große gemeinsame Arbeits-Familie. Das Wachstum und der Erfolg ist mit Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern gelungen, die ihre Arbeit mit Herz, Verstand und Liebe zum Beruf ausüben. In den letzten 50 Jahren unserer Firmengeschichte sind wir zum größten Filialist in unserer Branche in Mitteldeutschland gewachsen. Mit einem tollen Team in der Produktion, Verkauf, Verwaltung, Technik und Fuhrpark treten wir jeden Tag gemeinsam an, um für unsere Kunden das Beste zu geben.

Richter Erzgebirge ist mit dem Großen Preis des Mittelstandes ausgezeichnet. Der deutschlandweite Wirtschaftspreis bewertet ausgezeichnete Arbeit und das Unternehmen als Ganzes. Wir erhielten die Auszeichnung nicht nur aufgrund der wirtschaftlichen Entwicklung, sondern für echtes Engagement in der Sportförderung, der Agrarwirtschaft, der Unterstützung der Krebshilfe, sowie für Innovationen und Schaffung von Arbeitsplätzen – also für die komplexen Aufgaben, denen sich das Unternehmen stellt.

Aller guten Dinge sind drei und danach arbeiten wir auch: Genuss, Natur und Mensch.

Name: Jack's Secret
Description: De wereld een stuk beter te maken zonder geitenwollensokken aan te trekken? Dat kan met Jack’s Secret. Een nieuwe hybride vlees en jackfruit mix-up die smaakpupillen verrassen. Jack’s Secret is de duurzame, lekker smakende revolutie voor iedere vleeseter die vegetarisch of vleesvervangers links laat liggen vanwege de smaak. Een vleesaanvuller die past in deze tijd.

Name: Artémis srl
Description:
Nella nostra azienda, confluisce l’esperienza di tre generazioni della famiglia Beltramello, a cominciare da quella di nonno Luigi, commerciante di suini molto conosciuto già nel primo dopoguerra. In seguito, negli anni ’60, è stato papà Gianluigi ad avviare una fortunata attività di macellazione che è cresciuta fino a costituire il Salumificio Montegrappa, storica realtà produttiva di Rossano Veneto (VI) gestita poi dai figli Ettore e Stefano.

Ed è proprio da un’idea di Stefano Beltramello che nel 2007 nasce Artémis, azienda creata per rispondere non solo alle esigenze di ristoratori alla ricerca d’alta qualità, ma anche per sostenere aziende partner nello sviluppo di nuovi prodotti a base di carne e per strutturare e/o implementare i processi produttivi ad essi dedicati.

Name: Meat Emporium Limited
Description: Meat Emporium is a start-up butchery business that aims to provide high-quality and hygienic meat products to the Nigerian market. Meat Emporium offers a wide range of fresh, frozen, and processed meat products to meet the diverse needs of its customers.

Name: Carnes Llanqui
Description: CARNES LLANQUI is a company committed to excellence, quality, and customer satisfaction. Our success lies in our dedication, visionary leadership, and effective business strategies. We strive to exceed expectations in every interaction and remain a benchmark in the meat industry.

Name: Carnes Creta
Description:
Fundada en el año de 1952 por Don Fernando Duran Lima en la colonia Nochebuena de la ciudad de México. Originalmente se llamo Carnicería La Florida, sin embargo, fue con el cambio de ubicación y la fascinación por la cultura griega que se decidió cambiar el nombre a Carnicería Creta.

Perseverancia, compromiso y calidad permitieron que la pequeña carnicería creciera a una distribuidora con cada vez mayor potencial para sus clientes, por lo que en 1997 se estableció como una SA de CV.

Contamos con certificación T.I.F., además de la aprobación de la Secretaría de Salud. Ambas instituciones aseguran la calidad higiénica del proceso de recepción, sanitización, envase y distribución del producto. Así mismo hemos logrado implementar tecnología de punta en el manejo y procesamiento de la carne aplicando los conceptos fundamentales de calidad, tales como las Buenas Practicas de Manufactura y los Procedimientos de Operación Estándar. Estos instrumentos son las herramientas básicas de implementación del sistema de control de higiene denominado HACCP.

Tenemos mas de 65 años innovando y actualizando nuestro equipo de trabajo para dar frescura y presentación a nuestros productos para diferentes clientes, como son tiendas de autoservicio, hotelería y restaurantes. 

También somos desarrolladores de productos cárnicos, como son la arrachera marinada, la carne al pastor, bistec de cerdo enchilado, entre otros. Como tal nuestro enfoque es brindar sencillez y soluciones a las necesidades de nuestros clientes  con un equipo de desarrollos altamente capacitado.

Name: Landler GmbH
Description:
Die Landler GmbH ist eine Manufaktur in Peißenberg, die sich auf die Herstellung von handwerklich gefertigtem Rohschinken und hochwertigen Delikatessen spezialisiert hat. Seit der Gründung im Jahr 1993 setzen wir auf beste Handwerkstradition, natürliche Rohmaterialien und eine Vertriebsstruktur, die fernab von Massenartikeln liegt.

Schon in zweiter Generation stellen wir Rohschinken von höchster Qualität in handwerklicher Perfektion her. In unseren eigenen Räucherkammern entstehen nach traditionellen Rezepten Spezialitäten erster Güte.

Bei der Herstellung legen wir besonderen Wert auf beste Zutaten und sorgfältige Verarbeitung. Wir verwenden nur bestes Frischfleisch, das wir täglich kontrollieren. Unsere Lieferanten sind kleine Betriebe aus Bayern und Österreich, die unter natürlichen Bedingungen produzieren. Die Einhaltung strenger Qualitätsstandards und die regelmäßige Kontrolle unserer Lieferanten gewährleisten höchste Qualität.

Unsere Rohschinken werden von Hand mit Meersalz und einer natürlichen Gewürzmischung gewürzt, ohne den Einsatz von Geschmacksverstärkern oder Phosphaten. Anschließend werden sie über Buchenholz geräuchert und langzeitgereift in der frischen Luft des Pfaffenwinkels. Dieser Prozess dauert etwa 24 Wochen und verleiht unseren Schinkenspezialitäten ihren einzigartigen Geschmack.

Neben unseren eigenen Produkten bieten wir auch eine Auswahl an Delikatessen von ausgesuchten zertifizierten Partnern an, darunter Weine, Wurstwaren, Käse und Antipasti. Unsere Kunden sind Metzgereien, Feinkosthändler und ausgewählte Fachgroßhändler in Deutschland, Österreich, Italien und den Niederlanden. Darüber hinaus können unsere Produkte in unserem Hofladen in Peißenberg und in unserem Onlineshop erworben werden.

Bei Bedarf bieten wir auch Private Labeling dem wir individuelle Produkt- und Preisauszeichnungen ohne zusätzliche Kosten bereitstellen, um unseren Kunden einen maßgeschneiderten Service zu bieten.

Brotzeit ist Landlerzeit.

Name: Apley Smoked Pheasant
Description: Wild, free range, natural, additive free, tasty, meat. Low food miles. Clear provenance. Ready to eat, versatile. Freezes well. 3 week shelf life; 12 month in the freezer; Scanned for lead shot; Quite simply the best way to enjoy phesasant.

Name: Meat Quality
Description: H Επιχειρησιακή Ομάδα του έργου έχει ως στόχο την πιλοτική δημιουργία ενός ολοκληρωμένου συστήματος ιχνηλασιμότητας και ανάδειξης του ελληνικού κρέατος με σκοπό την προώθησή του τόσο στην Ελλάδα όσο και στη διεθνή αγορά.

Name: Frigorífico Lanús
Description: Somos una PyME familiar con más de 40 años de trayectoria en la producción de carne vacuna envasada al vacío, con presencia en todo el territorio argentino.

Name: Devine Quality Meats (Mullum Butcher)
Description:
Vince Devine has sold top quality, locally sourced meats to the locals and newcomers alike for over 50 years, opening Devine Quality Meats in Mullumbimby over 30 years ago. The new owners Jay and Greg are excited to continue the legacy that is Devine Quality Meats, Mullum’s Butcher.

Mullum’s beloved local butcher shop will still be home to the familiar faces and friendly service you have dealt with over the years and we still offer a range of traditional cuts, pre-prepared meals, and our made-in-house hams & bacon.

We are a retail butcher shop that has proudly served the Mullumbimby community for over 30 years and we pride ourselves on our quality products, great customer service and soon we will be offering online ordering.

Name: Harpley's Meat Packing (& Randolph Packing Company)
Description: Harpley's/Randolph Packing Company is one of the largest beef packing companies on the east coast.  Located in central North Carolina, Harpley's/Randolph Packing provides beef products that are enjoyed nationwide.

Name: Northwest Meat Processors Association
Description: NORTHWEST MEAT PROCESSORS ASSOCIATION is a company based out of 778 SW Chehalis Ave, Chehalis, Washington, United States.

Name: CV. Budi Jaya Prime
Description: CV. Budi Jaya Prime adalah perusahaan distributor terkemuka yang mengkhususkan diri dalam menyediakan daging dan pangan berkualitas tinggi. Sejak didirikan, kami telah berkomitmen untuk memberikan pelayanan terbaik dan produk-produk unggulan kepada pelanggan kami di seluruh wilayah. Berlandaskan nilai-nilai integritas, kualitas, dan keberlanjutan, kami berdedikasi untuk menjadi mitra tepercaya bagi para pelaku industri makanan.

Name: BMC Botswana Meat Commission
Description:
Botswana Meat Commission (BMC) is a body corporate established in 1965 through an Act of the Parliament of the Republic of Botswana (BMC Act).  It was established to procure livestock, slaughter same and sell the products of such slaughter locally, regionally and internationally at best achievable prices.  It also promotes livestock production schemes so as to ensure adequacy and sustainability of cattle supply to its abbattoirs.  

BMC has 3 main abbattoirs in Lobatse (main), Francistown and Maun, Botswana as well as a Tannery and Cannery in Lobatse.  Its head office is in Lobatse. The premises are an integrated complex housing the main administration block, an abattoir, cannery and byproducts plant.  It has subsidiaries in London, UK (sales); Cape Town, South Africa (Cold Storage); Cayman Islands (insurance); Germany (sales and distribution). 

BMC mostly exports to the EU and RSA.  Its two abattoirs in Lobatse and Francistown are licensed to sell in the EU as they meet all the EU animal welfare and food safety standards. .  Besides owning three abattoirs in Botswana, BMC has cold storage facilities in South Africa with marketing
subsidiaries in the United Kingdom, Germany, Holland and South Africa.

Name: Rastro Frigorífico y Servicios Integrales del Bajío, S.A. de C.V.
Description:
Sacrificio, corte y deshuese de ganado bovino, porcino, ovino y caprino. 
Rastro Frigorífico y Servicios Integrales del Bajío, S.A. de C.V.

Name: Jackson Hole Buffalo Meat Co.
Description: Jackson Hole Buffalo Meat Co. is a Jackson Hole based specialty meat shop focusing on the very best ranch-raised Bison (Buffalo), Elk and Wild Boar.  We've been in business for over 75 years and are proud to ship quality meat across the US.

Name: Carnes San Felipe
Description:
Somos una empresa comprometida con la calidad, la excelencia y el servicio al cliente que por más de 25 años nos hemos destacado por proveer una amplia variedad de productos cárnicos de primera categoría, desde carnes frescas y cortes especializados hasta productos procesados. 

Hemos logrado nuestro propósito gracias al trabajo con ganaderos de nuestro país que están comprometidos con prácticas de cría responsable y también a nuestro equipo de trabajo que con su experiencia asegura un corte con precisión y un buen servicio al cliente.

Cada vez que disfrutan de nuestros productos, nuestros clientes están experimentando el resultado de un proceso que se centra en la calidad desde el principio y la trazabilidad de un buen producto final.

Name: HerdShare
Description:
HerdShare is the direct supply platform for independent American beef, built to reconnect customers with the source of their food while giving U.S. ranchers a better path to market.

The U.S. beef industry is highly consolidated, leaving independent ranchers with limited pricing power and customers with little transparency around where their food comes from. HerdShare changes that by connecting institutions, campuses, and communities directly to independent U.S. ranches, eliminating unnecessary middlemen and creating a more resilient, transparent supply chain.

For ranchers, HerdShare provides access to a reliable customer base and predictable demand without the burden of marketing, distribution, or retail negotiations. For customers, HerdShare delivers clean, high-quality American protein with full visibility into sourcing, processing, and handling.

Our campus-first approach focuses on fraternity houses, community kitchens, and other high-volume buyers that value consistency, integrity, and quality. By starting where demand is dense and recurring, HerdShare builds durable relationships that scale responsibly.

HerdShare is not a grocery store and not a commodity brand. We are infrastructure for American protein—designed to support rural economies, strengthen food transparency, and ensure the people who raise our food remain connected to the people who consume it.

American Beef. American Values.

Name: PEARL COMMERCE LANKA PVT LTD
Description:
Pearl Commerce Lanka Pvt Ltd: A Legacy of Quality and Innovation
Pearl Commerce Lanka Pvt Ltd, formerly known as AMJ, is a distinguished company in Colombo renowned for its dedication to producing and distributing fresh poultry and meat. Targeting both restaurants and households, the company has established itself as a trusted name in the industry, committed to delivering high-quality products to its customers.
Tracing its roots back over six decades, Pearl Commerce Lanka Pvt Ltd is a third-generation run family business with a rich history of excellence and innovation. In 2015, the business underwent a rebranding and was renamed Pearl Commerce Lanka Pvt Ltd, marking a new chapter in its enduring legacy.
Since the rebranding, the company has diversified its operations beyond poultry and meat production. Embracing a forward-thinking approach, Pearl Commerce Lanka Pvt Ltd has ventured into the spice industry, offering a variety of high-quality spices to enhance culinary experiences. Additionally, the company has expanded into animal waste management, showcasing its commitment to sustainability and environmental responsibility.
With a steadfast commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, Pearl Commerce Lanka Pvt Ltd continues to build on its storied heritage, contributing significantly to the food and agriculture sector in Colombo and beyond.

Name: Salmon's Meat Products
Description:
Currently owned by the Ebert Family, the story dates back to 1915 when George Kohlbeck started his meat market in Luxemburg, WI. The building still stands across from Simonar’s Shell. 

In 1936, at the tender age of 16, Leo Salmon started working for his grandpa. As the oldest of the grandchildren and as it was in the depression, he had little real choice about his occupation at the time. But that was all right. Leo said, “I don’t regret it at all.”

On December 1, 1950, Leo joined in partnership with Don Barbiaux to form a custom slaughtering and sausage business west of Kewaunee under the name of Salmon & Barbiaux.

The company quit slaughtering in 1960 and sold mostly wholesale to the stores in Luxemburg, Algoma and Kewaunee.

In 1966, when Leo established the present company in Luxemburg, he made mainly wieners and bologna, selling only wholesale to supermarkets in the Luxemburg, Kewaunee and Algoma areas along with the small retail outlet in the front of the building that is still open today!

In 1985 Leo’s children, Gary and Glenn, purchased the business. Their expertise in the sausage making business was taught to them by their father.

In 1987 Gary and Glenn purchased a $26,000 stainless steel smoker to use in addition to their two old fashioned smokers. “The way we make it is really just the same as the old days” Gary said.

In 1990 Salmon’s took their wholesale products up a notch by adding an agreement with Festival Foods. Salmon’s products are still available at all Northeastern Wisconsin Festival Food’s locations to this day!

The Ebert family, seventh generation farmers purchased Salmon’s Meat Products on March 30, 2020. New owners, the Randy and Renee Ebert family, Algoma, Wis., will humbly carry on the traditions set by third generation meat processors, the families of Gary and Glenn Salmon.

Name: CARNS B, S.A.
Description:
CarnsB es una empresa familiar consolidada en el sector de la comercialización mayorista de productos cárnicos. 

En la actualidad, la empresa comercializa todo tipo de productos cárnicos: cuartos de canal de ternera, cordero, cabrito, potro, despiece de cerdo y aves. Así como el producto fileteado o entero, envasado al vacío o en bandejas, en fresco o congelado.

Somos una empresa especializada en la selección y comercialización de carne de ternera de alta calidad. Comercializamos ternero de color y pinto (muy apreciado en Cataluña); y género de vacuno de importación de diferentes orígenes y carnes maduradas.

El compromiso por la calidad y el buen hacer nos ha permitido posicionar marcas de calidad como ‘Moixina, ternera de confianza’ y tradición CB Angus, marcas registradas y propiedad de CarnsB que se caracterizan por ser carnes criadas en nuestro entorno, con alimentación vegetal 100% y respetuosas con el bienestar animal.

También disponemos de carnes aptas para la comunidad musulmana sacrificadas bajo ritual islámico.

Name: Castle Estate
Description:
At Castle Estate we believe that the better they live the better they taste.
We hand rear and lovingly farm our animals providing 1000 acres of land where they are free to roam the paddocks, grass grazing in the fresh air and open spaces, just as nature intended. It is extremely important to us that our animals experience the best quality of life possible at Castle Estate.

The paddocks provide the most nutritionally balanced diet for farm animals which is essential for them to maintain optimal health. So it makes sense that a healthy animal will provide not only great tasting meat but meat with nutritional value that can bolster the health of the person consuming it.

We are passionate about our ethical farming practices and respect the animals who provide us the food that sustains us and brings us joy. It goes full circle. Ultimately we believe that the better our animals live, the better able we are to deliver paddock-to-plate freshness that tastes second to none.
Castle Estate is located in Camperdown, South-West Victoria. Situated on the banks of Lake Purrumbete, the estate consists of 905 acres of some of the country’s most fertile agricultural land. We come from seven generations of the Castle family who have been farming on this land since 1851. Ethical, natural and sustainable farming is in our blood. We advocate humane farming practices with no intervention, no antibiotics and no lot feeding. Our animals live as nature intended and this is key because not only do we respect the animals, we believe that the better they live, the better the taste.

We have our very own on site abattoir on our property to help ensure we have complete control of the supply chain from paddock to plate. Where we uphold the most humane practices to support the animals through transition and guarantee the best tasting meat is delivered. Each and every animal can be traced from farm to plate, giving the customer a piece of mind.

Name: La Casa del Prosciutto - Alberti 1906
Description:
Prosciuttificio Artigianale della Famiglia Alberti dal 1906, il più antico di San Daniele del Friuli. 
E’ oramai l’unica azienda rimasta a produrre il rinomato Prosciutto di San Daniele sulla sommità del colle della cittadina, a due passi dalla piazza. Sinonimo di una lunga esperienza di cinque generazioni, rispetta le antiche tecniche di lavorazione artigianale, a garanzia di un prodotto rinomato in tutto il mondo. 
I prosciutti vengono fatti stagionare in saloni costruiti in perfetta armonia con il contesto paesaggistico: qui, oggi come un tempo, il prodotto giunge al punto giusto di maturazione grazie al naturale flusso delle correnti d’aria della zona morenica di San Daniele del Friuli. Nel complesso produttivo, recentemente rinnovato, si utilizzano le ultime tecnologie per un preciso controllo qualitativo. 
Annessa allo stabilimento troviamo la Storica Osteria, dove si può degustare ed acquistare il Prosciutto di San Daniele ed altri numerosi prodotti tipici friulani. 
L’azienda Alberti 1906 effettua anche vendita on-line.
Location: San Daniele del Friuli, Friuli-Venezia Giulia

Name: Ströj Rundvlees
Description:
Rust - Ruimte - Rundvlees
De runderen van Ströj zijn van het Belgisch Witblauwe ras en brengen hun eerste levensjaren door in de rustige omgeving van de Belgische Ardennen. Ze worden hier verzorgd door kleine ‘postbode’-boeren, die vaak al generaties lang runderen houden en als geen ander weten hoe ze de dieren het beste kunnen verzorgen. Zodra de runderen tussen de 3 en 7 jaar oud zijn, komen ze naar het Nederlandse Castenray, waar de familie Geerets de zorg voor de dieren overneemt. Deze boerenfamilie heeft al vier generaties lang ervaring in het boerenleven en weet precies wat goed is voor hun dieren. De Ströj runderen genieten dan ook van veel zorg en aandacht. 

Van de grasheuvels in de Belgische Ardennen naar strobedden in het Limburgse Oirlo.

De Ströj boeren hebben niet alleen jarenlange ervaring, maar werken ook al lang heel goed samen. Bovendien hechten ze veel waarde aan dierenwelzijn. Dat zorgt ervoor dat de runderen in alle rust en ruimte opgroeien:
- In de Belgische Ardennen lopen de koeien in alle rust rond op de grasheuvels
- De koeien leven in kleine groepen van 6 tot 8 runderen
- Er wordt veel tijd genomen voor een goede verzorging
- De voeding wordt op maat en naar behoefte van de dieren samengesteld
- De ruimtelijke stallen in Nederland zijn voorzien van een dikke laag stro.

Name: TU MPPTA
Description:
Tuskegee University’s Meat and Poultry Processing Technical Assistance (TU MPPTA). Our program supports USDA’s meat and poultry supply chain expansion and diversification initiatives by providing technical assistance to federal grant applicants and to grant-supported projects in the following area(s) scope(s): as a
 
Technical Assistance Provider:  
 
SCOPE I: Federal Funding Technical Assistance 
 
SCOPE II: Agricultural Business Development Technical Assistance 
 
SCOPE III: Meat and Poultry Processing Technical Assistance 
 
SCOPE IV: Supply Chain Development Technical Assistance
 
 
 
Tuskegee University’s Meat and Poultry Processing Technical Assistance (TU MPPTA) program will primarily address the needs of participants in the Alabama Blackbelt Region and throughout the greater Southeastern US (SE), specifically Alabama, Florida, Georgia, Kentucky, Maryland, Mississippi, North Carolina, South Carolina, Tennessee, Virginia, Louisiana, Arkansas, and West Virginia as well as other 1890 Land-Grant Institution (LGI) states, including Texas, Ohio, Missouri, Delaware, and Oklahoma. Further, the TU MPPTA will work closely as appropriate to broadly support the USDA’s efforts beyond these areas. We are looking to connect with Program Leaders, Specialists, and County Staff in these states with clientele interested in meat and poultry processing.

At Ostrich Oasis Farm, we believe in revolutionizing the meat industry by offering sustainable, nutrient-rich alternatives. Our passion for quality and health fuels our commitment to bringing premium ostrich meat to your table.

Description:
Ülkemizin farklı yerlerinde bulunan 5 bölge müdürlüğü ve bu bölge müdürlüklerine bağlı bayii ağı ve ulusal/ yerel zincir marketler kanalıyla ülkemizin her yerine hizmet etmeye çalışılmaktadır. Tüm dağıtım ağında kendine ait sıcaklığı sürekli kontrol edilen frigofrik araçları kullanmaktadır.

 
Ana ham maddesi olan dana ve kuzu etini Orta ve Doğu Anadolu bölgesinden alan firmamız, kullandığı baharatları alanında uzman yurt içi ve yurt dışı firmalardan tedarik etmektedir. Baharatlarımız aromasını ve lezzetini kaybetmemesi için – 40 derecede öğütülüp ürünlerimizde kullanılmakta böylelikle daha az baharat kullanılıp daha yoğun lezzetler elde edilebilmektedir.

Firmamızda hammadde alımından ürün sevkiyatına kadar olan tüm üretim süreç şuan dünyadaki en gelişmiş gıda güvenliği yönetim sistemlerinden biri olan FSSC 22000 ile kontrol edilmektedir. Alanında uzmanlaşmış veteriner hekimlerin, gıda mühendisleri ve et teknologlarından oluşan gıda güvenliği ekibiyle tüm üretim süreci her gün 100 ün üzerinde noktada takibi yapılmakta ve süreçlerin fiziki, kimyasal ve mikrobiyal analizleri firma bünyemizdeki laboratuvarlarda yapılmaktadır. Ayrıca uygulamakta olduğumuz ISO 9001 Kalite Yönetim Sistemi, ISO 14001 Çevre Yönetim Sistemi ve OHSAS 18001 İş Güvenliği ve İşçi Sağlığı Yönetim Sistemleri ve Helal Gıda Yönetim Sistemleriyle toplam kaliteye ulaşmak için çalışılmaktadır.

Şarküteri alanında yurtiçi pazarının önemli aktörlerden birisi olan firmamızın son 10 yılda özel önem vererek markalaşma adına adımlar attığı taze et üretimi, turizm bölgelerinde karşılık bulmuş ve Akdeniz ve Ege Bölgeleri’nin yüksek kaliteli otel ve restoranlarının ana tedarikçisi konumuna ulaşılmıştır.

Name: 하림
Description:
닭고기 전문 기업 ㈜하림은 1978년 전북 익산 황등에서 시작되었습니다.
1986년 ㈜하림식품을 설립하고 농장과 공장, 시장을 연결하는 ‘삼장(三場) 통합’ 경영을 완성해 대한민국 육계 산업의 글로벌 경쟁력을 높이고 있습니다.
㈜하림은 국내 최초로 축산물 품질인증 시대를 열고 포장육과 너겟 제품 등 육가공 식품을 생산했습니다. 무항생제 및 동물복지 브랜드인 자연실록과 신선함을 극대화한 브랜드인 프레쉬업(Fresh-Up) 등 프리미엄 닭고기 시장을 개척했습니다.

새롭게 신축된 익산 신 공장에서는 간편식 및 양념육 등 더 다양한 닭고기 제품들을 생산해 새로운 시장을 만들어 나가고 있습니다.
㈜하림은 2014년 우리나라 전통식품인 삼계탕을 국내 축산물 최초로 미국에 수출하였습니다. ㈜하림은 농가를 비롯해 협력업체들과 동반성장할 수 있는 상생경영을 이어갈 것이며, 세계 일류 품질과 생산성을 추구하며 오는 2030년 가금 식품 세계 10위를 목표로 하고 있습니다.

Name: Jordan Casing Company
Description:
Jordan Casing Company | Supplying Quality, Service, and Trust Since 1995

For over two decades, Jordan Casing Company has been a trusted supplier to the meat processing and food production industry across North America.
We specialize in providing high-quality natural hog casings, vacuum and shrink bags, and Excalibur seasonings to butchers, meat processors, and food manufacturers who value consistency, reliability, and service.

What sets us apart is simple. We focus on relationships as much as results.
From small family-run butcher shops to large-scale food producers, we ensure every customer receives the same level of attention, care, and product integrity.

Our products help food professionals maintain the quality and flavor their customers expect, backed by dependable delivery and personalized service.
Based in San Rafael, California, we proudly serve clients across the United States and Canada.

Whether you’re looking for natural casings, custom packaging solutions, or specialized seasonings, Jordan Casing Company is here to help your business operate efficiently and deliver with confidence.

Name: Formosa Food Company Inc.
Description:
Founded on family tradition and craftsmanship, Formosa Food Company is a third-generation meat processing manufacturer specializing in authentic Taiwanese products, including shredded dried pork (better known as Pork Sung and Pork Fu), jerky, sausage, and cuttlefish.

Our story began with a small street stand in 1952 Taiwan. In 1983, the next generation brought this legacy to the United States, establishing Formosa Food Company in Hull, IA. Today, the third generation continues to honor that heritage aiming to preserve the same recipes, work ethic, and artisanal methods that have defined our products for more than 70 years. 

At Formosa Food, we are committed to delivering freshness, consistency, and quality in every product. As we continue to grow, we remain dedicated to the values that built our foundation. 

Looking ahead, we are excited to expand our operations to a new facility in Sioux Falls, SD, projected for completion in 2027. This investment represents our continued commitment to innovation, community and serving our customers with the very best for generations to come.

The company is located in Ferdowsiyeh Industrial Park, Shahriar, Tehran.

Genepork. Producción porcina de excelencia.

Name: Pan Kurchak Group
Description:
Agroindustrial Group “Pan Kurchak” is a vertically integrated holding, uniting leading enterprises across the full agricultural value chain — from crop cultivation to high-quality meat and sausage production.

Our structure includes:
• Crop cultivation: LLC “PP Zakhidna Agrarna Kompaniya” and LLC “ZAK-Service” are responsible for modern and sustainable cultivation of grains, ensuring top-quality raw materials.
•Grain export: LLC “Agrotekhnika” — a dynamic and rapidly growing company, expanding its capacities and product portfolio to provide reliable grain exports to Europe and beyond.
• Egg incubation: LLC “Agidel” operates one of the most advanced and largest incubation facilities in Western Ukraine, specializing in parent stock management and chick rearing.
• Poultry farming: LLC “Ptakhokompleks Hubyn” covers all stages of poultry farming — from breeding to production and sales of premium poultry meat.
• Pig farming: LLC “Vira-1” focuses on breeding and fattening high-quality pork, running its own breeding and finishing complexes.
• Meat and sausage production: LLC “Novovolynskyi Meat Processing Plant” is a state-of-the-art facility producing sausages, beef deboning, mechanically separated meat, and various semi-finished products.

Our strengths:
• Full cycle from field to finished product
• Modern facilities and advanced technologies
• Strong export potential and international partners
• Commitment to quality, food safety, and sustainability

We are open to cooperation and new partnerships in Ukraine and abroad!

Description:
Unser Sortiment umfasst unter anderem küchengeräucherte Bauernwürste, die nach alten Familienrezepten hergestellt werden, sowie unser Emmental Dry Aged Beef, das für seine Geschmacksintensität und Zartheit bekannt ist. Die Produkte von Linden Fleisch GmbH sind in allen Filialen der Lüthi's Fleischwaren oder der im Dorfansässigen Preisknaller Metzgerei - unsere Hauptpartner - erhältlich. Dies garantiert, dass die Qualität und Frische, die unsere Kunden erwarten und schätzen, stets gewährleistet ist.

Durch die Kombination aus lokaler Produktion und Großhandelsdistribution kann Linden Fleisch GmbH nicht nur die Bedürfnisse der regionalen Gemeinschaften bedienen, sondern auch sicherstellen, dass die reiche kulinarische Tradition der Schweiz erhalten und gefeiert wird. Jedes Stück Fleisch, das unsere Produktionsstätte verlässt, trägt die Handschrift unserer Leidenschaft für Fleischwaren und unser Engagement für Exzellenz.

Entdecken Sie die Vielfalt und den authentischen Geschmack der Produkte von Linden Fleisch GmbH in Ihren lokalen Lüthi's Fleischwaren Filialen und erleben Sie, wie wir Tradition und moderne Geschmackserlebnisse unter einem Dach vereinen.
