Name: Димитър Маджаров месни и млечни продукти
Description:
„Димитър Маджаров“ е българска фирма за производство и дистрибуция на месни и млечни продукти. Те се изнасят в 16 европейски страни, Кипър, Малта, Великобритания и Нова Зеландия. 
Компанията носи името на своя основател и собственик Димитър Маджаров, който ръководи и месопреработвателното предприятие. Съпругата Юлия Маджарова отговаря за  преработката на мляко, а дъщерята Станислава Маджарова е търговски директор маркетинг, продажби и износ. Централният офис и месопреработвателният завод са в Пловдив, а млекопреработвателното предприятие в Стамболийски.  
Компанията е създадена през 1991 г. като предприятие за търговия и дистрибуция на храни.  През 1994 г. започва собствено производство на колбаси, през 1999 г. –  на сирене и кашкавал, през 2015 г. – на кисело мляко и през 2021 г. – на прясно мляко. 
В производството са въведени GMP, НАССР, ISO9001 и International Food Standard. Покриват се стандартите на БДС и храните с традиционно специфичен характер. „Димитър Маджаров“ има над 20 награди за качество. 
Слоуганът на компанията е "От нашето семейство за вашето семейство". Марката е любима на хората, които поставят на трапезата си качествена и вкусна храна. 
„Създаваме съвестно продуктите си, с вяра в семейството и качествената храна“, обобщава създателят Димитър Маджаров. Вече над 30 години фирмата предлага месни и млечни продукти с постоянно добро качество и ползи за здравето.

Name: El Toro Beef
Description: A El Toro Beef é uma empresa inovadora situada na melhor região para matéria-prima bovina. Com um forte foco no mercado internacional, oferecemos produtos de alta qualidade que atendem aos mais elevados padrões mundiais

Name: Vleeswaren De Keyser
Description: Vleeswaren De Keyser is een van de belangrijkste Belgische private label-producenten van fijne vleeswaren in varken, kip en kalkoen. Daarnaast leveren we een uitgebreid gamma vleesproducten voor verdere verwerking in convenience food, zoals broodjes, sauzen, soepen, warme maaltijden en wokken. Vanuit onze 7 complementaire en nauw samenwerkende plants in België bedienen we met 300 collega’s de winkelketens, voedingsindustrie, food service en grossiers binnen heel Europa.

Name: The British Premium Sausage Company
Description:
Hello from all of us here at the British Premium Sausage Company, UK-based manufacturer and supplier of premium sausage and meat products.

With decades of experience supplying hotels, restaurants and food servicing businesses throughout the UK, Europe and beyond, our directors, Andy Dalton and Ian Cundell, have the knowledge and experience to deliver exactly what customers are looking for – Premium Quality, Premium Service and of course Premium Value.
“We wanted to change the perception of what the British public think about sausages, which, five years ago, revolved around badly manufactured products made with low quality ingredients.

Name: Dean & Peeler Meats
Description:
In 2014, two South Texas ranching families brought together a lifetime of cattle production and feeding experience to create one innovative and vertically integrated beef-on-dairy operation: Dean & Peeler Meats.
 
Since its inception, Dean & Peeler Meats has evolved, raising the bar with innovative, premium products and services for every meat industry stakeholder, spanning from direct-to-consumer to retail and foodservice. Today, the company also stands as a diversified meat purveyor, offering a range of premium products, including value-added pork and chicken offerings. Through their subsidiary, Supreme Meat Purveyors, they've enhanced their capabilities, catering to a dynamic B2B market while staying true to their roots.
 
Deeply involved in every facet of their business, the Dean and Peeler families emphasize both heritage and innovation. Their commitment extends across all segments, ensuring supply chain excellence and enduring relationships with partners. As they embrace the future of the meat industry, Dean & Peeler Meats invite collaborators, consumers, and families to join them on the journey.

Name: Gourmexgt
Description:
Embarking on a journey of growth, we proudly introduce our next venture with immense pride & content. Our specialization lies in providing exquisite Japanese, Australian Wagyu beef to an array of establishments ranging from esteemed restaurants to luxurious hotels. We are determined to disseminate the indulgence of succulent meat, captivating discerning palates with remarkable delight.
Spanning a legacy of 37 years, our parental company keeps the motto of delivering our clientele the great one, and we are committed to delivering unmatching quality meat.

Name: Avícola Galocha S.L.
Description:
En Avícola Galocha, contamos con más de 30 granjas integradas y tenemos una producción de casi seis millones de pollos al año. Estas cifras nos sitúan como una significativa empresa productora de pollo y nos convierten en un referente dentro del sector, un hito que hemos conseguido siendo respetuoso con nuestra propia tradición.

Nuestro producto llega a diferentes comunidades autónomas del país, desde Castilla y León a Asturias, Madrid, Andalucía, Comunidad Valenciana y Cataluña.

La cría de estas aves se hace mediante integración con granjeros de la zona. Nuestros servicios veterinarios se encargan de visitar a diario las instalaciones donde se crían para garantizar el bienestar animal y la calidad de la materia prima.

La empresa vigila también la seguridad alimentaria en las modernas instalaciones del centro de procesado de aves que tiene en San Cristóbal de Entreviñas.
Location: San Cristóbal de Entreviñas, Castilla and Leon

Name: BILTONG WARRIORS
Description: BILTONG WARRIORS is a Sandton-based company that provides quality biltong to companies within Sandton, Randburg, Roodepoort and Johannesburg

Name: Breitenmoser Appenzeller Fleischspezialitäten AG
Description: Als einer der führenden Fleischveredlungsbetriebe im Appenzellerland mit höchsten Qualitätsansprüchen und eigenen, geschützten und prämierten Spezialitäten, profitieren Sie täglich von unserer grossen Auswahl an frischen Fleisch-, Wurst-und Fischprodukten.

Description: Uma representação legal das categorias econômica das indústrias de carnes e derivados de MG

Name: Prime Foods Ghana
Description:
We are a distinguished nimble team from Ghana and the sole manufacturer of healthy and affordable Ghanaian made sausages (Prime Akono Sausages). Our sausages range from Chicken, Beef and Pork, and we offer value for money by ensuring that our sausages are 75%-80% meat with healthy ingredients sourced locally. Prime Foods Ghana is a production company under Sal-San Limited, which was established in 2022 at Kushea, Central Region.

With the rapid growth of restaurants, hotels, malls, food joints, etc, in the country, we recognized  the high demand of pre cooked sausages. This triggered our existence to meet the rising demand of consumers by providing excellent, flavored, premium quality sausages.

Name: Grant Park Packing
Description: Grant Park Packing is a Meat Processing facility in Franklin Park, IL.

Name: Carolina Black
Description:
Prazer somos o Frigorífico Carolina Black, nossas carnes foram desenvolvidas nos mínimos detalhes para surpreender e oferecer uma experiência inesquecível.
Nossa preocupação vai além de raça, fatores como: genética, alimentação, clima, relevo, vegetação, manejo e o bem estar animal são levados muito a sério para garantir qualidade e uma padronização permanente.
Unindo a maciez proporcionada pela genética dos Taurinos (Angus/Hereford) com o sabor intenso dos Zebuínos (Brahmam) nossa carne é macia e também muito saborosa.
Na incansável busca pela carne perfeita, selecionamos para o abate animais jovens, com idade entre 18 e 24 meses de 0 a 2 dentes, 100% nutridos de pasto natural, dando origem ao nosso selo Grass Fed e garantindo um sabor diferenciado.
Sejam bem vindos ao Mundo Carolina Black

Name: Sivasakthi Hatcheries and Farms
Description:
Sivasakthi group, a renowned name in the poultry industry in Tamilnadu is all about a dream come true for a young farmer.

Having started his journey with an opening of poultry farm at Palladam in 1993, due to his hard work and meticulous planning has made “Sivasakthi Group” a reputed name within the Industry.

We at Sivasakthi believe in conducting business with integrity and fairness, supporting and improving lives of all our associates and partners. We are supporting livelihood of more than 10000 farmers directly and has played a role in improving their livelihood for better. We owe our growth to understanding of the consumer needs and ever-changing market dynamics. We constantly explore the possibilities of better ourselves to stay ahead in the competition.

We are a fully integrated poultry company with own Feed mill, Extraction Plant, Research and Development Farms, Hatcheries, Processing plant, further Processing plant and Chain of QSR outlets.

We have several company owned wind mill and Solar power plant for producing more than 5MW of sustainable energy for our own use.

Name: Staunton Foods Ltd.
Description:
Staunton Foods Ltd. was established in 1950 and has been supplying quality Pork and Bacon products for over 50 years both to domestic and export markets.
 
Based in the picturesque village of Timoleague, in rural West Cork, Staunton Foods Ltd. opened a new purpose built factory in 1996 from where it continues to operate.  Subsequent expansion of the factory in 2005, 2008 and again in 2012 has allowed Staunton Foods Ltd. to grow to become one of the main pig meat processors in the Ireland.

Having grown from humble beginnings Staunton Foods Ltd. is now a major employer in the West Cork region.  All the pigs that are processed are guaranteed of Irish origin, the majority of which are sourced locally.  The production operations are conducted under the highest quality standards with Bord Bia (Irish Food Bord Quality Standard) and BRC (British Retail Consortium) approval.  Staunton Foods Ltd. are also approved to supply all the major export markets worldwide.
 
Staunton Foods Ltd. supply a full range of Pork and Bacon primal products both fresh and frozen to a wide variety of customers. These customers include further processing facilities, wholesalers, the food service industry, manufacturers and retailers located in Ireland and throughout the world.”

Name: Grauwiler 1821 AG
Description:
Grauwiler vereint Handwerk und Innovation. Als älteste Metzgerei der Stadt Basel ist es unser Anspruch, die Region mit den besten Produkten zu beliefern – zugeschnitten auf die aktuellen Bedürfnisse unserer Kundschaft. Für Genuss im Einklang mit unserer Zeit.

Handwerk
Grauwiler steht seit 1821 für echtes Metzgerhandwerk. Diese Tradition macht uns stolz und ist unser Ursprung für Qualität und Nachhaltigkeit in der Lebensmittelverarbeitung. Gleichzeitig motiviert sie uns, unsere Kundschaft immer wieder zu begeistern: für Genuss im Einklang mit unserer Zeit.

Nähe
Grauwiler ist fest in Basel verankert. Diese Verbundenheit zeigt sich im persönlichen Verhältnis zu unserer Kundschaft, der wir aufmerksam und unkompliziert zur Seite stehen. Gleichzeitig leben wir auch die sprachliche Vielfalt unserer Region und wollen zu einer lebendigen Esskultur beitragen.

Kreativität
Grauwiler macht sich für seine Kundschaft stark. Wir sehen uns als kreativen Dienstleister, der rasch neue Lösungen für sich verändernde Bedürfnisse entwickelt. Diese offene Haltung ermöglicht uns, auch in Zukunft ein begehrter Partner in einem dynamischen Markt zu sein.

Name: DISTRIBUCIONES ALIMENTARIAS MERCASUR S.L.
Description: SELECCIÓN, DEDICACIÓN Y CERCANÍA. Posiblemente estás sean las palabras que mejor nos definen en cuanto a nuestro trabajo y en el trato con el cliente final. Trabajamos diariamente para poder servir los mejores productos, con el mejor trato, con la máxima frescura y al instante.

Name: Trust Agro Foods (TAF) – PT. Trisula Bintang Utama Group
Description: Trust Agro Foods (TAF) – PT. Trisula Bintang Utama Group charts our path as a scalable National agro-food group on core values and focused expansion with emphasis on identified sustainability initiatives. We consistently deliver nutritious products that meet the needs of the modern population. Trust Agro Foods (TAF) – PT. Trisula Bintang Utama Group As customer-oriented Company, TAF is committed to ensure access availability on its products through a wide distribution area coverage, affordable prices, and quality as well, proven to be fresh and safe for consumption. We seek to make a positive contribution to society via our five business line activities.

Name: Ashley Foods Inc
Description:
Ashley Foods is the preeminent regional purveyor of meats and cheeses to fine restaurants, country clubs and hotels. Our stature as a Delaware Valley institution was not achieved overnight, though. From the moment that he started our company as a one-man operation in 1984, our founder, Bernie Loke, was determined on placing his personal stamp on every aspect of Ashley’s product and customer service. This insistence on excellence was cultivated from Bernie’s experience that spanned from working in local restaurant kitchens as a 12 year-old to his roles as a chef at some of the area’s most noted catering facilities, country clubs and restaurants.

Through our founder’s hard work and determination, Ashley Foods blossomed from a tiny pasta and dessert product distributor to what it is today, a full-service provisioner, offering the finest meats and cheeses to the finest regional establishments.

Carrying on Bernie’s legacy is his daughter, and the company’s namesake, Ashley Hanlon. Ashley grew up in and around our family company, at her father’s side every step of the way. In this new and exciting era of the company, Ashley has combined her exuberance and business school training with her practical industry sense gained on-site since she was a little girl. Our company is stronger and more dedicated to its customers than ever!

Name: Buzzi S.p.A.
Description: Dal 1919 selezioniamo e distribuiamo solo carni di alta qualità, provenienti da filiere esclusive e controllate. Offriamo tagli pregiati di bovino e suino da Italia, Europa, USA, Giappone, Argentina e Brasile garantendo sicurezza e qualità certificata.

Name: Charque Rio Mar / BigCharque Ind e Com LTDA
Description: Empresa do ramo alimentício, focada na produção de charque, com marca reconhecida há mais de duas décadas. Com nosso trabalho, levamos tradição, sabor e um produto de qualidade a mesa dos nossos clientes.

Name: Ottawa Valley Meats
Description:
Simple and Easy Custom Orders of Beef, Pork, Chicken, and Lamb from Family Farms In The Ottawa Area.  All Grassfed, Natural, Free-Range and High Quality. Connecting Families In Ottawa Directly To Their Farmers

Ottawa Valley Meats is uniquely integrated. We operate our own abattoir,  packing plant and distribution.  We control the full process from steer to steak, ensuring our customers get the quality that is expected.

Name: INCARNA SAS
Description: Industria Cárnica Nacional (INCARNA) es una empresa dedicada a ofrecer alimentos cárnicos, producidos con altos estándares de calidad, para brindar a nuestros consumidores los mejores embutidos, cortes y ahumados del mercado.

Name: FREEDOM RUN FARM LLC
Description: Partnering with the culinary community across the country to deliver our Certified USDA premium quality lamb-consistently, all year round.

Name: Morgan Beef
Description:
Morgan Beef, a renowned wholesaler of quality beef cuts, stands as a beacon of quality and integrity in the meat industry. As a leading player in South Africa's red meat sector, our journey, which began as a modest feedlot in the late 1990s, has flourished into an expansive international operation.

Our organization is structured around three primary business units:
1. Morgan Abattoir: An export-approved slaughterhouse, meat wholesaler, and beef deboning plant situated in the Springs Industrial area.
2. Morgan Agri: A sophisticated agronomy and feedlot operation located near Delmas, providing a bespoke Custom Feeding service to cattle breeders.
3. Brits Leathers: A wet blue leather tanning facility, operating as a sister company to our organization.

Each of these units is steered by our highly skilled staff, whose years of unrivaled knowledge and experience are invaluable. Our unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction and quality assurance forms the bedrock of our success.

Our vision is unambiguous: we aim to supply top-tier meat products, foster enduring client relationships, and contribute to the sustainability of the red meat industry. Our core values of integrity, transparency, accountability, urgency, and commitment to excellence are the driving forces behind our continued growth and future success.

In essence, Morgan Beef is more than just a meat provider; it is a symbol of quality, sustainability, and excellence in the meat industry.

Name: Gallicoop Pulykafeldolgozó Zrt. - hivatalos oldal
Description:
A szarvasi Gallicoop Pulykafeldolgozó Zártkörűen Működő Részvénytársaság 1989-es megalakulása óta Magyarország legnagyobb zárt rendszerű pulykahústermelő integrációjával rendelkező vállalatává nőtte ki magát, mely folyamatosan növekvő szakmai eredményeket produkál.
Működési folyamatai közé tartozik többek között a keltetés, előnevelés és hízlalás, feldolgozás, húskészítmények gyártása, csomagolása és értékesítése. 
Mára a Gallicoop, mint vállalat és márkanév egyet jelent a megbízható, egészséges és minőségi, 100%-ban magyar alapanyagú termékekkel.
A friss pulykahúsok mellett már közvetlen fogyasztásra szánt, és minőségileg korszerű termékek széles skálájával rendelkezik. A magyar tulajdonú vállalat közel 1.200 munkavállalót foglalkoztat, integrált termelőin keresztül pedig további 1.000 fő megélhetését biztosítja.

Since its establishment in 1989, the Gallicoop Turkey Processing Private Limited Company in Szarvas has grown into Hungary's largest closed-system turkey meat production company, which produces continuously increasing professional results.
Its operational processes include, among others, hatching, rearing and fattening, processing, production, packaging and sale of meat products.
Today, Gallicoop, as a company and brand name, is synonymous with reliable, healthy and high-quality products with 100% Hungarian ingredients.
In addition to fresh turkey meat, it has a wide range of high-quality, modern products intended for direct consumption. The Hungarian-owned company employs nearly 1,200 workers, and through its integrated producers, provides the livelihood of another 1,000 people.

Name: Elassona Farm
Description:
Elassona sits in the foothills of Mount Olympus, touching the soil of the plain of Thessaly and breathing in the scents of the mountain of the gods.
At the end of 2014, we acquired a small slaughterhouse, Vakrel, in the wider area.
In the time that has passed since then, our feet have remained firmly on the ground but we have made our dreams a reality, creating a state-of-the-art meat production unit that is completely vertically integrated.
Through careful research, study and planning, our dreams continue and we have renamed our company Elassona Farm, reflecting the place where our products come from.

Our endeavour is based on:

Knowledge of our business

We have accumulated a good deal of experience in our long history and we think about our business and subject it to scrutiny on a daily basis. That is what helps us improve and respond directly to modern demands.

Innovation

Our state-of-the-art processing unit, among the most innovative in Europe, enables us to create new trends in the meat market.

Entrepreneurship

We make an enormous effort to improve production factors and create added value that will strengthen the company, benefitting employees, the local community, and society as a whole through our direct participation in prosperity and progress.

Culture

Culture is a complex whole that includes knowledge, belief, art, habits and customs, and other skills acquired when people are part of a social group.

 

We strive to help everyone in our company develop every day, through care, diligence and education, constantly improving our knowledge and cultural appreciation.

We stand firmly on the ground but as far as our dreams are concerned, the sky’s the limit..

 

Athansios Kasidis

Name: L'Chaim Meats
Description:
Adam Hendry
Founder/CEO at Lchaimmeats.com | Connecting People with Quality Kosher Meats

Welcome to Lchaimmeats.com! 

We are a premier online platform dedicated to connecting individuals with the finest quality kosher meats. As the Chief Cowboy, I am proud to lead a team that is passionate about providing an exceptional culinary experience to our valued customers.

At Lchaimmeats.com, we understand the importance of quality, taste, and authenticity. We partner with trusted suppliers who specialize in grass-fed and all-natural kosher bison, beef, and lamb. Every cut of meat we offer meets the highest standards of kosher certification, ensuring an unparalleled dining experience.

Our user-friendly website offers a wide range of options, from premium grass-fed beef to tender lamb and flavorful bison. Whether you are planning a festive family dinner, a special occasion, or simply looking to elevate your everyday meals, Lchaimmeats.com has you covered.

With a seamless ordering process and nationwide shipping, we bring the convenience of online shopping to your doorstep. We take great care in packaging and delivering your orders, ensuring that they arrive fresh, well-insulated, and ready to be savored.

What sets us apart is our commitment to exceptional customer service. We believe in building lasting relationships with our clients, understanding their unique preferences and dietary needs. Our knowledgeable and dedicated team is always ready to assist, providing personalized recommendations and ensuring a delightful experience from start to finish.

Join our growing community of meat enthusiasts, chefs, and food lovers who trust Lchaimmeats.com for their kosher meat needs. Follow our page to stay updated on new product launches, exciting promotions, and mouthwatering recipes that will inspire your culinary adventures.

Let us take your dining experience to new heights. Visit Lchaimmeats.com today and savor the taste of excellence!

#KosherMeats #QualityMatters #Meat

Name: Nebraska Star Beef
Description: Nebraska Star Beef is a Nebraska based, family owned and operated company dedicated to providing the highest quality, premium angus beef. Our generations of experience and one of a kind process covers every humane aspect of breeding, raising, feeding and shipping that results in an ultimate difference in taste, tenderness and overall quality of beef we produce.

Name: Macro Group Australia
Description:
Macro Group Australia (formerly Macro Meats) was established in 1987 and now controls the world’s largest retail distribution of Australian kangaroo and wild game meat. We are the exclusive supplier to Australia’s major supermarket chains and is a major exporter of premium kangaroo meat.

We have grown to own a collection of companies that includes various premium kangaroo meat brands for retail, food service and export, a luxury leather goods company, a state of the art Adelaide based food and environmental testing laboratory, production facilities, as well as retail pet food and pet treat brands. We ensure nothing is wasted and supports the company’s beliefs in this abundant natural resource and creating a more sustainable way to eat and live.

Name: BVWS - Bundesverband Deutscher Wurst- & Schinkenproduzenten e.V.
Description: BVWS vertritt rund 130 Unternehmen im Bereich der Herstellung von Fleischerzeugnissen.

Name: Baska Cuisine commerciale
Description:
La transformation alimentaire à son meilleur
Située à Victoriaville, au Centre-du-Québec, notre usine réalise la transformation agroalimentaire de différents produits pour une clientèle commerciale. Que ce soit pour la préparation de produits de cuisine, d'aliments pré-transformés, de prêts-à-manger ou pour la sous-traitance de votre marque maison, faites équipe avec Baska!

Name: Discarpe - Carnes selectas
Description:
Somos una distribuidora cárnica que damos servicio a la alta restauración, grandes superficies, hostelería y profesionales cárnicos.
 La esencia de nuestra empresa comenzó hace 30 años con la distribución de productos cárnicos de calidad a profesionales. Tras décadas de trabajo en el sector, hace diez años decidimos dar un paso más creando Discarpe, una marca que se ha consolidado en el ramo como símbolo de carnes selectas con certificación de origen, siendo especialistas en carnes maduradas y cortes especiales. Productos premium de alta gama a medida del profesional.
 
En nuestras nuevas instalaciones de 2.200 metros cuadrados contamos con los más modernos sistemas de control de calidad para garantizar la conservación óptima de cada pieza. Disponemos también de cámaras de maduración y zonas de corte. Un exhaustivo control de selección y clasificación por expertos profesionales avalan nuestra amplia gama de productos gourmet.
 
En Discarpe disponemos de una flota de vehículos propios perfectamente equipados para cubrir la provincia y con agencia para la distribución de todo el territorio nacional en un máximo de 48 horas. Garantizando su entrega en las condiciones óptimas para cada producto y realizando un seguimiento de todos los pedidos.

Name: Meat Quality and Processing Lab
Underwood Meat Company Limited
Description:
One of the UK's largest independent catering butchers
Underwood Meat Company is one of the largest independent catering butchers in the UK and has been operating for almost 50 years.
 
We are owned and managed by our two active partners, who are supported by a skilled team of professionals and directors. The personal touch we have always offered and the trust this has bred in our customers has contributed to our growth on a national level.

Name: Waleem for food Industries
Description: An integrated project of advanced automated slaughterhouses equipped with various production lines including chilled, processed and frozen meat under two brands directed to various target customer segments.

Name: Demuynck Christophe Vleesgroothandel
Description:
Alles begon eind de jaren ’50 toen Walter Demuynck startte met vleesgroothandel ‘Demuynck Walter’ te Kuurne. Wat begon met het kweken van runderen, groeide al snel verder uit naar een vleesgroothandel.

Naarmate het bedrijf verder evolueerde, werd de zaak in 1990 overgedragen aan zijn zoon Christophe Demuynck en vrouw Ingrid, die het bedrijf verder uitbouwden. De activiteiten ontwikkelden zich snel verder met een eigen versnijzaal te Stasegem.  

De ervaring en kennis werden al van kinds af aan overgedragen aan de 3de generatie. Thomas groeide mee op in het bedrijf en leerde al snel alle kneepjes van het vak. Anno 2016 namen Thomas en zijn vrouw Bénédicte dan ook de activiteiten over. Teneinde de kwaliteit van het product, de efficiëntie van het werken en de service naar de klant toe te verbeteren, namen Thomas en Bénédicte de stap om naar Kuurne te verhuizen, op een nieuwe locatie met een nieuw gebouw.

Name: Frigorifico Cuatro Carnes
Description: Comercializamos carne fresca envasada al vacío por el gran Buenos Aires tanto para gastronómicos como particulares con envío a domicilio. Somos productores directos, lo que significa que controlamos toda la cadena productiva. Nuestro trabajo empieza en La Pampa con el engorde de terneras y novillitos de la raza Angus y termina en la puerta de nuestros clientes. Por eso conocemos de primera línea la trazabilidad de nuestra carne y podemos garantizar su calidad.

Name: The Real Meat Society, Prague
Description: The Real Meat Society - the one and only bio/organic butcher shop showcasing best local meat from outdoor reared animals. We care for sustainability, animal welfare and healthy lifestyle. We have the best on offer. For best prices.

Name: Australian Wholesale Meats (Sydney)
Description: Australian Wholesale Meats (AWM) is a Supplier of Superior Wholesale Meat in New South Wales, delivering farm-fresh, sustainable Wagyu, beef, lamb, and pork. Since 2001, we've established exclusive relationships with Australia's top producers, ensuring consistent quality and traceability. Our refrigerated deliveries maintain products below 4°C, guaranteeing freshness upon arrival. Operating from our Prestons facility, we serve clients across NSW with a commitment to excellence.

Name: Van Berkel kip & meer
Description: Wij zijn een Poeliersbedrijf gevestigd in Kaatsheuvel. Dagelijks leveren wij verse kipproducten uit aan slagerijen en instellingen. Heeft u interesse in ons assortiment neem dan vooral contant met ons op!

Name: Distribuidora de carnes Junior´s

Podjetje vodi družina Oblak, ki skrbijo za ohranjanje vrednot družinskega podjetništva, za visoko kakovost surovin ter vrhunski okus izdelkov.

Name: Granjas San Antonio
Description:
CARNE DE CERDO 100% ECOLÓGICA.
Un legado sano, sabroso y sostenible. Libre de antibióticos, herbicidas, pesticidas o fungicidas. 
Para restauración, centros educativos, grupos de consumo, tiendas ecológicas y particulares.
La calidad de la carne depende directamente de la alimentación que ha recibido el animal a lo largo de su vida. Nuestros cerdos sólo se alimentan con cereales y granos ecológicos.
Estamos comprometidos con el medio ambiente, la salud de las personas y por encima de todo, con la calidad. En Granjas San Antonio llevamos toda una vida dedicados a la crianza del cerdo. Más de 50 años buscando la excelencia para ofrecer a nuestros clientes una calidad insuperable. Además, fomentamos el desarrollo rural y generamos nuevos empleos locales.
Hemos mejorado una tradición milenaria.
Desde incluso antes de la llegada de los romanos, Hispania ya era conocida por su vino, su aceite y la calidad de su carne porcina. La llegada de los romanos intensificó la crianza del cerdo, que lo convirtieron en su principal fuente de proteínas. Marco Gavio Apicio, un gastrónomo romano famoso por su gusto refinado, escribió numerosas recetas con el cerdo como gran protagonista. Y el mismísimo Galeno, uno de los padres de la medicina científica, resaltó las propiedades nutritivas de tan delicioso alimento.
Desde entonces, el cerdo ha sido una parte esencial en nuestra alimentación y su crianza se ha ido perfeccionando con el paso de las diferentes culturas que han ido poblando la península ibérica.
Los hermanos García Tejero, propietarios de las Granjas San Antonio, son hoy el máximo exponente de esta tradición milenaria. Desde su niñez trabajaron codo a codo con su padre que les enseñó todos los secretos de la crianza de un cerdo de la máxima calidad. Tras más de 50 años de experiencia en este sector deciden en el año 2000 dar el salto de la explotación convencional a la ecológica, implantando sistemas de producción totalmente sostenibles y ecológicos.

Name: Meatapp
Description:
At MeatApp, we are passionate about providing the finest quality meat products to our valued customers. We are a butcher shop located in Blackheath, Randburg, and we specialize in delivering top-notch meats directly to your doorstep. With the convenience of online platforms such as our website and social media accounts, ordering meat has never been easier.

Our Farm-to-Table Approach

One of the things that sets MeatApp apart is our commitment to a farm-to-table approach. We take great pride in our farm, where we raise and care for our livestock to ensure the highest standards of quality and welfare. By owning and operating our own farm, we have full control over the entire process, from the health and well-being of our animals to the production of premium meat cuts.

Quality and Selection

When it comes to meat, we believe that quality is paramount. That's why we meticulously select the best breeds, provide them with a natural and healthy environment, and follow strict standards throughout the entire production process. Our skilled butchers then expertly prepare and cut the meat to deliver exceptional taste and tenderness.

At MeatApp, we offer a wide variety of meat options to suit every palate and occasion. From succulent steaks and juicy burgers to tender roasts and flavorful sausages, our diverse selection ensures there's something for everyone. We understand that our customers have unique preferences, so we strive to cater to different dietary needs and requirements, including organic, free-range, and grass-fed options.

Convenience and Delivery

We understand the demands of today's fast-paced lifestyle, and that's why we've made it our mission to make your meat shopping experience as convenient as possible. With our user-friendly website and active social media accounts, you can easily browse our product offerings, place your order, and have it delivered right to your doorstep. Our efficient delivery service ensures that you receive your fresh meat on time.

Name: Wild.AF GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Die Wild.AF GmbH & Co. KG ist ein moderner Wildzerlegebetrieb, spezialisiert auf die Verarbeitung von Wildfleisch. Das Unternehmen bietet die Beschaffung, fachgerechte Zerlegung, Verarbeitung und Verpackung von Wild in verschiedenen Schnitten an, die an Restaurants, Händler und Endverbraucher verkauft werden. Wild.AF legt großen Wert auf die nachhaltige Nutzung aller Teile des Tieres, z. B. durch die Verwertung von Nebenprodukten für Tiere, wie Futter und Kausnacks.

Für Jäger bietet Wild.AF umfassende Dienstleistungen, darunter die Abnahme des Wildes, Aufbrech-Service vor Ort und Lohnzerlegung. Das Unternehmen ermöglicht eine transparente, flexible und nachhaltige Vermarktung von Wildfleisch, das als gesunde und umweltfreundliche Alternative zu herkömmlichem Fleisch geschätzt wird. Wild.AF passt Verpackungen und Zuschnitte individuell an Kundenbedürfnisse an und bietet Jägern eine effiziente und sorgenfreie Verwertung ihres Wildes.

Name: Itria Agroalimentari Carbotti
Description:
ITRIA CARBOTTI – Specialisti nella carne, partner nella filiera

Itria Carbotti è un’azienda specializzata nella produzione e distribuzione di carni fresche e prodotti elaborati, con una filiera corta e controllata che serve quotidianamente il territorio di Puglia e Basilicata.

Da oltre un decennio, lavoriamo per offrire soluzioni professionali a GDO, DO, retail, macellerie evolute e ristorazione moderna, con un assortimento che spazia dal prodotto fresco al pronto per essere ricettato.

La nostra forza risiede in tre pilastri:

Origine locale e controllata: selezioniamo solo allevamenti non intensivi, rispettosi del benessere animale.

Standard qualitativi certificati: operiamo in conformità con le normative A.U.S.L., HACCP, ISO 9001 e ISO 14001.

Innovazione nella trasformazione: lo stabilimento è attrezzato con reparti di sezionamento, confezionamento in ATM, laboratori interni di analisi microbiologica e linee dedicate alla gastronomia.

Siamo convinti che la qualità non sia solo una promessa, ma il risultato di un processo rigoroso, costruito giorno dopo giorno, al fianco di chi lavora nel food con serietà e visione.

Itria Carbotti. Dal territorio alla tavola, con coerenza, affidabilità e passione.

Description:
STCFOOD, realtà di Innante Group, sviluppa la filiera dall’allevamento fino al commercio al dettaglio.
Grazie alla rete di allevatori locali e al recente acquisto (2019) dello stabilimento Valriso a Uta (CA), riesce a strutturare un processo di lavorazione, confezionamento e commercializzazione della carne sano e sostenibile.
Ad oggi lo stabilimento di Uta, cuore pulsante dell’Azienda, dà lavoro a più di 100 persone e produce ogni giorno tonnellate di carne selezionata e controllata, che, attraverso la rete logistica del gruppo, vengono smistate alle 200 macellerie presenti nell’isola e nel nord Italia.

Il secondo stabilimento, rilevato nel 2018 a Piacenza, contribuisce all’accelerazione del processo di espansione nel continente che, negli ultimi anni, è in costante crescita.
Parallelamente, Il gruppo si sviluppa all’interno della GDO con 9 supermercati di proprietà in diverse aree geografiche della Sardegna.
La fattibilità del progetto è resa possibile dal comparto logistico che, garantisce sempre con un trasporto accurato e organizzato, la freschezza del prodotto dallo stabilimento ai punti vendita.

Name: PATAGONIA MEAT & CO
Description: A Patagônia Meat & Co é uma Produtora, Importadora e Distribuidora de Carnes Bovinas Angus Certificado, Cordeiros, Batatas e Hamburgueres, com especialização em atender o segmento de Food Service, além do Varejo em geral. Nossa marca é sinônimo de Alta Gastronomia, e nos destacamos pela Qualidade Premium de nossos produtos, provenientes dos melhores fornecedores do Brasil e do mundo.

Name: BAHONGLUNG LIMITED
Description: Available for Beef cuts, Chicken cuts, Chicken paws/feet, MJW, Corn and Sugar Icumsa45 Origin from Brazil.

Name: Fribarreiras
Description:
O frigorífico Fribarreiras foi fundado em 2003, mantém a tradição no abate de bovinos, suínos ovinos e caprinos, com o comércio de carnes para o Brasil e exterior.
Temos como destaque a qualidade dos produtos, garantindo total confiança e reconhecimento dos clientes e consumidores. Hoje, o Fribarreiras continua traçando uma história de sucesso, destacando a ética, a inovação e o compromisso na busca constante por excelência em todos os processos, produtos e serviços. Somos um frigorífico com certificação do SIF, habilitados a exportar e temos como política de qualidade a responsabilidade de fornecer alimentos seguros promovendo melhoria contínua, respeitando o meio ambiente e seguindo todas normas e procedimentos legais.

Name: Perumda Dharma Jaya
Description: Dharma Jaya is a local company owned by the government of DKI Jakarta Province that perform public services in the meat trade and industry. Dharma Jaya is tasked with assisting and supporting the general policies of the Regional Government in the context of food security and improving community welfare, especially animal products and livestock farmers.

Name: Frigorifico Clay S.A.
Description: Frigorifico Clay S.A. is a company based in Uruguay, with its head office in Montevideo. It operates in the Animal Slaughtering and Processing industry.

Name: Hütthaler KG
Description:
Seit bereits 4 Generationen veredeln wir, als Familienbetrieb Hütthaler beste Fleisch-, Wurst- & Schinkenprodukte in Schwanenstadt, an der Grenze zum Salzkammergut. Die Kompetenz unseres Unternehmens liegt in der Erfahrung, der Kreativität, sowie dem Fachwissen unserer Fleischermeister. Durch Tradition, gepaart mit modernster Technik und einer gewissen Portion Liebe zum Detail schaffen wir Qualität die begeistert!

Tradition und Qualität werden bei der Herstellung unserer Fleisch-, Wurst- und Schinkenprodukte großgeschrieben. Somit beziehen wir unser Fleisch hauptsächlich von Bauern aus unserer Umgebung.

Name: Cola Foods LLC
Description: Cola Foods, located in Cranston, RI is a world class manufacturer of high quality meat products. We specialize in a variety of Shaved Meats, Ground Beef, Patties, Italian, Breakfast, and Chicken Sausages. Currently, Cola Foods serves many foodservice and retail customers throughout the East Coast.  Whether it’s Marcello’s, Giovanni’s, Lincoln Brand, Sunnah Halal, or Private Label, quality and consistency is our specialty.

Name: Moldovan Carmangerie
Description:
Moldovan Carmangerie este o companie de familie. 
În 1994 a început cu un mic atelier de carmangerie în curtea casei din Sânnicoară, județul Cluj, a ajuns în prezent la o rețea de 36 de magazine distribuite în județul Cluj și se pregătește pentru o extindere regională.

Name: RC INDO GROUP LIMITED
Description:
RC Indo Group Limited

Your Rwandan Partner for Complete Meat Processing Solutions.


A sister company of PT Arsi Indo Graha Indonesia, RC Indo Group Limited is a leading Rwandan company dedicated to empowering the local meat processing industry. We offer a unique blend of turn-key solutions and expert customization, addressing your needs from the project's inception through to its successful operation.

Our Experience is Your Advantage

30+ Years of Leadership Expertise with Training Programs: Our team is guided by a leader with over 30 years of experience in the meat industry, having personally commissioned over 30 meat processing plants and slaughterhouses across New Zealand, Australia, and Indonesia. This expertise includes developing and delivering impactful training programs.

Proven Global Success: This direct, hands-on experience translates into proven success on a global scale.

Rooted in Rwanda: Our domestic presence ensures a deep understanding of local regulations, market dynamics, and your specific business needs.

Services Tailored to Your Success

Turn-Key Solutions: Leave the complexities to us. We deliver complete packages including design, construction, equipment sourcing, installation, and commissioning.

Customization: We understand your business is unique, and tailor our services to ensure your processing plant aligns perfectly with your requirements and budget.

Industry Leading Equipment-Tailored to You: we source high-quality, reliable equipment from reputable international brands, carefully selected to meet both performance need and your budget.

Project Management Expertise: From start to finish, we manage your project with precision, providing regular updates and timely completion.

Unwavering After-Sales Support: Our team is here to ensure your plant's smooth operation through maintenance, training, and ongoing support.

Name: Mike's Meaty Jerky
Description:
Founded in 2021 in Lebanon, IN.

Mike decided to follow his life-long passion for making (and eating) high quality, hand-crafted beef jerky. It's been fun to grow this and to experience the joy my jerky brings to others who try it.

Name: Coastal Farms and Feeds Pvt Ltd.
Description: Coastal Farms and Feeds Pvt. Ltd., our meticulously designed farm-to-home supply chain delivers the freshest, highest-quality produce directly from our coastal farms to your doorstep. We prioritize sustainable farming practices, state-of-the-art packaging, and efficient cold-chain logistics to maintain optimal freshness and quality. Each step is carefully managed to ensure a farm-fresh experience, making us a trusted leader in coastal agriculture.

Name: Ongole Beef
Description:
Ongole Beef is a Kenyan production and processing company located in Karen selling Premium Aged Beef reared in our farm in Rumuruti Laikipia County. We pride ourselves in raising indigenous cattle coupled with high standards of production ensuring our cattle are healthy and well catered for. This is achieved by having cattle fed with a specially formulated feed ration that provides energy, proteins, vitamins, minerals, roughage and water.

At Ongole Beef, we understand that exceptional beef starts with the finest breeds, the healthiest animals, and the most meticulous care. Our commitment to excellence is evident in every step of our process, from farm to fork. We value transparency and take pride in our traceability system. Every cut of beef can be traced back to its source, giving you peace of mind about the origin and quality of our products.

Our team of expert master butchers skillfully handcrafts each cut of beef to perfection. Their expertise ensures that every piece of meat is tender and succulent meeting the best quality standards resulting in an exceptional product.

Name: Fortunna
Description:
GRUPO FORTUNNA, DESDE 2011.
Comércio, importação, exportação, criação, abate, transformação e distribuição de produtos cárneos de origem bovina.
Em Portugal e no mercado internacional:
Europa, África, Médio Oriente.
Unidades industriais:
Unidade de Braga, Unidade de Alcains,
Unidade de S. Miguel - Açores e Unidade de Faial - Açores.
Operação integrada de transformação, com desmancha,
maturação, corte, corte fino, embalagem, frio (positivo,
negativo e ultracongelado) e toda a logística de distribuição.
Trabalhando com produtos provenientes dos mercados nacional
e internacional (Europa e América do Sul), a marca detém uma
vasta experiência no estabelecimento de ligações entre os melhores produtores e os mais dinâmicos operadores da distribuição.

Name: Brahmagiri Development Society (Malabar Meat)
Description: Welcome to Malabar Meat, the latest venture by Brahmagiri Development Society ( BDS ). Hygienic and high quality buffalo meat, chicken, mutton, and poultry products are processed and packaged at the BDS multi-species meat processing plant located at Manjadi ( Near Sulthan Bathery ) in Wayanad District, Kerala.

Name: The Fabrique Butchery & Meat Processing
Description:
The Fabrique is a boutique butchery  based in Dubai, dedicated to redefining how people experience fresh, high-quality meats and gourmet food.

From our in-house artisan sausages, cold cuts, and premium butchered meats to our chef-crafted deli sandwiches, catering experiences, and fresh meal boxes, everything we create is driven by one mission — to deliver honest food, made with care.

We proudly maintain the Dubai Municipality Grade A Gold Certificate and HACCP certification since our early beginnings, ensuring the highest standards of hygiene, food safety, and operational excellence.

Our business spans across B2C retail, B2B supply, and catering services, serving both individual customers and hospitality partners who value quality, consistency, and innovation


 No preservatives 
 No artificial flavors
 No artificial colorants
 No soy & wheat  Halal 
 Proudly produced in the UAE
We deliver To All Emirates
NO MSG.. clean meat, Free range chicken, Grass fed meat

In our business we have 2 main Elements 

1) sourcing 
We source all our meat from the leading free range producers 

We choose suppliers who share same passion for quality meat, 

2)Preparation/processing   
We source premium quality meat and we treat it with respect when cutting, slicing, and trimming to ensure you get the best final product.

All our smallgoods and ready meals are prepared in-house by our team, using our premium meat and the highest quality, fresh ingredients. We do everything we develop dishes everyday to make our customers happy

Name: Rayban Foods Private Limited
Description: Rayban Group is leading group of companies, which are engaged in the production and processing of variety of meat products. Rayban Group has wide reputation in offering a completely hygienic range of meat products.

Name: HH Meat Factory
Description:
HH Meat Factory is a company started in 1999 as HH Bacon Suppliers. The company mainly further process and distribute meat and cheese products in the hospitality industry in Cape Town. The company does over 300 products and is proud of its adaptability and service-driven approach. HH Meat Factory also follow a D2C channel through a Factory shop (Under its own brand name) and through a online meat delivery store Meatmonthly.co.za which is a brand of HH Meat Factory. HH Meat Factory has a subsidiary in Gobabis, Namibia; Nam Meat Factory.

Nam Meat Factory was set up in 2023 and is also a Further Processing Meat Production facility, focusing mainly on Venison and Free-Range Beef. The company owns a brand, Omaheke Biltong. The Omaheke Biltong pouch is designed and made for the hope of obtaining an export market to South Africa and other countries.  (www.namibianmeat.com)

Name: Inversiones Avicentro SAS
Description: Somos creadores de fuentes de valor para todos aquellos que interactúen con Avicentro aportando a una sociedad sostenible.

Name: Wech Geflügel GmbH
Description:
Huhnfassbar, aber wahr: Herausragende Qualität seit 1958.

Kundengerecht
Mit der Marke WECH bieten wir echte Qualität vom Bauernhof durch die Vorgabe strenger Produktions- und Organisationsrichtlinien.

Artgerecht
Alle Mäster, die unsere Hühner und Puten liefern, sind bäuerliche Geflügelmäster, die bei ihren Tieren strenge Richtlinien in Bezug auf Haltung, Fütterung und Transport erfüllen müssen.

Zukunftsgerecht
Entwicklung, Produktion und Vertrieb der Produkte berücksichtigen den Nachhaltigkeitsaspekt der Umwelt- und Ressourcenschonung.

Bei WECH schätzen wir nicht nur unsere gefiederten FreundInnen, sondern auch die langjährigen Partnerschaften, die auf gemeinsamen Werten und festen Prinzipien krallen – echte Teamarbeit mit Herz und Feder!

„Soziale Prinzipien in humanitärer, ethischer und moralischer Hinsicht sind uns Anliegen und Verpflichtung gleichzeitig. Wir fördern sie im Rahmen unserer Möglichkeiten.”
- Geschäftsführer DI Dr. Karl Feichtinger & DI Paul Pötz

Name: Flid Gods - Midt i naturen, tæt på byen
Description:
Flid Gods ligger virkelig smukt og naturskønt som nabo til Roskilde dyreskueplads med Himmelsøen og Roskilde by lige indenfor rækkevidde
.
På gården har vi en lille gårdbutik, Flid Gårdbutik. Her sælger vi oksekød fra vores eget Skotsk Højlandskvæg, samt en lang række andre ting. Alt sammen hjemme avlet, dyrket og fremstillet. Smag bl.a på vores øl fra Darup Bryghus, hjemmelavet pesto, nutella, sundt slik, brød og meget andet. Kig forbi og køb en kop kaffe og lidt mad på vejen Vi giver gerne en rundtur så du bl.a ved eget syn kan nyde vores skønne dyr.

Name: Allfein Feinkost GmbH & Co. KG
Description: Die Allfein Feinkost GmbH&Co.KG gehört als Unternehmen mit Marken wie WIESENHOF und GREEN LEGEND zu einer der bedeutensten Unternehmensgruppen der Agrar- und Ernährungswirtschaft. An unseren fünf Standorten in Deutschland beschäftigen wir rund 1300 Mitarbeitende und sind auf die Herstellung und den Vertrieb von vorgegarten Geflügelspezialitäten sowie vergleichbaren veganen Convenience-Produkten für den Lebensmitteleinzelhandel, Großverbraucher und die Systemgastronomie spezialisiert.

Name: Provit Foods Private Limited
Description:
Founded in 2005, Ideal Chicken has grown into a leading poultry company in Dakshina Kannada. Committed to quality and customer satisfaction, we are a trusted provider of premium chicken products. Our success stems from vertical integration and dedication to every aspect of poultry production.

Operating our own breeding farms in Belur and Kunigal, we ensure a consistent supply of high-quality eggs. These eggs are hatched at our hatcheries, producing over 3 lakh chicks weekly. We work with more than 650 farmers across Moodbidri, Uppinangady, and Kundapura, ensuring the healthy growth of the chicks.

To deliver live birds to the market, we have established reliable wholesale lines. Our state-of-the-art processing plants in Mangalore, Udupi, and Payyanur handle around 10,000 birds per day, maintaining the highest hygiene and quality standards. Our processed chicken is supplied to a network of 20+ retail outlets, offering live chicken, Halal options, masalas, and processed foods.

Ideal Chicken caters to the needs of hotels, restaurants, and catering companies. We handle bulk orders, providing a dependable source of fresh and processed chicken. Our dedicated mobile app, "Ideal Chicken," available on the Google Play Store, allows customers to conveniently browse, order, and schedule deliveries.

With a vision to establish a lasting presence in South India, Ideal Chicken maintains a comprehensive approach to poultry production. Our high-tech setup and up-to-date software implementation ensure efficiency across all departments. Join us in experiencing the quality and freshness that only Ideal Chicken can offer.

Name: Agro-Industrial Group of Companies «Dniprovska»
Description:
Producing high-quality chicken since 1977.

«Dniprovska» is one of the largest producers in the agro-industrial sector of Ukraine. We are the second largest among poultry companies and among the 5 largest chicken meat producers. Our group of companies includes such brands as TM "Znatna Kurka" and TM "Ulas". We export our products to over 50 countries across Europe, Africa, Asia, and the Persian Gulf region. 

The main activities of the Dniprovska group of companies are:

- Poultry breeding. We ensure controlled and comfortable conditions for chicken growth and humane methods of slaughtering chickens.
- Plant growing. We grow wheat, sunflower, peas, winter rape, and barley on 15,500 hectares of fields.
- Processing of meat products. We produce chilled and frozen packaged chicken meat.
- Processing of industrial crops, including sunflower oil, sunflower meal, soybean meal, and soybean oil.

We adhere to the highest quality and safety standards in our work. Most of our processes are automated and the equipment we use is made by the leading European manufacturers.

Our enterprise provides a full cycle of production, from grain to chicken. This gives us full control over all stages of production, which makes the quality of our products highly competitive. Feed recipes developed by our technologists result in meat with high taste characteristics.

Join our world of taste and quality!

Name: Embutidos 2 Irmãos
Description: Fundada em Março de 1984, quando dois sócios e irmãos decidiram criar uma das marcas mineiras que é sinônimo de qualidade e pontualidade em suas entregas, a 2 Irmãos vem se mantendo no mercado com produtos analisados criteriosamente pelo I.M.A (Instituto Mineiro de Agropecuária) - S.I.E.

Name: Fleisch-und Wurstwaren Schmalkalden GmbH Thüringen
Description: Seit 1990 steht Thüringer Landstolz für traditionell handwerkliche Fleisch- und Wursterzeugung gepaart mit innovativen Herstellungsverfahren. Mit mehr als 350 Mitarbeitenden in über 30 Filialen, Produktion, Logistik und Verwaltung prägen wir die Thüringer Tischkultur und erfinden uns als Betrieb stetig neu. Produkte höchster Qualität der Marke „Thüringer Landstolz“, welche im LEH, Filialnetz, international und online vertrieben werden, machen seither ihrem und unserem Namen alle Ehre.

Name: Enderun Food BV (Qebabs)
Description:
Enderun Food BV has become over the years a household name in the production of high quality Halal meat products in the Netherlands. The secret of our company lies within the ambition  to provide the customers high-quality, exclusively products with the best ingredients. Sustainability and quality are two important core concepts within the business operations of our company. We are continuously working on implementing higher product safety and product quality standards.

We focus on the wishes and needs of our customers. We offer an extensive range of kebabs for every target group.

In addition to the extensive product range of Enderun Food BV, we also offer customers the opportunity to create their own label (Private Label). 

Our private label service is an ideal opportunity for suppliers who want to offer quality products under their own brand.

Name: Saaras Group
Description:
At Saaras Group, we are dedicated to delivering premium-quality meat products through state-of-the-art processing techniques and a commitment to excellence. Established with a vision to revolutionize the meat industry, we specialize in the processing and distribution of a wide range of meats, ensuring top-notch hygiene standards and meticulous attention to taste and nutrition.

Our facility is equipped with cutting-edge technology that allows us to handle  chicken meat. From initial processing to packaging, every step adheres to rigorous quality control measures to guarantee freshness, safety, and consistency in every product.

As a customer-centric organization, we prioritize transparency and traceability throughout our supply chain. We source our raw materials from trusted suppliers who share our values of ethical practices and sustainable farming. This commitment not only ensures the highest quality standards but also reflects our dedication to environmental stewardship.

Whether you're a retailer, distributor, or food service provider, partnering with Saaras Group means access to reliable, hygienic, and flavorful meat products that meet the diverse needs of today's consumers. Our team of experienced professionals is passionate about delivering exceptional service and products that exceed expectations.

Join us in shaping the future of meat processing, where quality meets innovation at every stage. Discover the difference with Saaras Group—where every cut counts.
Location: Dhumabhata Road, Meher Para, Patnagarh, Balangir, Odisha

Name: Beefcor Meat Suppliers - Pty Ltd
Description:
Beefcor Meat Suppliers is a company created to enter the Beef market (Local and export) with the vision to profitably provide superior Namibian meat products to selected customers. The mission is to position Beefcor Abattoir as the preferred supplier of export quality meat products on the local and selected export markets. To achieve this Beefcor will:
1. Provide the local market with export quality, graded carcasses and other processed meat products.
2. Provide High Quality vacuum and frozen cuts to customer specifications on the regional market.
3. Secure a market share in other premium export markets.

Name: Carniprod Tulcea - parte din Scandia Food
Description:
Carniprod, societate comercială cu capital integral privat, a fost înființată în anul 1993, de către cinci asociați, iar acum este cunoscută la nivel național, datorită preparatelor gustoase din carne, realizate după rețete originale și cu multă dăruire.
Valoarea pe care am considerat-o cea mai importantă și prioritară este, de departe, respectul pentru consumatori. De aici, derivă și obiectivul major al unității, și anume menținerea calității constante ale produselor.
Compania a evoluat constant și susținut, iar astăzi este cunoscută la nivel naţional atât pentru calitatea produselor, cât şi pentru nivelul vânzărilor în decursul celor peste 30 ani de funcţionare.
Datorită managementului modern, performanţele economico - financiare ale societăţii au urmat o traiectorie constantă iar în prezent, Compania doreşte extinderea pieţei de desfacere în cât mai multe orașe din România.

Name: Carne e Salumi di Pregio Gualano
Description: Carni frollate ad alto grado di marezzatura, Salumi di Pregio e preparati gastronomici di carne selezionata, pronti da cuocere.

Name: FRIGORIFICO FAENADORES UNIDOS
Description: Somos un empresa dedicada a la faena de bovinos y su posterior comercializacion en medias reses y cuartos. Tambien comercializamos todos los subproductos derivados. Brindamos servicio de faena y poseemos tambien faena propia.

Name: Brunson Meat Company
Description: Brunson Meat Co., founded by Executive Chef Justin Brunson, offers the finest quality dry-aged meats using an innovative process for curing and dry-aging that's as diverse as it is delicious: The Noble Mold Dry-Aging Process.  Starting with USDA Prime beef, heritage breed pork, and Colorado Lamb, each piece of meat undergoes an aging process with a refined mix of noble molds, bestowing it with subtle notes of brown butter, popcorn, and a rich, premium flavor profile matured over a minimum of 35 days.  Brunson Meat Co. also offers the finest quality uncured, chemical free bacon using old-world techniques to dry cure. No junk, never pumped, highest quality ingredients. Available in retail packs and layout and slab formats for food service.

Name: PEMA Meat Group
Description:
The PEMA Meat Group is an expert in the entire beef processing chain. True to our motto "from pasture to plate", we monitor the processing chain from A to Z, from the purchase of the cattle to slaughtering and delivery of the cut product to butchers, meat traders, catering businesses and large-scale catering establishments.

The PEMA Meat Group comprises 3 companies: the slaughterhouse PEGRI, the cutting plant P&M Eifeler Fleischvertrieb and the transport company Eurobetail. We supply both retail and wholesale.

Name: I9Lafões
Description:
I9Lafões is a Portuguese meat company specializing in delivering exceptional culinary experiences. With a focus on quality, we offer a wide range of meat products that reflect the rich flavors and traditions of Portugal.

OMEUTALHO, our premium meat stores, provide a diverse selection of top-quality cuts, catering to discerning customers. With a commitment to sourcing the finest meats, OMEUTALHO ensures a memorable shopping experience for delightful meals.

Vó Elisa, our renowned brand, represents our dedicated factory producing traditional Portuguese smoked products. From mouthwatering sausages to delectable alheiras, Vó Elisa captures the authentic essence of Portuguese cuisine, honoring our culinary heritage.

Name: INICIATIVAS COMERCIALES DADYMA SL
Description:
INICIATIVAS COMERCIALES DADYMA S.L 
FRESH&FROZEN OFFALS PRODUCTS CUTTING PLANT

Name: Agra's Alba Iulia - parte din Scandia Food
Description:
Suntem un business românesc specializat în procesarea cărnii. Încă din anul 2000, oferim clienților noștri mezeluri făcute cum trebuie, ca-n Ardeal. Livrăm produse cu adevărat oneste. Verificăm fiecare etapă și controlăm extrem de bine calitatea.

Avem o producție diversificată și bine structurată, care satisface toate gusturile, dar mai ales aduce o notă aparte pe piața produselor din carne, prin calitate și originalitate. Producem peste 80 de produse individuale, structurate pe trei game. De la produse crud-uscate, preparate prin combinarea metodelor tradiționale, cu tehnologii de producție de specialitate, la produse procesate, fierte și afumate, preparate la cele mai înalte standarde de calitate și siguranță alimentară.

Ne adresăm partenerilor informați și dornici să ofere clienților lor produse deosebite, proaspete și superioare calitativ, preparate cu atenție și grijă, în condiții care îndeplinesc normele europene de securitate a producției alimentare.

Name: Goloso Carnes
Description:
Somos una compañía colombiana con más de 20 años de trayectoria, experta en la producción y comercialización de proteína animal de alta calidad (Cerdo, Res y Pollo).

Nacidos en el corazón del Valle del Cauca, en Goloso Carnes hemos consolidado un modelo de Integración Vertical que nos permite garantizar inocuidad, estandarización y suministro constante desde el origen hasta la mesa de los colombianos.

Nuestra Promesa de Valor: Nutrición con Alma de Campo.
Trabajamos cada día para transformar el sector cárnico, ofreciendo soluciones integrales que van desde cortes primarios para la Industria, el Canal Moderno y el sector HORECA, hasta productos de valor agregado para el consumidor final a través de nuestras líneas especializadas:

• Goloso Parrilla: Cortes premium seleccionados.
• Goloso Express: Soluciones prácticas y porcionadas.
• Salsamentaria: Embutidos con sabor tradicional.

Contamos con un equipo humano profesional, comprometido con la excelencia, y una infraestructura operativa que nos permite abastecer el mercado nacional bajo los más altos estándares de calidad (HACCP).

En Goloso Carnes, no solo vendemos alimentos; construimos confianza y nutrimos el futuro de Colombia.

Name: Glorius
Description:
Vlees, echt van bij ons. Met een glorieuze smaak.

Dat is waar de Glorius voor staat, en met de toevoeging van Vleeswaren Laeremans aan onze familie versterken we dit engagement nog verder.

Laeremans is geen gewoon charcuteriebedrijf; het heeft sinds 1950 zijn sporen verdiend in fijne vleeswaren. Hun assortiment, bestaande uit meer dan vijftig verleidelijke producten, heeft de harten van fijnproevers veroverd en staat synoniem voor vakmanschap en traditionele smaak.

Wij kijken ernaar uit om samen met het getalenteerde team van Vleeswaren Laeremans te bouwen aan een nog glorieuzer toekomst.

Name: FREASA
Description: FREASA está en busca de personal apasionados y talentosos para unirse a nuestro equipo dinámico. Somos una empresa comprometida con la excelencia y la innovación, y estamos emocionados de incorporar nuevos miembros que compartan nuestra visión y entusiasmo.

Name: Campofrio Food Group Deutschland GmbH
Description:
Die Campofrio Food Group

Mit seinen 8 Ländergesellschaften, über 8.000 Mitarbeitern und einem jährlichen Umsatz von ca. 2 Mrd. Euro ist die in Madrid beheimatete Campofrio Food Group eines der führenden fleischverarbeitenden Unternehmen in Europa. Wir produzieren und vertreiben Produkte, die den höchsten Ansprüchen gerecht werden. Das breite Portfolio umfasst originale und authentische Spezialitäten-Sortimente aus Spanien, Frankreich, Portugal, Italien und den Beneluxstaaten. Die Produktion in den 25 Werken garantiert eine flächendeckende Erhältlichkeit in den Kernmärkten Europas.

www.campofriofoodgroup.com

Als Teil der mexikanischen SIGMA Unternehmensgruppe, ist die Campofrio Food Group verantwortlich für den Geschäftsbereich Europa.

www.sigma-alimentos.com

In Deutschland verantwortet die Campofrio Food Group Deutschland GmbH aus dem nordrheinwestfälischen Ratingen den Vertrieb und das Marketing vornehmlich der Marken AOSTE und Campofrio. Hier befinden sich lokale Teams aus den Bereichen Sales, Marketing, Supply Chain, Accounting und Quality Management unter einem Dach. Mit einer optimalen Distribution, einer hochwertigen Warenpräsentation und ganzheitlichen Produkt- und Vermarktungskonzepten sind unsere Produkte sprichwörtlich in aller Munde.

Name: Alhalal
Description:
We are ALHALAL, a premier Indian company in retail, wholesale, and export of premium Lamb/Goat Meat, backed by a 100-year legacy.

Our journey began in Ramnad, Tamil Nadu, with Syed Muhammed Qureshi, whose vision laid the foundation for our meat business. His son, Hameed Abdul Khader, a master chef trained in Kerala and Sri Lanka, brought culinary excellence into the fold. This rich knowledge was passed to Mr. Sadiq Ali, who modernized our processing and mentored young chefs—making ALHALAL a name synonymous with taste and quality.

We ensure the highest food safety through Govt-approved slaughterhouses, with every batch undergoing anti- and post-mortem checks by certified veterinarians.

Today, we proudly serve 5-star hotels, hypermarkets, online meat brands, and top restaurants across India—Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, and more.

Now, we are building a Goat/Lamb ecosystem—a tech-driven platform connecting shepherds directly to B2B buyers, eliminating price fluctuations and ensuring traceability through AI and blockchain.

Your Partner in Excellence — ALHALAL

Name: Berger-Schinken
Description: Seit 1890 widmet sich das in Sieghartskirchen ansässige – nunmehr in vierter und fünfter Generation geführte – Familienunternehmen Berger Schinken mit großer Leidenschaft dem Handwerk der Schinkenherstellung ebenso wie der Produktion feinster Wurstwaren und Fleischspezialitäten.

Name: Ruppenthal Embutidos
Description: Os embutidos Ruppenthal, desde sua criação, vêm se desenvolvendo cada vez mais, mantendo a originalidade e a paixão em seus produtos. Buscando mostrar aos consumidores que é possível manter tradição, preservando a qualidade, seus produtos carregam mais do que sabor, carregam histórias. Com um começo difícil, no ano de 1992, usando um acanhado espaço físico e muita força de vontade, um jovem casal deu início a empresa nos fundos de sua casa, na cidade de Picada Café-RS. Depois de muito trabalho e persistência, o produto começou a ser bem aceito pelos consumidores locais e a dar resultado. Com isso, a ampliação do espaço físico fez-se necessária.
Location: Picada Café, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: KARAMA MEAT PROCESSING LLC
Description:
Karama Meat Processing is a world class export oriented plant in the meat industry. We produce safe wholesome meat and meat products that are of the highest quality and standard for domestic  foodservice and International Consumers. Also processer of, beef and chicken value added meats. Co-packer of private brands. We ensure meeting statutory and regulatory requirements and food safety requirements of ours consumers. Accordingly we meet world export standard and other benchmark like ISO (HACCP Inclusive), and HALAL certifications. We offer Halal, and Superior Quality meat of Chicken, Cattle, Goat and Sheep.

We Believe in Maintain Quality Standard to Ensure Consistency, Acceptable Quality and Confidence In The Products And Services.

Name: Oasis Group
Description: At Oasis, our legacy of excellence in Bangladesh is a source of immense pride. Since our inception in 2003, we have consistently set new benchmarks across various industries, etching an indelible mark on the landscape of entrepreneurship in the country. Our unwavering commitment to excellence has propelled us into the trusted realm of partnerships with some of the world’s leading companies, particularly in sectors as vital as HR Training & Recruitment, Project Logistic Support Services (PLSS), Agro Projects Services, and Real Estate Development.

Name: Alimentos Schwencke
Description:
Alimentos Schwencke SpA; 
fabrica alimentos basados en recetas y tradiciones alemanas desde 1950, cuando nuestro fundador, Ernesto Schwencke, descendiente de alemanes, comenzó a fabricar productos según sus recetas familiares.
Desde ahí y hasta hoy, continuamos produciendo alimentos de alta calidad, premium, hechos 100% de carnes y materias primas cuidadosamente seleccionadas, bajo procesos que buscan mantener el sabor y calidad artesanal. 
Nuestra empresa está enfocada en elaborar productos artesanales Premium lo que nos diferencia de las empresas más industrializadas, permitiéndonos entregar un producto de características y sabor diferente.
El ahumado, que es parte de muchos de nuestros productos, sigue siendo de Madera Frutal de Origen, dándole un sabor especial y diferenciador respecto de otras marcas.

Name: Master Proteins
Description:
Founded in 2020, MasterProteins is a prominent Halal Meat Exporter with a global reach, setting the standard for the meat industry in Pakistan. Committed to upholding the values of Islamic and Halal principles, we ensure that our meat processing follows 100% certified Halal slaughtering methodologies at every stage. Our mission is to deliver exceptionally tender and fresh halal meat from Pakistan, infused with distinctive flavors, to customers worldwide.

Equipped with state-of-the-art facilities, our dedicated team takes pride in meeting the highest standards of quality and hygiene, enabling us to provide premium halal meat to discerning customers across the globe. MasterProteins has obtained all requisite approvals, accreditations, and certifications from relevant government ministries, underscoring our commitment to compliance and excellence.

As esteemed commercial partners, we collaborate with renowned entities such as Fauji Meat Limited, Nawal Meats, and Abedin International Pvt Ltd, further reinforcing our reputation as a trusted and reliable player in the halal beef industry. At MasterProteins, we remain steadfast in our pursuit of delivering the finest halal meat products, making us a preferred choice for customers seeking uncompromising quality and adherence to Islamic principles.

Name: Tranzit-Food Kft.
Description:
A Tranzit Csoport 1990 decemberében családi vállalkozásként indult Tranzit-Ker Zrt. néven. A debreceni székhelyű Tranzit-Csoport sovány víziszárnyas – kacsa, liba – tenyésztésével, csirkeneveléssel, valamint ezek feldolgozásával foglalkozik. A Tranzit-Food Kft. az élelmiszeripari és kereskedelmi tevékenységet végzi. 
A cégcsoport évi 2 millió libát, 9 millió kacsát és 15 millió csirkét nevel fel, illetve dolgoz fel saját telephelyein, vágóhídjain. Termékeink Japántól egészen Kanadáig széles körben elérhetőek. Világszerte a legnagyobb kereskedelmi láncok üzleteibe szállítja exportra friss, illetve fagyasztott termékeit. A cégcsoport az alapoktól építkezve, a folyamatos fejlesztéseknek és a nemzetközi tapasztalatok, módszerek gyors átvételének köszönhetően vált a víziszárnyas ágazat meghatározó szereplőjévé.

The Tranzit Group started as a family business in December 1990 under the name of Tranzit-Ker Zrt. Tranzit-Csoport, located in Debrecen, deals with the breeding and processing of lean waterfowl - ducks and geese - and raising chickens. Tranzit-Food Kft. carries out food industry and commercial activities.
Tranzit Food processes 2 million geese, 9 million ducks and 15 million chickens per year at our poultry farms and slaughterhouses. Our products are widely available from Japan to Canada. We deliver our fresh and frozen products for export to the stores of the largest commercial chains worldwide. The company has built from the ground up and became a key member of the sector due to the continuous developement and international experiences and methods.

Name: Frigorífico Resbeef
Description:
Ubicados en la ciudad de Tandil, contamos con producción propia y prestamos servicio a terceros.
Nos dedicamos a la cría de hacienda, traslado, faena, desposte, comercialización y reparto de carne bovina, ovina y porcina, bajo las más estrictas normas de calidad.

Name: Harry Smit 'De Marktslager'
Description:
PUUR EN (H)EERLIJK VLEES

De Marktslager … een begrip in Groningen en omstreken. Van een mooi stuk rund tot bekroonde vleesproducten; onze klanten waarderen ons om de kwaliteit en eerlijkheid van het vlees. Wij vertellen u graag meer over ons familiebedrijf en de unieke werkwijze die wij als slager op de markt hanteren. Maak kennis met De Marktslager en weet wat u eet!

Name: SIGMA KREAS
Description:
Sigma Kreas es un holding empresarial Navarro cuyo propósito consiste en la producción y comercialización de carne de cerdo. Nuestra estructura agrupa a varias empresas clave, que incluyen Agropecuaria Obanos, Agropecuaria del Pirineo, Cárnicas Iruña y Transporci, cada una especializada en diferentes aspectos del ciclo productivo, desde la cría y engorde hasta el procesamiento y distribución de carne porcina. La integración vertical nos permite garantizar un control total sobre cada fase del proceso productivo.
Con más de 250,000 cerdos procesados anualmente y una capacidad de duplicar la producción sin grandes inversiones adicionales, Sigma Kreas apunta un gran potencial y se consolida como un referente en sostenibilidad, eficiencia y calidad. Adoptamos soluciones innovadoras como fábricas de pienso con autoconsumo fotovoltaico y modernas instalaciones de despiece que nos permiten personalizar productos según las demandas del cliente.

En Sigma Kreas, combinamos más de 40 años de experiencia con un enfoque de crecimiento responsable, impulsado por la sostenibilidad y el compromiso con el bienestar animal, contribuyendo de manera positiva tanto en el sector agroalimentario como a los hábitats medioambientales y sociales donde operamos.

Name: ESRO Food Group USA
Description:
Welcome to the Esro Food Group. A proud partnership between the Rooijackers and Fayman family combining over more than a 100 years of experience in global meat processing. We service our clients across the globe in their demand for high quality affordable animal proteins. We operate own production facilities in Ocenia, Africa, India, the US and Europe where we offer a wide range of products in beef, pork, chicken and lamb and provide solutions for the feed, food and pharma industry.

Our family values are incorporated in our companies DNA with a long term vision and strategical partnerships with our clients and suppliers. We, together with our 300 employees, strive to make a difference.

We look forward to meeting you!

Name: Mermax
Description: Mermax, un distributeur alimentaire et grossiste au Saguenay–Lac-Saint-Jean, offre ses services autant aux particuliers qu'aux restaurateurs et instances publiques. Nous sommes le seul distributeur régional à tenir un stock de produits frais et congelés dans la région. Nos aliments sont tous sélectionnés avec soin et sont aussi frais que savoureux.

Name: APK Indigo
Description:
Agroindustrial Complex Indigo has been specializing in big and small wholesale supplies of frozen meat, fish, offal, and semi-finished domestic goods to chain shops on a federal, regional, and municipal scale since 2016.
Agroindustrial Complex Indigo features two manufacturing facilities for cutting, processing, storing, and packaging frozen meat, meat offal, fish, shellfish, and semi-finished goods.

The meat manufacturing plant ("Lyuberetsky") is located in the Moscow region of Lyubertsy.

The Noginsk fish-processing facility is located on the grounds of the "Bogorodsky Khladokombinat" in the Moscow region.

The company's distinguishing traits are: responsible and exact fulfillment of duties accepted, experienced and qualified staff

Name: Pak Meat Company
Description:
Pak Meat provides fresh, premium quality beef, mutton & chicken meat - along with high-street restaurant style steak cuts.

Order fresh, healthy & hygienic meat now!

Name: LOT 29
Description:
Not Prime as you know it. Prime as it should be. 
 
At LOT 29, we’ve raised the standard of beef. Every cut delivers what chefs demand most—rich marbling, bold taste, and unmatched tenderness—crafted with precision, consistency, and purpose. 
 
We start with Charolais cattle, chosen for their superior genetics. Then, unlike standard Angus programs, we feed nearly twice as long, giving time for flavor and marbling to develop to their fullest. The result is beef with depth, character, and consistency that chefs can count on plate after plate. 
 
This is not about hype or shortcuts. It’s about an unwavering commitment to quality, forged over decades, and built for those who know the difference. 
 
We don’t follow the rules. We raise the bar. With LOT 29, Premium beef finally tastes like it should.
