Name: True Wilderness GmbH
Description:
Die True Wilderness GmbH mit Sitz im niedersächsischen Friesoythe ist der Spezialist, wenn es um Dry Aged Fleisch geht. Dabei steht das Unternehmen für beste Ware ausschließlich handverlesener deutscher Tiere.

In speziell konzipierten Reiferäumen wird handverlesenes Rind-, Kalb- und Schweinefleisch zu Fleischspezialitäten der obersten Güteklasse weiterveredelt. Nach punktgenauer Reifung werden diese Stücke dann durch viel Handarbeit zu Steakköstlichkeiten weiterverarbeitet, wie man sie wohl nur in Friesoythe finden kann. Traditionelles Handwerk, beste Qualität und Nachhaltigkeit sind unser Anspruch.

Das Unternehmen beliefert deutschlandweit eine Vielzahl von Kunden aus den Bereichen Großhandel, Hotellerie und Gastronomie.

Name: G. Van Landschoot & Zonen N.V.
Description: G. Van Landschoot & Zonen N.V. is een dynamisch en internationaal georiënteerde onderneming. Samen met onze werknemers slachten, versnijden en verkopen wij varkens en varkensvlees. We transporteren levende dieren en vlees, voorzien in diepvriesopslag en exploiteren een vleeshal/slagerij. De Vleeshalle belevert horecabedrijven, scholen en instellingen, maar ook iedere particulier kan gewoon in de slagerij kopen.

Name: Empacadora Rosarito
Description:
Desde 1955 el liderazgo de una familia comprometida con ponerle sabor a la vida de los bajacalifornianos y sonorenses nos permitió conquistar el mercado del noroeste mexicano aún ante los embates de los grandes competidores nacionales.

Empacadora Rosarito, consolidada como una de las empresas de alimentos con más arraigo en la región ha crecido su catálogo y profesionalizado su producción para satisfacer la demanda y cumplir los gustos de un público en constante cambio y evolución.

En los hogares, las cocinas industriales e institucionales, los restaurantes, en los puestos callejeros y en cada celebración familiar la presencia y la preferencia de nuestros productos de marca Rosarito es una constante que se ha vuelto tradición para tres generaciones.

Consolidados en lo administrativo, productivo, organizacional, mercadológico y humano nos planteamos un futuro de crecimiento y conquista de nuevos públicos y mercados a paso firme. 

Cada nuevo producto del catálogo, cada nueva ruta de distribución y cada nuevo punto en el mapa reafirma nuestra filosofía de trabajo y nuestra propuesta de valor: en Rosarito, sabemos de sabor.

Name: CARMONTI S.A. - Indústria de Carnes do Montijo
Description: CARMONTI - INDUSTRIA DE CARNES DO MONTIJO, S.A. is a company based out of Montijo, Setúbal, Portugal.

Description:
Welcome to Kethi Goat, the number one source for all different goat meat parts. We're dedicated to giving you the very best of Goat Meat with a focus on dependability, customer service and uniqueness.

Kethi Goat has come a long way from its beginnings in KPHB. When we first started out, our passion was to provide customers with fresh meat . We now serve customers all places of Hyderabad , and are thrilled to be a part of the fair trade wing of the meat industry.

Today we still sell live goats, carcass to restaurants. The pool of handpicked quality goats is the most precious reserve. We help out customers throughout Hyderabad to get the best pricing on the Goat Meat

 To make a solid contribution to Kenya's meat export potential by offering high quality meat products, superior service, and dependability to Kenyan companies supplying the international market with meat, even as we enhance our own local and export meat distribution capacity.

Name: Meat & Livestock Classification (MLC)
Description: Meat and Livestock Commercial Services Ltd (trading as Meat & Livestock Classification - MLC), established in April 2006, is a pivotal player in the UK meat and livestock industry, continuing the legacy of the Meat Livestock Commission (MLC) from 1967. MLC specialises in providing independent authentication and classification services for carcases, crucial for efficient livestock trading and herd improvement. Our approach, in line with EU standards, involves detailed assessment of carcase characteristics and monitoring carcase presentation, ensuring fair and unbiased valuation in the industry. Upholding the "Quality Standard for the Delivery of Carcase Classification Services in Great Britain," MLC is committed to transparency, trust, and consistency, benefiting the entire supply chain, including both farmers and processors.

Name: Lonki Food Group
Description:
Lonki Food Group imports, processes and distributes delicious food products from source to plate: High-quality meat products, prepared meals and delicious
specialties.

Name: Meat Giant UK
Description:
At Meat Giant, we take pride in supplying the premium quality Halal meat from our state-of-the-art meat processing infrastructure that produces the highest quality meat products for local and international markets. Whether you’re a hotel, caterer, restaurant, food manufacturer school or butcher, our commitment remains the same: to provide you with premium meat products that meet the highest standards.

We are dedicated to supplying our customers by ensuring that we not only meet expectations but exceed them. We aim to add value to every business we connect with through a long-term partnership approach, which has been the key to our growth & success in all the markets that we involve ourselves in.

Our experience and in-depth knowledge of the Halal meat industry, as well as a proven track record and an extensive network, make us not only a trustworthy partner, it makes us passionate about working with you to meet your requirements on time, every time. Through our procurement, production, quality assurance, sales and marketing, shipping and logistics, our team is 100% dedicated to supplying the premium high quality Halal meat, with year-round availability and competitive pricing.

Name: Konink Hondenvlees
Description:
Konink, heerlijk hondenvlees met respect voor dier en natuur.

Konink Hondenvlees is een waar familiebedrijf. We zijn gedreven om onze klanten het beste en diervriendelijkste hondenvlees te leveren.

Onze vleeshonden zijn biologisch, lokaal en krijgen veel ruimte. In de zomer laten we ze buiten vrij rondrennen.

Wij houden van onze honden, en dat proef je! 

Honden procent lekker!

Name: Empacadora Murgati
Description: Somos una empresa mexicana con más de 40 años en el mercado. Dedicada a la elaboración de carnes frías y embutidos de la más alta calidad; mismos que son comercializados en los canales de autoservicio, mayoreo y food service.

Name: Provincial Food Group
Description:
Since the 1960s, when the company was known as Scorpio Meats – PROVINCIAL FOOD GROUP has been producing safe, premium meat for domestic and export markets, and for the food manufacturing sector.

Now under the leadership of former owner, Tom Paterson and Mark Morley and with the backing of large meat and livestock industry investors, PROVINCIAL FOOD GROUP is a growing business in the Goulburn Valley, Australia’s key food production region.

The facility has been progressively renovated and upgraded over the past ten years to include 5 freezers, 3 blast freezers and a number of food production areas offering storage and operating temperatures down to -30°C.  The site supplies a significant amount of value-added meat products such as high-end wagyu burgers, meatballs for food service and beef bacon products for the Middle East market, as well as supplying, raw, diced and minced meat to other external food manufacturers.

Name: Slovenský zväz spracovateľov mäsa
Description: Slovenský zväz spracovateľov mäsa je dobrovoľným združením fyzických a právnických osôb, podnikajúcich v oblasti spracovania mäsa, výroby mäsových výrobkov a/alebo v oblasti súvisiacej s touto podnikateľskou činnosťou. Členovia zväzu sa hlásia k princípom trhovej ekonomiky, rešpektujú a dôsledne dodržiavajú pri výkone svojej činnosti právny poriadok platný na území Slovenskej republiky.

Name: Paniel Meat Processing Ltd
Description:
Paniel Meat Processing was created in 2012 with the target of making meat affordable and available to everyone mainly in African countries where people still eat bush meat. In that regards PMP is speeding up product innovation and increasing Customization according to the consumer choices to market with new products to expand market shares .

Core values:
We strive and delighted to   every- day better products with the real fresh- ness taste to our customers.
                                                  Vision:
PMP makes its aim to make it’s meats available and affordable to every income categories of people in Africa and the rest of world while produce the best quality and healthily meat products.													
                                          Mission statement:
We are dedicated to be the best of meat processor in giving customers a variety of products as a choice to consumers for a daily innovations to stratify their needs.

Name: John Dee Warwick Pty Ltd
Description:
John Dee is Australia's oldest and most trusted, single family owned, premium beef producer.  

Since 1939, the Hart family have established a reputation for quality and service in the beef processing industry. The John Dee brand has one hundred percent commitment to quality and consistency which has been the philosophy of the company since its establishment.

The processing plant is located in Warwick, Queensland, ideally situated on the Darling Downs, just two hours from the port of Brisbane with ready access to prime Southern Downs and New England Tableland cattle.
With four generations of experience, we have operated for 75 years and are the longest running family owned meat processor & exporter in Australia under the one line of management. Experience in world wide and domestic markets gives us the ability to understand customer requirements in all markets.

Our reliable and highly skilled workforce maintains our reputation for quality products. Staff training at John Dee is a top priority, ensuring skills and passed on to new generations who take pride in the name that stands for an Australian owned company that believes in producing and selling an outstanding product.

Four generations of experience in the beef industry means John Dee is a trusted name in cattle husbandry, feed lotting and grain feed development. Coupled with a commitment to safety, the environment and compliance to DA (AQIS) and Halal requirements, John Dee is a modern, internationally recognised brand that is shaping the next generation of global beef supply.

Name: The Scottish Venison Company
Description:
Helping chefs & consumers source sustainable, ethical & healthy Scottish Wild Venison meat.
Wild game meat processor, wholesaler & retailer.

Description:
Wir sind Windau: Seit 1976 stehen wir für hochwertige Schinken- und Wurstspezialitäten – maßgeschneidert für den Lebensmitteleinzelhandel, Foodservice und die weiterverarbeitende Industrie. Als ostwestfälisches Familienunternehmen mit topmoderner Produktion verbinden wir Tradition mit Innovation und bieten Ihnen zuverlässige Produkte:

• Vielseitige Lösungen für Handel und Industrie – 
  von der Beratung bis zum fertig verpackten 
  Produkt 

• Zertifizierte Qualität für höchste Produktsicherheit                        
  und Transparenz: IFS, QS, Bio & mehr

• Mehr Nachhaltigkeit, z. B. durch Optimierung 
  unserer Energieeffizienz, innovative Verpackungen, 
  regionale Zutaten sowie vegane Produkte

• Maximale Flexibilität und Frische 
  z. B. durch IQF-Verfahren  

• Innovative, zukunftsorientierte Produkte: 
  Auch im Bereich pflanzlicher Alternativen 
  setzen wir Maßstabe

Lust, Teil unserer Erfolgsgeschichte zu werden? Wir wachsen weiter – und neue Talente sind bei uns immer herzhaft willkommen!

Name: Pollo al Dia
Description:
Fundada en Pasto en la década de los 70s con más de 40 años de trayectoria en cria y levante de Aves de Corral  para la posterior producción y comercialización de su carne; Pollo Al Día se posiciona como una de las empresas avícolas más grandes y prominentes de Colombia, destacándose en publicaciones de renombre como Dinero, Semana y Forbes Co.

 La empresa cuenta con un equipo de más de 500 colaboradores y tiene una amplia presencia con más de 35 tiendas en diversos departamentos del país, también dedicándose en la producción y comercialización de  huevos de alta calidad ,  satisfaciendo las necesidades de miles de hogares colombianos.

Pollo al dia cuenta con la cadena de restaurantes PAD, de comida rápida especializada en Pollo frito con mas de 5 sedes en el departamento de Nariño.

Pollo Al Día figura en el top 10 de varios listados en cuanto a tamaño empresarial en el sur occidente de Colombia. Posee una de las plantas de beneficio avícola más avanzadas y reconocidas del país, obteniendo varias certificaciones y premios, incluida la HACCP Y un premio a la excelencia en producción avícola otorgado por una organización de los Países Bajos. 

Pollo al Día es la empresa  matriz de Huevos Al Día y Restaurantes PAD, y tiene su sede central en la Carrera 22A No. 15 - 61, edificio Pollo al Día, en Pasto, Colombia.

Name: MEAT HOUSE S.A.

The Meat House company is an extension of the Sklavenitis Group's industrial activity in the field of meat processing.

The company's activities are the marketing, processing, standardization and packaging of all kinds of meat, the production and marketing of all kinds of meat preparations.

Name: Elite Egypt

Elite for Supply is a leading name in the meat production industry. Leveraging over a decade of combined experience, we specialize in delivering premium raw and processed meat products. Our commitment to excellence starts at the source: we operate our own farm where we control the quality from the very beginning. By overseeing every step—from raising cattle to the final stages of processing—we ensure that our products meet the highest standards of safety and quality.
Our state-of-the-art facilities and a team of seasoned professionals allow us to provide tailored solutions to meet the diverse needs of our clients. We offer a broad range of services, including raw meat, processed meat, and poultry products. Our rigorous quality control measures ensure that every product, from farm to table, maintains exceptional freshness and safety.

Description: Welcome to Al Darhim, your trusted source for high-quality meat products in the UAE since 2001. Our commitment is to provide our customers with a reliable, premium experience, with rigorous quality standards and exceptional customer service.

Name: CINA Carmangerie

În prezent CINA are 9 magazine proprii, cu carne și preparate din carne, din care cel mai nou deschis, cel din Piața Mihai Viteazu, are și BISTRO, cu mâncare sănătoasă, tradițională, servită rapid.

Name: GE.MA. DISAL S.R.L.
Description:
La nostra storia inizia nella seconda metà del secolo scorso, quando la famiglia Di Somma ha trasformato un’attività agricola e di allevamento in una realtà che oggi si afferma nel settore delle carni di qualità.
Grazie alla passione per la terra e al profondo rispetto per il benessere animale, abbiamo costruito un’azienda che porta avanti una tradizione di eccellenza, combinando sapientemente artigianalità e innovazione. Dalla gestione delle prime stalle fino alla creazione di uno stabilimento all’avanguardia, la nostra storia è un viaggio di crescita e di ricerca costante della perfezione, sempre rispettando la natura e gli animali. Oggi, siamo presenti sul mercato nazionale e internazionale, offrendo carni selezionate da allevamenti che garantiscono benessere e sostenibilità. Ogni giorno, ci impegniamo a rispettare questi valori che ci hanno guidato sin dall’inizio, mantenendo vive le tradizioni di famiglia.

Nosso compromisso é entregar cortes selecionados, com procedência certificada, respeitando o bem-estar animal, o meio ambiente e as exigências dos mercados mais exigentes – nacionais e internacionais.

Contamos com profissionais especializados e uma cadeia de fornecimento eficiente, que nos permite oferecer produtos frescos, saborosos e confiáveis, tanto para o varejo quanto para o atacado.

Com um olhar voltado para o futuro, o Frigorífico Vale do Araguaia Carnes visa em sustentabilidade e parcerias sólidas, reafirmando seu papel como referência em qualidade, ética e compromisso com o cliente.

Name: Ubojnia Drobiu "Piórkowscy"
Description:
Mająca swoją siedzibę w Woli Cyrusowej woj. łódzkie, została założona w październiku 1996 roku. W odpowiedzi na rosnące potrzeby rynku, w 2001 roku rozpoczęto budowę nowego zakładu w malowniczej miejscowości Koziołki, a obecnie firma zajmuje imponującą powierzchnię produkcyjną o wielkości 6,5 tys. m2.

Od samego początku istnienia firma utrzymuje się na czele branży, dostarczając świeżego kurczaka o najwyższej jakości. Ponad 400 kontrahentów, rozmieszczonych na obszarze całego kraju, korzysta z produktów Ubojni Drobiu „PIÓRKOWSCY.”

Niezaprzeczalną siłą przedsiębiorstwa jest jego długoletnie doświadczenie w branży, które zdobywane było poprzez współpracę z solidną grupą dostawców i odbiorców kurczaka. Surowiec do produkcji pochodzi głównie z centralnej Polski, zgodnie z podpisanymi umowami długoterminowymi z ponad 140 dostawcami kurczaka żywego.

Ubojnia Drobiu „PIÓRKOWSCY” nie tylko dostarcza wysokiej jakości produkty, ale również działa szeroko na rynku, posiadając własne sklepy oraz hurtownie drobiarskie. Dodatkowo, firma pełni rolę udziałowca w wytwórni pasz, dostarczając hodowcom ekologicznych produktów najwyższej jakości.

Dzięki temu holistycznemu podejściu, Ubojnia Drobiu „PIÓRKOWSCY” nie tylko utrzymuje się na szczycie konkurencji, ale również stanowi solidne ogniwo w łańcuchu dostaw drobiarskich produktów na terenie Polski.

Name: Ferma Soarelui
Description:
Problema mare pe care o vedem în lume si în special în România, este că hrana obținută industrial, în afară de avantajul prețului mic, este o hrană care pe termen lung a introdus în societate multe probleme de sănătate. Aceste probleme își au originea fie în creșterea prea rapidă a animalelor prin furajare forțată, fie în administrarea antibioticelor  pe parcursul întregului ciclu de viață al acestora, peste care se adaugă și o chimizare exgerată în industria cărnii prin inputuri considerabile de conservanți, potențiatori de gust, coloranți etc.

Piața are nevoie de alternative etice și sănătoase,  astfel că ne dorim să creăm, să menținem și să inspirăm un cadru și un mod de viață sănătoase și frumoase, pentru familiile și copiii celor implicați (fondatori, angajați, parteneri, clienți, alți fermieri și persoane interesate să devină fermieri), dar și pentru animale, sol și mediu în general.

Name: Norfolk Wild Venison
Description:
We believe in traditional values

Years of Experience
Consumers are increasingly interested in the origins of their food, its sustainability, and the carbon footprint associated with its production. There’s a growing demand for healthier food options that align with these values.

Despite this trend, a significant portion of venison is exported, only to be replaced by lower quality, factory-farmed imported meat. This raises questions about why such practices persist.

Recognizing the challenges of busy lifestyles and the desire for convenience, many people don’t have the time to seek out specialty butchers or spend hours preparing meals.

In response to these concerns, Norfolk Wild Venison emerges as a visionary solution. Spearheaded by Founder David Johnson, Norfolk Wild Venison operates across expansive lands within the whole of Norfolk.

Our mission is clear: to transform the perception of wild venison and make it more accessible to consumers. By doing so, we aim to address the demand for sustainable, high-quality food while accommodating the needs of busy individuals.

Moreover, our wild venison is fully traceable from field to fork, ensuring transparency and accountability throughout the entire process. Each package includes individual tag numbers, hunter ID, and the location where the deer was harvested, providing consumers with detailed information about the provenance of their meat.

Name: S.UBERTO CARNI DEL BOSCO SRL
Description:
L’azienda agricola SANT’UBERTO nasce nel 1963 con la precisa intenzione di preservare e valorizzare il territorio di rara bellezza delle nostre colline, sfruttandone le risorse con attività compatibili con le sue caratteristiche. La ricomparsa in Emilia Romagna di fauna selvatica di grande taglia ha aperto il settore della macellazione e commercializzazione di carni pregiate, che abbiamo - tra i primi in regione - affiancato con soddisfazione alle più tradizionali attività della coltivazione e della raccolta dei prodotti del bosco (legna, funghi, tartufi, castagne...).
Nello spaccio aziendale potrete trovare tutti i nostri prodotti. 

REQUISITI FONDAMENTALI DEL NOSTRO CENTRO DI LAVORAZIONE SELVAGGINA E SEZIONAMENTO
Effettuiamo una lavorazione completa che prevede: 
• Obbligo di controlli veterinari ispettivi sulle carni e bollatura 
• Frollatura 
• Sezionamento in 5-6 tagli anatomici 
• Operazioni di sezionamento e/o disosso • Confezionamento sottovuoto 
• Refrigerazione rapida in abbattitore (temperatura -30°) 
• Stoccaggio in cella (temperatura -18°)

Description: Parzen ist mehr als nur der Name einer gewöhnlichen Bayreuther Metzgerei. Er steht für Familientradition im Metzgerhandwerk – mit Daniel Parzen ist unsere Metzgerei bereits in der 4. Name: Transylvania Meat Co.
Description:
OUR GOAL
Transylvania Meat Co. was created with one simple purpose in mind. We aspire to share Romania's delicious meat dishes with the world, and allow people to finally experience what traditional Romanian cuisine has to offer.

Originally, we wanted to allow Romanians living in Chicago the chance to enjoy the traditional foods they had been missing from home. However, it quickly became clear that our meat was growing in popularity with residents from all over the Chicagoland area. We realized that we had a momentous opportunity to spread Romania’s delicious meat recipes to people of all different nationalities. This is the reason Transylvania Meat Co. puts such passion and commitment into ensuring our meat is of the utmost quality. First impressions count, and we know that for many, our meat is their initial sample of Romanian cuisine. Our goal is to astonish and amaze our customers with the incredible flavor that Romanian meat has to offer.

As of today, we continue to serve our meat at locations throughout Chicagoland, Downers Grove, Des Plains, Niles, and Arlington Heights. Eventually, we plan to supply our exceptional meat throughout the state of Illinois, and hopefully the rest of the United States.

At Transylvania Meat Co., it is our mission to enthusiastically reveal this often-underestimated cuisine to our patrons. With that ambitious goal in mind, we always ensure that our meat is of the highest quality and guarantee it will leave our customers astounded. We consider it a privilege to present our delicious Romanian heritage to the world.

Thank you EmpowerLinked for promoting us on your platform which includes digital screens located in properties, businesses and organizations in the Northern IL area!

Name: Pakistan Meats
Description: PK Meat & Food Company, based in Lahore, is a premium Halal frozen food manufacturer in Pakistan, offering a wide range of ready-to-cook and semi-cooked beef, mutton, and chicken products. Their lineup includes traditional favorites like shami kebabs, koftas, and chapli kebabs, as well as modern snacks like chicken nuggets and crispy strips. With state-of-the-art processing facilities, PK Meat adheres to the highest hygiene and safety standards, holding ISO 22000 and HACCP certifications. All products are 100% Halal and free from artificial flavors, colors, and preservatives. With a strong distribution network across Pakistan and exports to international markets including the Middle East, PK Meat is a trusted name for quality and authentic taste.

Name: Hälsingborgs Kött & Chark
Description:
Från grisproducent på Rosersbergs gård till styckdeltaljer på HKC. Vi är din leverantör av högkvalitativa kött- och charkprodukter från Skåne.

Med specialistkunskaper på våra produkter och ett nära samarbete med bonden Johan på Rosersbergs gård, strävar vi efter att vara den främsta destinationen för köttälskare, grossister, industrier och restauranger som värdesätter kvalitet, smak och hållbarhet högt. 

Lika högt värdesätter vi djurens hälsa och miljö samtidigt som vi tror på kunskap och transparens. Därför erbjuder vi alltid möjligheten att boka in en tid och göra ett studiebesök på Rosersbergs gård där kan ni hälsa på djuren. 

Besök gärna vår hemsida för att läsa mer om HKC, ladda ned vårt produktblad eller lägga en beställning.

Name: Mesarstvo Blatnik d.o.o.
Description:
Smo družinsko podjetje in se ukvarjamo s prodajo in proizvodnjo mesa in mesnih izdelkov po tradicionalnih postopkih, Naš asortima dopolnjujemo tudi z EKO-izdelki. 
V proizvodnjo mesnin vpeljujemo najsodobnejše tehnologije proizvodnje in pakiranja in s tem skrbimo za manjšo porabo energije in manj izpustov v okolje. 
Naši cilji so, da našim kupcem ponudimo meso in mesne izdelke najboljše kakovosti, da surovine v čim večji meri odkupimo od lokalnih pridelovalcev in s tem skrbimo za njihov razvoj, hkrati pa skrbimo, da so poti od pridelovalcev do naših kupcev čim krajše in čim hitrejše.

Sebagai distributor terbaik, kami mengimpor daging dari negara-negara dengan standar kesehatan tinggi, serta memperoleh daging dari peternakan lokal bersertifikat. Kami menyediakan berbagai produk daging segar dan beku untuk pelanggan di Denpasar, Kuta, Seminyak, Canggu, Jimbaran, & Nusa Dua. Description:
DRS Industrial Services Corp., also known as DRS Machine (Doctors of Machines), provides specialized industrial solutions for the meat, poultry, seafood, and protein processing industry across the United States.

From vacuum packaging machines, injectors, tumblers, clippers, grinders, to thermoformers, we offer high-performance machinery tailored to your processing needs.

DRS was born from years of hands-on experience in the field. Our team has a solid history in technical service, machine installation and commissioning, automation, and operational consulting. This allows us not only to sell equipment—but to make sure it works flawlessly in your facility from day one.

We also supply original spare parts and consumables, and provide fast, expert maintenance support to minimize downtime and keep your production running smoothly. Our clients trust us for both our technical expertise and our customer-first approach.

At DRS, we’re more than technicians—we’re partners in your production success. Whether you’re expanding, upgrading, or starting a new line, we’re here to guide you every step of the way.

Let’s connect and explore how DRS Machine can support your business with smart technology and reliable service.

Name: Frigorífico Los Prados
Description:
Frigorífico Los Prados nació con una misión clara: ofrecer carnes de excelencia, con procesos cuidados y una atención personalizada que garantice la mejor experiencia para nuestros clientes. Somos especialistas en carne vacuna de novillo pesado de exportación, asegurando terneza, sabor y un calibre constante. Además, ofrecemos cerdo, pollo fresco deshuesado diariamente, cordero patagónico y una exclusiva selección de cortes exóticos como yacaré, búfalo y ciervo, entre otros.

Nos distinguimos por un enfoque artesanal en la carne, donde cada pieza es seleccionada y trabajada con precisión para cumplir con los estándares más exigentes de la alta gastronomía, restaurantes, hoteles y grandes cadenas gastronómicas. Entendemos que la carne no es solo un producto, sino un elemento clave en la identidad culinaria de nuestros clientes, por eso diseñamos cortes a medida y nos adaptamos a sus necesidades específicas.

Nuestro diferencial está en el servicio y la confianza. Contamos con una logística propia que nos permite ofrecer entregas diarias, con unidades refrigeradas de última generación monitoreadas en tiempo real. Garantizamos la trazabilidad de cada producto, asegurando que llegue en condiciones óptimas a cada cliente. Además, brindamos un servicio de atención directa, resolviendo cualquier requerimiento con rapidez y eficiencia.

En Los Prados, no solo proveemos carne, construimos relaciones de largo plazo. Nos involucramos en cada detalle, entendiendo las necesidades de cada cliente para aportar valor real a su negocio.

Más que un proveedor, somos un socio estratégico en la gastronomía.

Name: Quint
Description:
Wir sind Quint.
Gegründet 1928 in Trier-Ruwer hat unser Unternehmen seinen heutigen Sitz in Kenn. Unsere Fleischwaren werden aus hochwertigen Zutaten und mit viel handwerklichem Know-How hergestellt, in großen Teilen nach strengen Bioland Richtlinien. Aber auch im konventionellem Bereich verzichten wir auf Geschmacksverstärker, Phosphate und Zusatzstoffe. Seit 2013 sind wir Bioland-Partner und vermarkten unser regionales Fleisch- und Wurstwarensortiment als
„Willi’s Bio Fleischerei“.
In partnerschaftlicher Zusammenarbeit mit Bioland-Landwirten aus der Region leben wir echte Kreislauf-Landwirtschaft im Einklang mit Natur und Tier. Dabei achten wir stets auf die Verwertung des ganzen Tieres und verzichten auch auf Nitritpökelsalz.
Bereits jetzt sind wir im Rindfleischbereich bei einem Bio-Anteil von 100% und arbeiten kontinuierlich daran, auch im Schweinefleischbereich der 100% Marke näher zu kommen.

REGIONAL.
Wir handeln und arbeiten regional. Hand in Hand mit Landwirten und Schlachtbetrieben um die Wege so kurz wie möglich zu halten. Ganz besonders im Bio-Bereich.

HANDWERKLICH.
Wir arbeiten ganz traditionell mit echter Handwerkskunst und kombinieren diese mit modernen Technologien. Nur so entsteht ein wunderbares Produkt, wie es die Generationen vor uns kennengelernt haben.

NACHHALTIG.
Seit vielen Jahren arbeiten wir kontinuierlich daran noch nachhaltiger zu arbeiten. Unser Firmengebäude ist komplett energetisch saniert, wir produzieren unseren eigenen Strom und nutzen Wärmerückgewinnung zum Heizen.

BIO.
Seit dem Beginn unserer Partnerschaft mit Bioland im Jahr 2013 haben wir uns auf eine lange und beschwerliche Reise begeben: Unseren Weg zu 100% Bio. Nicht weil es besonders einfach ist oder gerade Trend ist, sondern weil es der richtige Weg ist. Aus fester Überzeugung und mit dem Willen dieses Ziel so schnell wie möglich zu erreichen. Jeden Tag sind wir näher dran als je zuvor.

Zuletzt beim Wagyu Fleisch Contest 2021 und 2022. Das Geheimnis hinter dem einzigartigen Geschmack: Respekt, Fürsorge und bestes Futter. Auf den mehr als 300.000 Quadratmeter Wiese weiden die Wagyurinder fast das ganze Jahr und finden dort die besten sauerländer Gräser und Kräuter. Über den Expressversand in nachhaltigen Strohboxen und Tasting Events am Hof können Gourmets und Spitzenköche in ganz Europa in den Genuss des ausgezeichneten Fleisches kommen. Hier erhalten Sie ein Esserlebnis, das Sie garantiert nie vergessen. Das wertvolle intramuskuläre Fett macht das sauerländer Wagyufleisch besonders zart und aromatisch.

Name: My Green Earth Beef
Description:
My Green Earth is an online retailer of sustainably raised, ultra-premium, grass-fed beef. Our ranch is located in beautiful Shepherd, Montana.

Sustainability is our key focus at My Green Earth. This means we use efficient yet green production methods to provide our customers with a product that is safe for the environment, delicious, and healthy. We've made it our mission to ensure our ranching practices are ethical while still preserving western traditions. We've adapted our practices to do our part in keeping the planet green.

My Green Earth is an Audia Company.

Description: Selezioniamo e produciamo le migliori carni nazionali ed estere. Selezione, varietà e gusto!

Name: Royal Food Production Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Royal Food Production  jest nowoczesną firmą działającą w branży mięsnej od 2004 roku.

Podstawowym profilem naszej  działalności jest wytwarzanie kebabów i hamburgerów , które produkujemy  ,wg unikalnych receptur.

Nasz zakład produkcji kebabów i hamburgerów  - jeden z najnowocześniejszych tego typu,  zlokalizowany jest w Kopytowie niedaleko Błonia pod Warszawą.

Z zamiłowaniem i starannością odwołując się do najlepszych tradycji kuchni orientalnej  wytwarzamy  najwyższej jakości  kebaby w pełnej zgodzie z  wymagającymi przepisami. Ich niezwykły smak jest efektem zastosowania wyselekcjonowanych przypraw  i technologii wyznaczających nowe standardy.

Uzupełnieniem naszego programu produkcyjnego są hamburgery wołowe, doskonale przyjmowane na dojrzałych  rynkach europejskich.
Bezpieczeństwo i wysoka jakość świadczonych usług to motto, które przyświeca nam od początku powstania firmy, dlatego robimy wszystko, aby nasze wyroby spełniały najwyższe standardy. Nasze zasady pracy opierają się przede wszystkim na bezpieczeństwie i higienie pracy. Wiemy, że żywność to produkt wyjątkowy, dlatego przy produkcji kebabu i innych wyrobów mięsnych dbamy o każdy szczegół, aby w pełni usatysfakcjonować nawet najbardziej wymagających klientów.

Posiadamy certyfikaty BRC  i IFS

Name: De Veurn'Ambachtse
Description:
In 1980 werd het vleeswarenatelier "De Veurn’Ambachtse" opgestart in Alveringem. Vanaf de eerste dag was het de bedoeling om ambachtelijk te werken. Zo worden er ambachtelijke procédés gebruikt in plaats van hedendaagse industriële productiemethoden.
In 2000 kwamen zoon Joris en dochter Carmen in de zaak en breidde De Veurn'Ambachtse verder uit met de opening van resto 't Potje Paté. Dit is het proefhuis bij uitstek voor de talrijke gastronomische delicatessen van De Veurn'Ambachtse en uiteraard voor nog meer lekkers. Naast 't Potje Paté vindt u ook het Patéwinkeltje, waar u uit het volledige assortiment van De Veurn'Ambachtse kan kiezen.

Name: Kitai Abattoir
Description:
Kitai Abattoir (Pty) Ltd is a Namibian business focused on vertically integrated Wagyu beef production for export to premium international markets including the EU, North America, the Middle East, and Asia. Kitai prioritizes quality meat in high demand globally, with offcuts and non-premium grades sold locally or regionally.

Working with local beef producers through an out-grower model, Kitai supplies Wagyu genetics and buys back the calves for backgrounding and finishing at its feedlot. The facility can house up to 9,000 cattle, ensuring consistent marble scoring over an 11–13 month feed period. Cattle feed is produced on-site in partnership with a top Namibian feed producer.

To complete the value chain, Kitai is constructing a modern abattoir adjacent to the feedlot, reducing stress on animals and improving meat quality. The facility will process 30 Wagyu cattle daily, with the highest standards of hygiene, safety, and traceability to meet export regulations.

Driven by global demand for premium marbled beef and Namibia’s reputation for high-quality natural beef, Kitai aims to become a competitive player in the international Wagyu market — combining best-in-class genetics, responsible farming, and export excellence.

Name: AGROCARNES CAJAMARCA SRL
Description:

AGROCARNES CAJAMARCA S.R.L., presta servicios en comercialización, distribución y empacado al vacío de carnes frías y maduras; garantizando a nuestros clientes calidad e higiene en todas nuestras líneas de productos.

Name: Maid-Rite Specialty Foods Inc.
Description:
Here at Maid-Rite Specialty Foods Inc. our Mission is to be among the most highly respected portion control value added meat processors in the frozen food manufacturing industry. We aspire to achieve this mission through uncompromising food safety systems, superior product quality and customer service, fair pricing, loyalty to suppliers and solid employee relationships.

Over 60 years ago our family started a meat company to better serve the rapidly changing needs of the foodservice industry. We closely collaborated with our customers to make delicious, frozen meat products that were both easy to prepare and loved by everyone who tasted them. We quickly became experts in hitting the mark on flavor profile, appearance, size, shape, nutritional value, and cost per serving.

Our prized recipes, unique flavors, and perfect portion sizes gave our customers a distinct competitive advantage. In turn, this helped Maid-Rite Specialty Foods become one of the largest independent producers of USDA inspected frozen meats in the United States.

We currently operate multiple, ultra-modern raw and fully cooked processing facilities to satisfy annual demand that exceeds 300 million portions. In addition to a broad line of beef, veal, pork, turkey, and chicken products, we produce millions of pounds of custom-recipe, private label products for many of the world’s most recognizable restaurant, grocery and foodservice companies.

Premier provider of high-quality, ready-to-cook chicken and meat products. Halal certified, hormone-free, antibiotic-free, and HACCP compliant.

Name: LA MARINE TRADING MIDDLE EAST
Description:
At LA MARINE MIDDLE EAST TRADING, we're proud to be a trusted supplier of premium halal meat and seafood products to leading retailers across the Middle East.

With a team of 100-200 dedicated professionals, we're committed to upholding the highest standards of quality, freshness, and food safety. Our Halal Meat & Seasfood are carefully sourced, processed, and distributed to ensure they meet the strictest quality requirements.

As a leading exporter from Pakistan, we've established strong relationships with our clients and partners, providing exceptional customer service, tailored solutions, and innovative products that meet the evolving needs of our customers.

Our strengths:

- Premium Halal Meat and Seafood Products
- Strong Partnerships with Reading Retailers

- Commitment to Quality, Freshness, and customer satisfaction

Let's connect! If you're looking for a reliable partner for your halal meat and seafood needs, we'd love to explore how we can support your business. Follow us for updates on our products, services, and industry insights.

Name: Qualymeat
Description: A Qualymeat leva a qualidade em seu nome não por acaso. Nossa empresa tem como meta principal oferecer carnes saudáveis, de excelente padrão e com a garantia que nossos consumidores merecem. Esta presente em todo Brasil é o reconhecimento do mercado pela qualidade e competência de nossos produtos.

Name: Canadian Premium Meats
Description:
Canadian Premium Meats Inc. (CPM) identified the need for a federally registered and European Union (EU) approved custom harvesting and meat processing facility in Western Canada. CPM provides the service of livestock slaughter, meat processing & packaging as being the link between Livestock production and Meat marketing. The facility concentrates solely on custom processing livestock for meat marketers and is NOT involved in the processing and direct marketing of their own branded meat products.
Canadian Premium Meats’ main GOAL is to perform a reliable top quality CUSTOM SERVICE and establish a relationship built on trust with all of our clients.

Name: Quinn's Meats
Description:
Quinn's Meats  was established in June of 1976 by Brian Quinn. After 46 years running his business, Brian retired and sold the business to Kara and Darold Enright of Enright Cattle Company in 2021.
Quinn's Meats offers an authentic & unique butchery experience, we cut from whole carcasses. We source locally and believe in supporting as many local farmers as possible. 
We have a retail store stocked with fresh local beef, chicken, pork, turkey and lamb. As well as local fresh produce, honey, milk and cheese.
We make our own smoked meats in house such as pepperettes, jerky, smoked hams, bacon, roast beef, salami, pepperoni, etc.
We offer custom butchery services for many local farmers.

Name: Alpha Omega LLC
Description:
Welcome to Alpha Omega, LLC, where, in line with our name, we serve as your comprehensive solution for beef and pork manufacturing, covering every aspect from inception to completion. Established in the 1990s as a meat wholesaler, Alpha Omega, LLC initially supplied a diverse range of meat products to our retail clientele. Recognizing the evolving demands of our retail partners, we responded by introducing our case-ready beef and pork processing.

For over three decades, we have dedicated ourselves to refining our USDA Inspected case-ready beef and pork program. Our goal is to provide a product that gives the impression of being cut, wrapped, weighed, and labeled directly within your own meat department.

In addition to our case-ready program, we utilize Modified Atmosphere Packaging (MAP) to package a variety of our products, extending their shelf life. This approach affords you more time to effectively market and sell our products to your customers. Our diverse product range, spanning from pork chops to New York strip and even Italian Pizza Sausage, demonstrates our ability to cater to a wide array of preferences.

At Alpha Omega, LLC, we are committed to meeting your specific needs and simplifying your responsibilities. Further enhancing convenience, we offer direct shipping to your location using our dedicated trucking fleet. We pride ourselves on being your reliable partner in the beef and pork industry.

Name: Walke Meat Company
Description:
Walke Meat Company, a family-owned business, began its journey in 1996 as a state inspected slaughter plant. Through immense effort and dedication, we achieved our USDA inspection certification in 2010, paving the way for remarkable growth and expansion.

Today, we proudly serve a diverse group of private label and co-packaging partners, many of whom distribute their products nationwide. Our retail business is flourishing, offering a wide array of premium products including sausages, bacons, steaks, ground beef, seasonings, and barbeque sauce. Our commitment to custom slaughter and processing remains unwavering, as we handle approximately 30 beef and 25 hogs per week. 

Walke Meat Company has garnered over 100 awards for our quality cured meats and sausages at the Oklahoma Texas Meat Processors Association’s Cured Meats Competition. We have also earned national recognition from the American Association of Meat Processors' American Cured Meats Championship for our Beef Snack Sticks, Hot Links, and Andouille Sausage.

Name: Halal Factory Co
Description: At Halal Factory, we are passionate about providing high-quality halal meat to our customers. Our story began with a simple idea: to produce ethically sourced, healthy, and delicious halal meat. Today, we are proud to be one of the leading halal meat producers in the industry, committed to providing our customers with the best possible product and service.

Name: D&Z Consultants Co. Ltd
Description:
D&Z Consultants Co., Ltd. is a specialist in the production and processing of halal Beef with a complete range of international standards from upstream cattle quality control. Processing of midstream cattle and selling beef to downstream markets. 

The Company has a halal Beef Processing Plant for Export in Chumphon Province, which has the potential to process 200 cows per day, and is an alliance with The Gulf of Thailand Cattle Farmers Network Southern Agricultural Cooperatives Community enterprises in the southern region and Islamic cooperatives in the southern provinces. Therefore, the company has great potential to support the fattening cattle of farmers in 14 southern provinces. and the western region, which is divided into 4 groups: 1 Gulf of Thailand Province 2 Andaman Province 3 Group Three Southern Provinces 4 Western Region.

Description:

We focus on sustainable production, offering products made without preservatives, colorants, or other chemicals—just quality meat you can trust.

Name: 3 Creek Ranch
Description:
The Choice you've been waiting for. 
 
At 3 Creek Ranch, we believe beef should deliver more than a grade. That’s why we raise our cattle in Idaho with patience, precision, and respect for the land. Every step of our process is intentional, designed to bring out the marbling, tenderness, and flavor that redefine what Choice can be. 
 
For chefs, that means confidence. It means knowing that every cut you serve will perform at the highest level—consistent, reliable, and full of flavor. We’ve built our program the right way, not the fast way, so you never have to compromise on quality or second-guess what’s on the plate. 
 
Idaho-raised. Chef-approved. This is 3 Creek Ranch.

Description:

GMP was taken over in 2019 by new management focusing on the protein export business and processing of Beef Jerky. GMP is a full-service global distributor and purveyor of the nest beef, lamb, poultry, and cheese from the USA.

Name: Kasidis
Description:
Facilities & fleet
Know-how, quality, dedication and reliability are the main ingredients of our success!
Our company’s facilities, which have a total production and storage area of 5000 square metres, have been designed and built in accordance with the rules laid down in current European and Greek law, in order to meet the strictest rules of hygiene and food safety.

We invest constantly in modern equipment, improving our technical capabilities to ensure the best possible products.

We provide our staff with ongoing training in Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) and rules of personal hygiene, achieving continuous improvement in our production processes.

We use our knowledge and experience to meet our customers’ individual needs reliably and consistently.
We check our products on a daily basis in the purpose-built testing area to maintain excellence of quality and taste.

We aim to offer our customers and partners the best possible service by establishing two facilities in Athens and Thessaloniki and continuously increasing our privately-owned fleet of refrigerated vehicles.

At every stage of the production process, Kasidis SA implements a certified Food Safety Management system in accordance with the ISO 22000:2005 standard.

Name: D'Orsogna
Description: D'Orsogna is a proud family-owned business with 75+ years of tradition, offering award-winning hams, bacon, salami, and continental meats. True to its Italian roots, D'Orsogna stands for authentic taste, quality, and trusted customer service.

Name: Salumificio Angeloni
Description:
A Castelvecchio di Monte Porzio (PU), nella verde vallata del Cesano, c’è una famiglia che da metà degli anni ’50, mette tutta la passione e l’impegno per portare sulle tavole italiane i salumi tipici marchigiani e la tradizionale Salciccia di Castelvecchio De.Co.
È la famiglia Angeloni, che da tre generazioni coniuga i valori dell’artigianalità alle esigenze della produzione industriale. Questo significa cura nella selezione di carni suine fresche di origine italiana, salatura e massaggio manuale, attento processo di stagionatura in celle frigorifere a temperatura e umidità controllate.
Selezioniamo le carni fresche di suini nati, cresciuti e macellati in Italia, da fornitori certificati.
Tutte le fasi di lavorazione – il taglio, la salatura, il massaggio – avvengono ancora oggi a mano, con gesti che rivelano la maestria e la passione dei nostri uomini. Sono questi gesti che permettono agli aromi di entrare in profondità e alle carni di asciugare in maniera uniforme.
Anche durante la stagionatura, mentre i salumi riposano nelle celle frigorifere, ci affidiamo ai sensi e all'esperienza: la vista, il tatto e l'olfatto ci vengono in aiuto per valutare il grado di maturazione e la qualità dei nostri prodotti. È solo alla fine di questo accurato processo, tutto artigianale, che lonze, salami, guanciale, pancetta e le nostre tipiche salsicce sono pronti a lasciare i nostri magazzini per raggiungere piccoli negozi e grandi supermercati.

Name: King's Quality Foods Cebu Inc. (KQFI)
Description:
For 65 years, King’s Quality Foods Incorporated (KQFI) has become one of the leading multi-brand food processing and distribution companies in the country. Founded by Juanito King in 1957, KQFI started out as a small business supplying products to King Sue Ham and Sausage Company in Metro Manila. 

Today, King’s Quality Foods is synonymous to quality and affordability. We are proud to be one of the best in the business with new innovations and products including the Bacon King line, which envisions to be the benchmark of the bacon industry in the Philippines.

Be a part of the King’s Quality Foods legacy as we aim to shape the future of the meat processing industry for generations to come.

Name: Butcher&Chef | Taller de Carns Km0
Description:
Excelencia en carne de proximidad para la restauración, aportando a sus cocinas las piezas, los cortes y los elaborados artesanales de mayor calidad.
 
Unimos la tradición carnicera de Lleida y la sabiduría de la mejor escuela de cocina de Barcelona para obtener carne de primerísima calidad, a la medida de las preparaciones y recetas de los Chefs más exigentes.

Elegimos nuestros animales en granjas de proximidad con todas las garantías de bienestar y el respeto al medioambiente. 

Seleccionamos y cortamos las mejores piezas y maduramos nuestros chuletones en cámara propia “dry aged”.
Picamos y mezclamos según el método tradicional para obtener los mejores elaborados gourmet.

La experiencia del Butcher junto al toque de la Chef para la unión perfecta del saber y del sabor.

Name: PT. Agro Nusa Protindo
Description: Agro Nusa Protindo is one of the attractive growing integrated meat processing companies in Bekasi, West Java, Indonesia with a vision to develop a business ecosystem to fulfill animal protein.

Name: TORCIGLIANI CARNI S.R.L.
Description:
Torcigliani Carni SRL è un’azienda specializzata nella selezione, lavorazione e commercializzazione di carni di alta qualità, rivolta a macellerie qualificate, ristorazione medio-alta, stabilimenti balneari e operatori professionali del food service.

Da tre generazioni operiamo lungo la filiera della carne con un approccio fondato su competenza, esperienza e contatto diretto con gli allevatori, selezionando con cura ogni capo secondo criteri di qualità, benessere animale e resa finale del prodotto.
Il nostro lavoro non è semplice fornitura, ma selezione consapevole: scegliamo carni che garantiscano costanza qualitativa, affidabilità e performance in cucina.

Affianchiamo alle eccellenze locali e nazionali una selezione di carni estere premium, tra cui mezzene e posteriori di razza Angus e altre tipologie scelte, per offrire ai nostri clienti un assortimento completo, flessibile e in continua evoluzione, capace di rispondere alle esigenze di menu stagionali e a diversi stili di ristorazione.

Il laboratorio di sezionamento consente lavorazioni personalizzate su mezzene e tagli specifici, permettendoci di supportare il cliente anche nella costruzione dell’offerta, nella gestione dei tagli e nella valorizzazione del prodotto in funzione del servizio.

Torcigliani Carni SRL è riconosciuta idonea CEE dal Ministero della Sanità con codice IT 2135 S.
L’azienda opera secondo un rigoroso sistema di autocontrollo HACCP conforme al Regolamento CE 853/04 e garantisce la tracciabilità e rintracciabilità completa dei prodotti secondo quanto previsto dal Regolamento CE 178/02.

Sceglierci significa affidarsi a un partner solido, competente e presente, capace di unire tradizione, selezione e visione moderna, per portare sul banco e nel piatto carni all’altezza dei professionisti più esigenti.

Name: Halal-N-Tayyib Meats
Description: Halal-N-Tayyib strives to provide authentic Halal high quality grass-fed, organic, and pastured meats straight from our farm building a community who is passionate about eating better meat and supporting local farms in a mutually beneficial way.

Name: SIMON-Fleisch GmbH
Description:
Die SIMON-Fleisch GmbH ist ein inhabergeführtes Familienunternehmen mit langjähriger Geschäftstradition.

Wir sind spezialisiert auf die Produktion von Schweinefleisch für den nationalen und internationalen Business-to-Business-Bereich und gehören zu den Top-10 der Schlachtunternehmen in diesem Sektor in Deutschland.

Unser Haus verbindet höchsten Qualitätsanspruch mit der Verpflichtung eines Familienunternehmens auf wirtschaftliche Solidität und Stabilität und verantwortungsvollem Handeln gegenüber unseren Geschäftspartnern, Mitarbeitern und unserer Umwelt.

Name: Boodles Meats
Description:
Boodles Meats was established in 1991 with the first store being opened in the City Centre Plaza, Rockhampton opposite Coles Supermarket. The Business was so successful we decided to expand with a further four stores operating from Emerald to Yeppoon and Rockhampton.

Our business grew to the extent of requiring a processing plant and distribution centre. A decision was made to purchase 188 Berserker Street for that purpose. After two years of processing we then opened a retail outlet. When rent and shopping centre management became more demanding the decision was made to start our dream of a meat supermarket.

The store where we are today opened in May 2003. We have a total of 650sqm under roof with 28 off street car parks. Today we employ 12 Butchers, 4 Apprentices, 8 Sales Assistants, 1 Administration Officer and 3 Cleaners.

We take our role in the community very seriously and know that thousands of Central Queensland consumers rely on us to deliver quality meat at all times.

Our Customers expect good services and fair pricing and that is what we’re all about.

We are also proud to be active sponsors with local sporting clubs.

Come in and say hello to the Team at Boodles Meats today and let them show you the best meat and service that CQ has to offer.

Name: Merda Zakład Drobiarski Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Zakład Drobiarski MERDA to w 100% rodzinne przedsiębiorstwo. Spółka powstała w 2001 roku, bazując na wieloletniej tradycji i doświadczeniu zakładu uboju drobiu, którego założycielem w 1990 roku był Florian Merda. Jesteśmy nowoczesnym zakładem drobiarskim, specjalizującym się w uboju kur rosołowych oraz ich mrożeniu i pakowaniu.  Dziś w Zakładzie Drobiarskim MERDA pracuje 84 pracowników, a zdolność produkcyjna kształtuje się na poziomie 6000 sztuk kur rosołowych na godzinę, co stwarza możliwość dziennego uboju 60.000 szt.Własnym transportem odbieramy żywiec na terenie Polski i Europy Zachodniej,a mrożone tuszki, porcje rosołowe, filety, ćwiartki, skrzydła, łapki i drobne mięso z kury   eksportujemy do odbiorców w Unii Europejskiej, Afryce oraz Azji. Głównymi odbiorcami produktów są firmy handlowe oraz przedsiębiorstwa przetwórstwa mięsnego . 

Misją Zakładu Drobiarskiego MERDA jest zapewnienie klientom znakomitej jakości oraz najwyższego poziomu bezpieczeństwa produktów. Osiągamy to dzięki szczegółowej kontroli na każdym etapie produkcji oraz systemowi HACCP, pozwalającemu szybko identyfikować potencjalne zagrożenia.Jako nowoczesne przedsiębiorstwo posiadamy również certyfikat BIO, uprawniający do wytwarzania wyrobów ekologicznych.

Name: Salumificio M. Brugnolo
Description:
Quando nel lontano 1951, all’età di 19 anni, Mario Brugnolo da Perarolo di Vigonza apre il suo primo punto vendita di carne, a Peraga di Vigonza, si affida ad un’intuizione. Ripone le sue convinzioni sui sette anni di garzonato in macelleria, trascorsi nelle botteghe della campagna padovana e sulla passione per quel lavoro che sente “suo” e che lo spinge ad abbandonare la tradizione contadina famigliare. 

A 22 anni Mario Brugnolo è già titolare di due negozi a Padova e proprio nella Città del Santo incontra Mirella che diventerà poi sua compagna di vita. Madre dei suoi cinque figli e costante punto di riferimento, la moglie di Mario rappresenta il naturale complemento al suo spirito imprenditoriale. 

“È stata il contrappeso alle mie esuberanze e alle mie insicurezze, la mia coscienza critica e la voce della ragione nel momento delle decisioni importanti. Così è stato quando nel 1975 decidemmo di aprire un laboratorio artigianale al piano terra della fattoria paterna per la produzione di specialità legate alla produzione salumiera veneta, come salame e sopressa. 
Così è stato, anche qualche anno dopo, quando decidemmo di procedere alla costruzione di un moderno impianto industriale, in piena rispondenza alle normative comunitarie di carattere igienicosanitario ed alla crescente richiesta di qualità proveniente dal mercato”.

Oggi il Salumificio M. Brugnolo ha 2 stabilimenti produttivi attivi, uno a Perarolo di Vigonza (PD) e l’altro a Porto Viro (RO), con oltre 20.000 m2 di sviluppo dell’area produttiva.

Sono più di 180 le REFERENZE DI GAMMA, grazie a 6 brand commerciali e fino a 170’000 kg di carne lavorati settimanalmente.

La distribuzione serve 20 Regioni italiane e il mercato centro europeo: forti di un moderno ed efficiente sistema di gestione della logistica e di un parco mezzi composto da numerosi camion frigo, il Salumificio M. Brugnolo è in grado di evadere gli ordini entro 24 ore dal loro ricevimento.

Ürünlerimizi; restoranlar, oteller, catering firmaları, fastfoodlar, hastaneler, kısaca kaliteli, sağlıklı ve uygun fiyat koşullarıyla et tüketmek isteyen kurum ve kuruluşlar öncelikli olarak tercih etmektedir.

Name: Keban Kasap
Description:
Keban Et 1976 yılında Keban Kasap olarak kuruldu. Butik bir kasap olmasına rağmen müşterilerine sunmuş olduğu ürünlerin katkısız ve lezzetli olmasından dolayı kısa sürede 'Et Ustası' ünvanının aldı. 41 yıldır iş hacmi, ürün yelpazesi, müşteriler, çalışanlar kısacası bir çok şey değişti. Ancak değişmeyen tek şey Keban Et'in sunduğu et ve et ürünlerinin lezzeti idi.

Keban Kasap müşterilerinden aldığı talepler ile kalitesini hiç bozmadan büyüyebilen nadir et üreticilerindendir. İlerleyen yıllarda gücünü müşterilerinin sadakat ve övgülerinden alarak üretim bandını genişletti.

İstanbul'un en köklü kasapları arasında yer alan Keban Kasap şu anda üretimine 1500m2 kapalı alana sahip Keban Et Entegre tesislerinde devam etmekte.

Yakın zamana kadar sadece pişirmeye hazır et ürünleri üretmesine rağmen 'Et Ustası' ünvanına yakışır bir şekilde tüketime hazır, pişirilmiş et ürünleri üretmeye başladı. Halkımızın gerçek et, katkısız lezzeti tatması için Et Yiyelim markasını oluşturdu. Bu marka çok kısa sürede halkın beğenisini kazandı. Et Yiyelim lokantalarında, kendine has lezzetleri içerisinde barındıran ürünleri ile müşterilerin vazgeçilmezi arasında yer aldı.

Keban Et her zaman samimi aile kasabı çizgisinin yanında, modern gelişimlere de önem veren bir firma olmuştur. Bu kimliğiyle 2016 yılında yerli burger projesi ile Burger Yiyelim markasını oluşturdu. Burger Yiyelim'in farkı %100 katkısız %100 dana etinden yapılan burgerleri oldu.

Somos una empresa familiar queretana. Desde nuestros inicios, en 1990, nos hemos dedicado a comercializar carnes y embutidos, con nuestras recetas buscamos siempre un equilibrio entre tradición e innovación.
Desde el comienzo de El Marrón mantenemos el compromiso de siempre un estricto estándar de calidad en todos nuestros productos. Estamos muy orgullosos de nuestra historia y del camino que llevamos recorrido.
Estamos muy orgullosos de ser queretanos y eso también nos define, así como Querétaro, seguimos fieles a nuestras tradiciones, pero siempre viendo al frente y buscando mejorar. Por lo que año con año implementamos nuevas técnicas y tecnologías que nos ayudan a seguir produciendo productos de calidad para llevar a la mesa de las familias y negocios queretanos. Esto es lo que hace único a El Marrón.
Si quieren probar nuestros productos estamos ubicados a un costado de la central de
abastos de Querétaro. 
Tenemos venta por menudeo y mayoreo, desde 100 gramos hasta las toneladas que hagan falta. También pueden encontrar nuestros productos con cualquiera de nuestros distribuidores, como en San Juan Salchichonerias, por ejemplo.

Name: Rica Carne Company SAS
Description:
Muchos nos hemos reunido alrededor de una fogata, una cocina o una mesa, en compañía de familia o amigos.

Estos momentos son ideales para recargarse de buena energía, descansar de la rutina, compartir momentos,
risas, buenas tertulias y por supuesto una buena comida.

Aunque alrededor de la mesa existan un mundo de personalidades y gustos, hay algo en común para todos
y es la pasión por la carne, que es la misma pasión que se vive en RicaCarne. Una familia que no solo se sienta
alrededor de la mesa como tú, sino que ha hecho de la carne su proyecto de vida por generaciones. Desde
hace más de 30 años trabajan desde la crianza responsable, escogencia, desposte, selección, limpieza
y maduración, hasta la entrega de productos de calidad, con los más altos niveles de inocuidad.

En RicaCarne no solo encontrarás carne y todo lo que gire alrededor de ella, sino que vivirás un mundo en el
que se madurarán relaciones, emociones, momentos e historias.

Name: DAK Poultry
Description:
DAK Poultry 

DAK Poultry is a vertically integrated poultry company based in Senegal, committed to providing consistent, high-quality chicken to the West African market. We are more than just a farm — we are a movement for economic empowerment, food security, and diaspora-driven investment in African agriculture.

We raise, process, and supply poultry with a clear mission: to feed communities while building wealth and ownership across the Black diaspora and the Senegalese people.

Our Facility:
Located in Bambilor, Senegal, our 450m² site currently houses 2,000 birds with plans to scale to 12,000. With staggered production cycles, we ensure a continuous supply of broiler chickens for reliable weekly sales.

Our Growth Model:
To meet rising demand, we will expand production by leasing land across Senegal, partnering directly with local landowners. This model allows us to scale efficiently while creating sustainable income opportunities for families and communities throughout the country.

Our Vision:
To become the region’s most trusted source of poultry while setting a new standard for ethical, transparent, and community-rooted agribusiness in Africa.

What Makes Us Different:
	•	 Scalable production designed for weekly market supply
	•	 Powered by diaspora investment and Senegalese land partnerships
	•	 Land lease model that generates wealth for rural landowners
	•	 5-week broiler cycles for fast, reliable turnover
	•	 Built on a model that centers Black wealth, land security, and food sovereignty


“Feeding Communities. Empowering Generations.”

Name: PT ADI PANGAN SEJAHTERA BALI
Description:
PT ADI PANGAN SEJAHTERA BALI
Produsen Daging Babi Beku Berkualitas dari Bali
PT Adi Pangan Sejahtera Bali adalah perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang produksi dan distribusi daging babi beku, berlokasi di Desa Dauh Peken, Tabanan, Bali. Didirikan pada tahun 2022, perusahaan ini hadir untuk memenuhi kebutuhan pasar akan produk daging babi yang higienis, berkualitas, dan aman dikonsumsi, baik untuk keperluan rumah tangga, hotel, restoran, hingga industri pengolahan makanan.
Dengan mengusung standar tinggi dalam setiap tahapan proses produksi—mulai dari pemilihan bahan baku, pemotongan, pengemasan hingga pembekuan—PT Adi Pangan Sejahtera Bali berkomitmen untuk menjaga kualitas dan kesegaran produk agar tetap optimal hingga sampai ke tangan konsumen. Fasilitas kami dilengkapi dengan teknologi yang mendukung sistem rantai dingin (cold chain system) untuk menjaga stabilitas suhu dan kualitas daging selama proses distribusi.
Selain fokus pada kualitas produk, perusahaan juga menjunjung tinggi nilai keberlanjutan dan kemitraan dengan peternak lokal sebagai bagian dari upaya mendorong pertumbuhan ekonomi daerah dan kesejahteraan masyarakat sekitar.

Description:

I loved my job as a butcher, and as the years were passing, I got to know every aspect of meat. From its cut, to cooking each and every different piece, pairing it with wine and even seasoning it. It slowly but steadily became my passion.

This passion led me to have the need to offer my knowledge and experience to all those meat lovers who appreciate quality food. Meatwish offers its customers exactly what it says. Whatever you dreamed of cooking we are here to offer it to you, without any compromise on quality but convenience that adds something great to your day.

Building trust is of outmost importance for us. We believe that being open and honest with you about what exactly it is that we sell (cut, country of origin etc.), is key to developing a long-term relationship. We provide you with the highest quality products available in great value for money so that you are always happy with the price you pay.

Our products will arrive to you fresh, vacuum sealed in portions according to your order and perfectly chilled, just as it should be.

In case you would like something that is not on our E-Shop, or any other service please feel free to contact us.

Name: Westerwälder Biohöfe
Description:
Fleisch ist ein Grundnahrungsmittel – doch wer macht sich wirklich Gedanken über dessen Qualität, Herkunft und über das Leben des Tieres, welches dahinter steht? Wir bei den Westerwälder Biohöfen stehen für vollkommene Transparenz, denn nur so kann nachhaltige Veränderung entstehen – für besseres und gesünderes Fleisch, mehr Tierwohl und einen umfassenden Naturschutz. Deshalb setzen auch Spitzenathleten aus den unterschiedlichsten Disziplinen auf die Kraft und den Nährwert unseres Biofleisches. Mehr dazu findet ihr auf unserer Website.

Beste Qualität. Unser Fleisch stammt von glücklichen und gesunden Tieren – jeder Bissen mit bestem Gewissen.

100% grasgefüttert – 100% natürlich. Optimales Nährstoffprofil – frei von Mastfutter, Hormonen oder Antibiotika.

Umweltfreundlich. Kein Einsatz von Pestiziden oder chemischen Düngemitteln.

Guter Boden, gutes Klima. Biolandwirtschaft schont Wasser und Boden, welcher dadurch mehr CO2 speichern kann.

Zero-Waste-Produktion. Jedes Teil des Tieres wird verarbeitet, nichts wird weggeschmissen.

Rückverfolgbarkeit. Vollständige Transparenz – von der Weide bis auf deinen Teller.

Name: Стейки Карпат – Преміум М'ясо & Крафтові Продукти з Доставкою Новою Поштою у Термобоксах за 1-2 дні
Description:
Ми компанія, яка відкрила на території України ПЕРШИЙ ОНЛАЙН МАРКЕТ КРАФТОВОГО М’ЯСА! 

Ми спеціалізуємося лише на крафтовому м’ясі від незалежних крафтових виробників. В основному це фермери, де тварини вільно гуляють, харчуються травою, сіном та п’ють чисту воду.

Наша мета — це довіра людей до нашого продукту. Кожен може впевнитися, що купує тільки справжнє крафтове м’ясо від дрібних фермерів з екологічно чистих районів. 

На відміну від м’яса з супермаркетів чи стихійних ринків, ми надаємо інформацію про місцезнаходження ферми, ім'я фермера та готові все розказати нашим клієнтам.

Стейки Карпат доставляє яловичину, вирощену на травах, органічну птицю, баранину та свинину вільного вигулу у спеціальних термобоксах з генераторами холоду прямо до ваших дверей або до найближчого відділення Нової Пошти.

Дізнайтеся більше про Стейки Карпат на нашому сайті!

Name: Bizim Kasap
Description:
Bizim Kasap, 1951 yılından beri kesintisiz hizmet veren, tamamen kendi çiftliğinde yetiştirdiği hayvanlarla ve yerli ürünlerle müşterilerine özenle seçilmiş et ürünleri sunan bir iş yeridir. Nesilden nesile aktarılan geleneğiyle, sofralarınıza güvenli ve lezzetli bir deneyim sunuyoruz.

Gururla belirtmek isteriz ki, çiftliğimizdeki hayvanları özenle yetiştiriyor ve her bir ürünümüzü en kaliteli malzemelerle hazırlıyoruz. Gıda güvenliğini ön planda tutarak, sizlere en sağlıklı ve lezzetli et ürünlerini sunmayı ilke edindik.

Bizim Kasap, haftanın her günü hizmetinizde! Geleneksel olan kuzuneli sobada sucuk ve bazlama, dededen kalma bir lezzet mirası olarak sizleri bekliyor. Kış mevsimlerinin en güzel anı olan bu lezzeti, bizimle keşfedin!

Sadece Kızılcahamam sınırlarında değil, artık tüm Türkiye'ye online gönderimle ulaşıyoruz. Web sitemizden yapacağınız alışverişle, kalite ve lezzetin kapılarını açın. Bizimle birlikte çiftlikten sofraya uzanan bu lezzet yolculuğuna katılın. Güvenli alışverişin keyfini Bizim Kasap ayrıcalığıyla yaşayın!"

The birds are fed with natural, grain-based diets, and the company takes pride in offering transparency by inviting visitors to tour its facilities and observe its production processes firsthand. This dedication to excellence positions Konsoni as a major player in the food industry.

Name: Maelca
Description:
En Maelca solo trabajamos con granjas y agricultores locales, y elaboramos nuestros propios productos para garantizar la máxima calidad.
La calidad de nuestros productos es muy importante, por este motivo contamos con la colaboración de proveedores de proximidad que nos proporcionan la máxima seguridad para nuestras carnes. El control de calidad continua en nuestro obrador donde garantizamos una óptima elaboración de todos los productos, manteniendo nuestros valores y compromisos.

¿Por qué hacemos la elaboración?

Lo que nos diferencia de otras empresas es que en Maelca optamos por elaborar diariamente los productos en nuestras instalaciones homologadas por la CEE, garantizando así la máxima calidad.

Nuestro compromiso es ofrecer a nuestros clientes productos lo más saludables posibles, por eso muchos de ellos no llevan aditivos añadidos, lo cual nos permite ofrecer un producto fresco y natural.

Nuestra historia:

Un proyecto que empezó 1985
En octubre de 1985, Mario García, un joven emprendedor decidió abrir una empresa de carne y productos elaborados al por mayor, todo un reto que sigue vivo con la misma intensidad a día de hoy.

En noviembre de 2005 inauguramos una pequeña tienda en nuestras instalaciones situadas en el polígono industrial de Gavà.

Finalmente en agosto de 2016 ampliamos nuestra tienda haciendo de ella un espacio acogedor donde poder comprar con tranquilidad todas nuestras carnes y productos elaborados.

Name: Genusswelt Klink GmbH
Description:
Bei uns steht der Genuss im Mittelpunkt – ehrlich, handwerklich, sinnlich. Wir glauben, dass wahre Qualität nicht nur schmeckt, sondern berührt. Deshalb setzen wir auf kompromisslose Exzellenz: vom Ursprung unserer Zutaten bis zur letzten Prise Gewürz. Jedes Detail zählt. 

Wir denken Metzgerei neu: kreativ, zeitgemäß und verantwortungsvoll. Unsere Kundschaft ist unser Kompass. Wir hören zu, spüren Trends auf und entwickeln Angebote, die nicht nur sättigen, sondern begeistern. Denn unsere Produkte sind mehr als Lebensmittel – sie sind Ausdruck von Genusskultur. 

Wir schaffen Geschmackserlebnisse, die im Gedächtnis bleiben. Mit Herz, Handwerk und Hingabe laden wir dazu ein, jeden Bissen zu zelebrieren. Für uns ist guter Geschmack kein Zufall – sondern gelebte Haltung.

Name: Vermont Livestock Slaughter & Processing
Description:

Whether you are a private individual with a few heads each year or a commercial producer who requires multiple animals processed on a regular basis, our professional and experienced staff are dedicated to giving each of you the personal attention you deserve.

Name: Juicy shank
Description:
Juicy shank is a specialized store selling the finest types of luxury meat. We have the best types of imported meat such as Wagyu and Black Angus with its different cuts such as ribeye and tenderloin. 
Also, we sell the local meat that is slaughtered and skinned on a daily basis in the official slaughterhouse of the municipality.

Name: ABIS Group
Description:
ABIS Group is a leading livestock processing and agribusiness company driving the transformation of Africa’s meat industry through innovation, quality, and sustainability.

With operations in Lagos and an upcoming fully automated facility in Abuja, ABIS Group specializes in the production and processing of beef, poultry, goat meat, and fish, ensuring food safety, traceability, and Halal compliance across the value chain.

Our mission is to deliver nutritious, affordable, and high-quality protein to households and businesses across Africa while creating thousands of jobs and supporting local farmers through modern infrastructure and training programs.

From farm to fork, we are building a safer, more efficient, and sustainable future for Africa’s livestock industry.

Name: Gandolfi Viandes
Description:
La marque Gandolfi Viandes, située à Bastia en Corse, a été fondée en 2013. Le métier de la viande est une histoire de famille depuis 4 générations pour François-Antoine Gandolfi, le gérant l'entreprise. En 2018, la société de production Sodigav à Bastia a été rejointe par une deuxième entreprise, Sogavia, à Ajaccio. Au départ, Gandolfi Viandes était une entreprise de découpe et de vente de viandes de boucherie et de volaille (bœuf, porc, poulet, agneau). Avec ses 45 collaborateurs, elle produit désormais aussi des produits élaborés. Au fil des ans, d'autres marchés se sont ouverts : Gandolfi fournit aujourd'hui ses produits aux grandes surfaces alimentaires, boucheries traditionnelles, ainsi qu’aux hôtels-restaurants et à la restauration collective.

2 sites de production à Bastia et Ajaccio.

Name: UPG-Invest LLC
Description:
Who we are:

We are the biggest producers and suppliers of premium quality turkey meat in Ukraine. 
Based in western part of Ukraine,  UPG-Invest was found in 2002 and now exports its products across UK, Europe and Middle East. We are located closely to the borders with Romania, Hungary, Slovakia, Poland.

What we do: 

Our company provides a full production cycle: turkey farming, slaughtering, cutting, meat processing and manufacturing of deep processed turkey meat products. In addition, to provide the best quality turkey meat (catalogue attached). We produce our own high quality feeds for farm animals and poultry. 
In 2022 we launched in our soya processing factory.

Why would you want to work with us:

We are looking to build partnership with our customers and that is why we are ready to work according to your needs. The product can be delivered chilled or frozen and the packaging and branding can be changed if requested. Our  sales team  have long experience in international poultry market and monitor global prices to ensure best deals for our partners.
