Name: Rosewood Ranches - Texas Raised Wagyu Beef
LANGSIDE MEATS
Description:
Langside is owned by the Prinsloo family and situated in Komani (Queenstown),
Eastern Cape, where the family has passionately been farming and producing top
quality grassfed (otherwise known as veldt fed) beef and lamb, since 1965.
The family has established the Langside brand as a reputable and honest brand,
totally transparent in their natural farming methods as well as the tracking of each

product.

The animals on the Langside farms are ethically sourced, raised and treated with the

respect they deserve. We believe in transparency in traceability.
The Prinsloo family is adamant to supply South African families with healthy,
delicious tasting grass-, veldt- and pasture fed beef and lamb, making a difference in
terms of the standards of the Grassfed beef and lamb industry. We are the proud
suppliers of the finest quality grass fed beef and lamb to selective wholesalers,
butcheries, delis, and restaurants throughout South Africa. We also offer an online store for orders direct to the public.

Name: MARS MEAT
Description: Mars Meat is the company which provides substitute meat or alternative meat, with right nutrition and no slaughtering of animal.

Name: Franz Ostermeier GmbH
Description:
Tradition und Innovation verbunden zu echter Spitzenqualität – hierfür steht die Franz Ostermeier GmbH seit 1938. Das Familienunternehmen fertigt leckere Fleisch- und Wurstwaren für jeden Geschmack, vom Kalorienbewussten über den herzhaften Genießer bis zum Knabber-Freund.

Unser Sortiment umfasst vielfältige Salami– und Schinkenspezialitäten, knackige Würstchen und viele weitere original bayerische Schmankerl wie Leberkäse, Lyoner oder erfrischende Tellersülzen.

Zu unserem Kundenstamm zählen der Lebensmitteleinzelhandel ebenso wie Discounter, Metzgereien und Sie als anspruchsvoller Kunde, der weiß, dass Gutes einfach besser schmeckt.

Wir garantieren Ihnen gleichbleibende Spitzenqualität an jedem einzelnen Tag im Jahr. Unerlässlich hierfür: die sorgfältige Auswahl unserer Rohstoffe, traditionelle Rezepturen verbunden mit modernster Verfahrenstechnik, erfahrene und bestens ausgebildete Mitarbeiter aus der Region sowie unser schonender Umgang mit der Umwelt und ihren natürlichen Ressourcen.

Gesetzliche Vorgaben in Punkto Hygiene und Lebensmittelsicherheit sind für uns Mindeststandards, die wir durch externe, unabhängige Sachverständige regelmäßig überprüfen lassen. Denn unsere Qualitätsphilosophie ist für uns Versprechen und Ansporn zugleich.

Name: ORET
Description:
1950'de İzmir Mezbaha Sucukları adıyla üretim faaliyetlerine başlayan firmamız, 1988'den itibaren ORET Et Ürünleri adı altında faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir. Torbalı'daki modern tesislerimizde, günlük 20 ton üretim kapasitemizle Türkiye'nin önde gelen et ürünleri firmalarından biri olarak yer alıyoruz. ISO 9001:2000 kalite yönetim sistemini sürdürerek, HACCP Belgesi ve HELAL Sertifikası'na sahip ürünler üretiyoruz. Müşteri memnuniyetini ve kaliteyi odağımıza alarak, sektördeki lider konumumuzu daha da güçlendirmeyi hedefliyoruz.

Kaliteyi ve insan odaklı yaklaşımımızla, Tarım, Sağlık ve Çevre Bakanlıklarının yönetmeliklerinde istenen tüm hijyenik şartlara sahip tesislerimizde üretim yapıyoruz. Dana, piliç ve hindi çeşitlerini içeren salam, sucuk, sosis ve jambon ürünleri başta olmak üzere, hamburger köftesi, döner, nugget, schnitzel ve dondurulmuş gıda ürünleriyle geniş bir ürün yelpazesi sunuyoruz. Sıfır hata prensibiyle çalışarak, müşterilerimizin beklentilerini en üst düzeyde karşılamayı amaçlıyoruz. 70 yılı aşkın süredir Türk halkına sağlıklı, güvenilir ve üstün kaliteli et ürünleri sunmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.

Name: F&G MEATS
Description: F&G Meats is a trusted distributor of premium proteins, providing the finest cuts of beef to Florida’s top restaurants, hotels, and country clubs. We’re committed to quality and consistency. We aim to change the foodservice industry’s standard of cheap, low-quality ingredients for restaurants by bringing healthy, high-quality products back to the table.

Name: Fermele Moraru
Description: Suntem o afacere de familie de lângă Vaslui cu aproape 30 de ani de experiență în agricultură și în creșterea responsabilă a păsărilor. Suntem o comunitate de oameni pasionați. Suntem crescători, ingineri agricoli, veterinari și tehnicieni specializați care s-au adunat in jurul unei viziuni comune: crearea de produse de calitate prin grija față de păsările din fermele noastre.

Name: Maison Arka
Description:
Bienvenue à la maison du cochon, ici il est roi ! 

Arka (coffre à sel en basque) est un lieu atypique au cœur du village de Sare. Un atelier de fabrication, un séchoir, une boutique et un bistrot gourmand réunit dans la même maison. 

Artisan charcutier, salaisonnier, conserveur, cuisinier, les multiples compétences et savoir-faire nous permettent de maîtriser l'ensemble de la chaîne de production depuis l'abattage, et également de sublimer chaque partie du cochon.

Nous faisons partie de la filière du porc basque Kintoa en tant qu'artisan transformateur et nous sommes fiers de valoriser l'une des 6 races rustiques françaises qui bénéficie de l'Appellation d'Origine Protégée pour le jambon sec et la viande fraîche.

Name: La dispensa della torre
Description:
La Dispensa Della Torre
Azienda toscana specializzata nella lavorazione e distribuzione di prodotti mono‑porzionati abbattuti, pensati per i professionisti della ristorazione che non vogliono rinunciare a gusto e qualità.

Chi siamo
Nata nel cuore della Toscana, uniamo tradizione artigianale e tecnologie all’avanguardia per offrire soluzioni “ready‑to‑cook” che esaltino le migliori carni italiane. Siamo l’unica azienda in Europa certificata per la produzione di tartare di selvaggina, garanzia di standard igienico‑sanitari eccellenti e di un sapore inconfondibile.


La nostra gamma
Con oltre 100 prodotti, tutti:
	•	Mono‑porzionati: dosi calibrate per eliminare gli sprechi
	•	Abbattuti a −50°C: shelf‑life fino a 24 mesi, conservazione ottimale di aroma e consistenza
	•	Categorie principali:
	•	Tartare di manzo, cinghiale, cervo, capriolo e daino
	•	Carpacci pronti all’uso, in mono‑dose di manzo e selvaggina
	•	Burger gourmet e tagliate porzionate

I vantaggi per il tuo ristorante
	•	Massima efficienza in cucina: preparazioni rapide, tempi di servizio ridotti
	•	Controllo costi: zero sprechi grazie alle porzioni singole
	•	Qualità costante: tracciabilità completa e certificazioni HACCP
	•	Flessibilità di menu: un catalogo ampio per idee sempre nuove


Porta in tavola l’eccellenza toscana, semplifica l’organizzazione della tua cucina e sorprendi i tuoi clienti con piatti di alta gamma, perfetti in ogni stagione.
Contattaci per ricevere il catalogo completo e scoprire la prova gratuita dei nostri prodotti!

Name: TERRE DE GALLIE

Διαθέτει ιδιόκτητο Σφαγείο και κέντρο διανομής κρέατος στον Κερασώνα Φιλιππιάδας και μονάδα επεξεργασίας και τυποποίησης κρέατος και αλλαντικών. Name: MAKH Trading Projects Private Limited
Description:
MAK Trading Private Limited today is a highly diversified group with operations spanning a vast geographical landscape. Spearheaded by the retail division, the Group has interest in Imports & Exports, Trading of Agro-Meat, Gold Trading, EV-Electrical Vehicles, Steel, Rail Bus Consultant & Infrastructure Project Developers within Construction. A true follower of ethical business practices, the Group is a key partner in the development of the community.

Under the long experience we have started our sister concern company M/s. MAKH Trading Private Limited for the Supply, Export of Halal Fresh Frozen Buffalo Meat Boneless to cater the supply to international market. We are proud to maintain fair and cordial business relationship with all our esteemed, traditional buyers globally from GCC, Middleast, Africa & Latin America.

Today, we are a leading frozen meat exporter, supplier & we recognized for the quality assurance, corporate governance and able to understand and meets the clients requirement. We do supply customizedly keeping in mind every cuts proper and packed as per the ISLAMIC values.

We welcome all our esteemed clients to collaborate with us. Also, we build strong fruitful business relationship on long term basis by considering valuable business partner as one of the reputed supplier as well.

Our production team, engineers are well educated to understand any client requirement and have strong coordination with butchers in end factory for processing, distribution and export.

Name: Cornelius GmbH
Description:
Die Cornelius GmbH mit Sitz in Hockenheim gehört zu den führenden Produzenten von Pfälzer Wurstspezialitäten. Die Kernkompetenz des mittelständischen Unternehmens liegt in der Herstellung der traditionellen Pfälzer Leberwurst.  Unter der Leitung von Peter Cornelius ist das Unternehmen mit Pfälzer Leberwurst Spezialitäten bundesweit im Lebensmittelhandel, Discount sowie im gut sortierten Fachhandel vertreten. Ein eigener Werksverkauf punktet mit vielen regionalen Spezialitäten.  

Peter Cornelius, der das Unternehmen heute in dritter Generation führt, setzt auf Tradition, Regionalität und Qualität ohne Kompromisse. Die Tradition spiegelt sich wider in den Wurstspezialitäten, allen voran der Pfälzer Leberwurst, die nach klassischer Rezeptur hergestellt und in Sortimentsvarianten angeboten wird. So gibt’s die Pfälzer Leberwurst im Natur- und Kunstdarm, geräuchert und ungeräuchert, fettreduziert und bio. Ein regional geprägtes Sortiment bietet u.a. Saumagen, Schwartenmagen, Leberknödel und Leberrolle. Typisch Cornelius ist auch die Zwiebelwurst gekocht, die Bauernblutwurst, die Kalbsleberwurst und die feine Delikatessleberwurst.  

Die gleichbleibend hohe Qualität garantieren der Einkauf und die Verarbeitung hochwertiger Rohstoffe, die transparente Produktion in kleinen Chargen, der vertrauensvolle und langjährige Kontakt zu Zulieferern, der direkte Draht zu Kunden sowie die über drei Generationen gewachsene familiäre und respektvolle Unternehmenskultur.  

Bis heute werden Tradition und Werte der Familie Cornelius gepflegt und bewahrt. Gleichzeitig zeichnet sich das Unternehmen durch zukunftsweisende und nachhaltige Strategien aus. Dazu gehören u.a.  kontinuierliche Investitionen in modernste Technologien und erneuerbare Energien.

Description:
Close to nature we love real flavors
Our site in Ivó /Izvoarele, located at the foot of the Madarasi Harghita Mountains, is highly influenced by the natural conditions of the mountains, clean water and air.

One of the biggest challenges of the 21st century, that is, to bring suitable premium quality food from a controlled place, from a clean source, using high technology and environmentally friendly methods, to the table of the Dear Consumer.

The Berke Group set this goal when it modernized its game processing plant, which it acquired in 2019, and as a result of three years of construction and modernization in one of the most natural locations in Central and Eastern Europe, incorporating the most innovative processing and food technologies and using natural raw materials, established one of the most modern processing companies in Romania.

The central plant of our company, which deals with the processing of game, lamb, mangalitza and pork, is located in a picturesque place in the heart of Transylvania, in the settlement of Ivó, at the foot of Harghita.

Meat processing, production, and packaging of the finished product are realized in a renovated and newly built environment thanks to the dedicated work of nearly 40 trained and experienced professionals.

Name: Avvenire Srl
Description:
Nata nel 1978 a Cartura (Padova) con il nome Pollo dell’Avvenire, l’azienda è da sempre specializzata nella lavorazione e distribuzione di carni avicole fresche. Fin dalle origini, l’obiettivo è stato chiaro: portare sulle tavole degli italiani un prodotto genuino, lavorato con cura artigianale e nel rispetto delle più alte norme igienico-sanitarie.	

In oltre 40 anni di attività, l’azienda ha costruito una solida reputazione nel panorama avicolo nazionale, collaborando con importanti gruppi della GDO e con una rete fidelizzata di negozi specializzati e ristoratori. La capacità di coniugare tradizione e innovazione ha permesso di distinguersi per l’elevata qualità dei prodotti e la flessibilità delle lavorazioni.	

Nel novembre 2024, l’ingresso in Delta Group Agroalimentare ha segnato l’inizio di un nuovo capitolo, rafforzando le sinergie industriali e garantendo una filiera ancora più integrata e sostenibile.

LA NOSTRA MISSION
La nostra missione è offrire ai consumatori un prodotto avicolo fresco, sicuro e tracciabile, lavorato con passione e secondo i più alti standard qualitativi. Ogni giorno ci impegniamo a garantire freschezza, trasparenza e rispetto per il benessere animale, promuovendo una cultura alimentare consapevole.

LA NOSTRA VISION
Vogliamo essere un punto di riferimento nel settore avicolo per qualità, sostenibilità e innovazione. Guardiamo al futuro puntando su tecnologie all’avanguardia, processi a basso impatto ambientale e una sempre maggiore attenzione alle esigenze del consumatore moderno. Il nostro obiettivo è crescere responsabilmente, contribuendo allo sviluppo di un’agroalimentare etico e sostenibile.

Name: Viltgrossisten
Description:
Välkommen till Viltgrossisten – direkt från skogen till köket & krogen!

Vi är ett företag med hjärtat i den svenska naturen och en passion för viltkött och de unika smaker som skogen erbjuder. Vår resa började redan för många år sedan när min pappa började jaga, och sedan dess har viltkött varit en självklar del på vårt middagsbord. Idag jagar vi tillsammans och delar en genuin passion för jakt och för att ta vara på skogens råvaror.

Hos oss hittar du främst viltkött, men även andra naturens delikatesser som bär, svamp och lokala specialiteter – allt noga utvalt och hanterat med respekt för djur och natur. Vi vill erbjuda våra kunder en möjlighet att uppleva den rena och genuina smaken av Sverige, oavsett om det är i hemmaköket eller på favoritrestaurangen.

Med vår slogan, "Direkt från skogen till köket & krogen", strävar vi efter att minska avståndet mellan naturen och tallriken. Vi tror på att leverera kvalitativa produkter som både gynnar hållbarhet och erbjuder en smakupplevelse utöver det vanliga.

En OILASKO BERRIAK entendemos la distribución como un servicio, no solo como un suministro. Por eso apostamos por una relación cercana con nuestros clientes, un equipo humano con experiencia en el sector y una logística eficiente que asegura entregas fiables y ajustadas a cada canal de venta.

Actualmente, la empresa se encuentra en un proceso de evolución y digitalización, incorporando nuevos sistemas, procesos y una visión más orientada a la eficiencia, el dato y la mejora continua, sin perder la esencia de un negocio construido desde el trabajo diario y el compromiso con el cliente.

Nuestro objetivo es claro: ser un socio de confianza para profesionales que buscan un proveedor serio, flexible y con capacidad de adaptación a un mercado cada vez más exigente.

Name: El Sentir de Braña
Description:
**¿Qué hacemos en El Sentir de Braña?**

Venta online de carne de Ternera Asturiana IGP. 

Vendemos packs con diferentes piezas de la ternera para disfrutar de diferentes sabores y texturas.

Hay fechas de entrega preestablecidas (1 o 2 al mes). Las terneras y su crecimiento natural deciden las fechas... no nosotros!

Los pedidos se preparan tras el despiece en la misma sala de frío. Se envasan al vacío pequeños paquetes que sean manejables tanto para el consumo en fresco como para congelar y mantener una perfecta conservación.

Se recibe el pack al día siguiente del despiece, por lo que la carne no puede estar más fresca y sabrosa. No pasa de mano en mano ni días en neveras.

La cadena de frio no se pierde en ningún momento desde el despiece hasta la entrega del pack.

**¿Qué nos diferencia?**

Las terneras alimentadas de manera tradicional, natural y al aire libre.

0% piensos artificiales.

Las terneras se alimentan los primeros meses de leche natural de la madre hasta su destete.

Priorizamos ante todo el bienestar animal

Creemos en la ganadería extensiva donde los animales viven en libertad.

Contribuimos con el desarrollo del medio rural ofreciendo una carne de alta calidad, saludable y natural.

Creemos firmemente que si las terneras comen sano, nosotros comemos sano.

Nuestra carne tiene un sabor auténtico, como el de antes.

Sabor a tradición.

Mountain River is a boutique brand recognized for quality, innovation and vision. 

We believe raising animals in nature’s image is not only the right thing to do, but it can reverse climate change and create a better future.

Name: La Futura Salumi
Description:
The beginning of "La Futura Salumi" history goes back to 1951 in an old farmhouse situated in Salvirola, a small town plunged into the green countryside of Crema. "La Futura Salumi” has been producing high quality salamis for over 70 years and still by following the original old recipes. Four successive generations have been managing the company ever since it was born.
 
One peculiar feature of our products is the way salamis are tied, completely tied by hand. Such a procedure, combined with our 100% Italian meat and natural casings, gives to our salami constant quality and authenticity in time. 
 
“La Futura”, the name chosen by the founder Papà Piero, means “Future”. With such a name he wanted to inspire people to always look at the future with optimism, characteristic that still leads the company every single day.

Name: PT. Aromaduta Rasapirma
Description:

The company has been serving the customers nationwide for three decades. The company currently employs more than 300 people. They are divided into: production, shipping, quality control, administration and accounting.

PT. Aromaduta Rasaprima (Aroma) hold the Halal Certificate from Halal Product Assurance Agency based on a written halal fatwa or determination of product halalness by the Indonesian Council of Ulama (MUI) Bali to ensure that our food products meet the Islamic law. The certified foods include all of our meat products that made from beef and poultry.

With up to date Standard of FSMS and HACCP System : ISO/TS 22002-1:2009, ISO 22000:2018, HACCP 2020 : CAC RCP 1-1969, Rev.4, 2003 (SNI CAC/RCP 1:2011) and PerMenPerin RI No.75/M-IND/PER/7/2010 that we achieved since March 2011, we guarantee that our products has meet the national and international regulation in safety, qualities and hygienic standards.

Name: Meat Exotica
Description:
MeatExotica is an internet solution company guided by the principles and driven by a mission to cater to the growing number of exotic meat connoisseurs in India. Our curated collection of Exotic Meats brings the same global experience to our customers who are looking to take a walk on the wilder side of life.

Ducks, Rabbits, Japanese Quails, Turkeys or our very own Kadaknath Chicken or even the Country Chicken, look no further and we have it all ! We consistently strive and are committed to offer the best quality of freshest and exotic meat products to our customers.

We at Meat Exotica are the pioneers when it comes to serving stellar quality Exotic Meats with unparalleled taste and uncompromised quality.

With our venture we intend to solve couple of challenges. we want to bring the global, world-class and premium culinary experience to our customers in their own homes.

Firstly, The conventional meat industry is dangerously heading towards creating unhealthy consumers and that needs to change. Whether we call it as mass production or consumerism or industrial animal agriculture, concentrated animal feeding operations or factory farms, the fact remains that what is good for operational efficiency is most often in conflict with what’s good for the health of a consumer and that of the planet itself.

Secondly, our signature style of being honest and ethical, we see a market need and want to fill the gap.

We want to take up this challenge and want to stir the status quo. We are driven to do things differently in order to make significant impact for our customers, in our industry and for ourselves.

Meat Exotica is a Bangalore based organisation with ambitious plans to expand across India. Soon you will find our products available across the location and in near future all over the country and for sale in select specialty retailers and grocers. 

For partnerships, alliances and for enquiries DM us...

Description:

The company is nowadays renowned for the quality of its products and the efficiency of its meat sales services, being able to reach both the Italian and international countries, thus exporting the Italian excellence abroad. 
We are specialized in the processing of pork meat and sows’ half-carcasses for the production of salami; the passion and commitment that we have been putting into our work for over 30 years make our company one of the most notable in the industry of pork meat processing.

All SANTI F.LLI personnel is well trained and specialized in the production of pork meat cuts through the unwrapping of sows’ half-carcasses.

We are also specialized in supplying pork meat cuts for the salami processing. In our headquarters based in Treviso we work with cutting-edge equipment surrounded by a modern environment for the storage and selection of meats.

Name: cic carni
Description:
Da 40 anni il motore del nostro lavoro è la passione: passione per la tradizione abruzzese, passione per la qualità, passione per la ricerca e l'innovazione.

Da una storia familiare agli inizi degli anni 80, ad un'azienda ultra moderna e competitiva: siamo Cic Carni srl, lavoriamo carni e produciamo salumi ed arrosticini.

Fedeltà ai metodi tradizionali, unita alle più avanzate tecnologie, fanno della nostra azienda una realtà dove qualità e freschezza sono una garanzia.

Name: Atlantis International for trading
Description:
Atlantis International, company for import and export is an Egyptian joint stock company specialized in the production of fresh meat and its products. 
The company started its work in the Egyptian market in 2012, with the aim of importing, exporting, distributing, deboning, sterilizing, preparing and packing meat, whether refrigerated with a shelf life of 6 days, or a validity of 14 days, or a vacuum packaging with a shelf life of 49 days, or a vacuum packaging and protection gas with a shelf life of 70 days, in order to fill the internal domestic gap, the gap in the Arab countries market in chilled meat, as well as the production of high-quality meat products.
We offer high quality products for various types of meat cuts and carcasses of Egyptian birds, meat products and canned food.
Our products are divided into 4 sections: 
1.	White meat
2.	Red meat
3.	Meat products
4.	Canned food
1)	White meat is consisting of (Egyptian local pigeons - Egyptian local ducks - Egyptian local chicks - Egyptian local turkeys - Egyptian local rabbits - stuffed pigeons) 
It is heat treatment according to the specifications of the Arabian Gulf.
Shelf life is 12 months from the date of massacre.

2)	Red meat: deboning, sterilizing, preparing and packing meat, whether refrigerated with a shelf life of 6 days, or a shelf life of 14 days, or a vacuum packaging with a shelf life of 49 days, or a vacuum packaging and protection gas with a shelf life of 70 days. 

3)	Meat products: All our meat products are made of fresh local meat with a shelf life of 3 months from the date of production, which is (beef burger – shish kofta – rice kofta – rice mombar – oriental sausage – hawawshi).

4)	Canned food:
Without preservatives, ready to eat with a shelf life of 18 months from the production.
Date.
Handling and storing at a temperature not exceeding 25°C.

Name: General International Food Services L.L.C
Description:
COMPANY PROFILE

General International Food Services was established in 2014 to process and trade in foodstuff. We first started our activity by fresh chilled chickens and within the short span of time we managed to get the trust of large number of customers and started our expansion to meet our customers’ requirements and to cover the market in proper way.
We are committed to provide high quality and market competitive prices which help us to get our customers trust.

QUALITY

Our company is ISO 22000 and HACCP certified. 
The food safety management system ensure food safety by determining the factors that risks its safety whether biological, chemical or physical factors, to determine the critical points which should be controlled to ensure the food safety.
The quality of our products is the key that distinguishes us from others because we put quality in the following major aspects:

1.	Hygienic Standards
Dealing with food is a very sensitive matter and thus we committed to provide continuous training to our staff to ensure dealing with food in safe and hygienic way.
It is a known fact that chicken is the most sensitive and perishable food and spoiled in a very short time if infected with bacteria. We deal with chickens with the most safety standards and use natural ingredients to preserve it in addition to special food grade packaging materials in safe and hygienic way. 

2.	Products Selection Standard
Selection of the source of product is very critical and we deal only with the best suppliers who provide us the proof that the product is Halal and produced under Islamic rights and high safety and quality standards. 

3.	Preserving Original Taste
We are very well aware that the frozen chicken loose much water and so good taste and become very dry. We treat this by adding natural preservatives and ingredients and get back the chicken original delicious taste as if fresh chickens.

Description:
AgroForce Prestation est une société spécialisée dans la prestation de service en désossage, parage et opérations techniques de transformation de viandes (porc, bœuf, volaille).
Notre mission : apporter aux sites industriels des équipes professionnelles, stables et performantes, capables de renforcer la qualité et le rendement des ateliers.

Forte de 15 années d’expérience terrain dans les ateliers de découpe et d’une solide expertise en recrutement spécialisé, AgroForce Prestation a été créée pour répondre à un enjeu central du secteur : la pénurie de main-d’œuvre qualifiée et la nécessité d’assurer une performance constante dans un environnement exigeant.

Dès son lancement, l’entreprise a su gagner la confiance de ses premiers partenaires. En une semaine seulement, plus de 20 professionnels opérationnels ont été déployés sur des chantiers clients, confirmant la pertinence d’une structure dédiée, organisée et orientée résultat.

Nos engagements :
• Qualité du geste, précision et sécurité
• Stabilité des équipes et continuité de production
• Encadrement présent sur site pour un suivi quotidien
• Adaptation aux volumes, aux exigences et aux contraintes du client
• Process internes structurés pour garantir la fiabilité du service

Nos prestations :
• Désossage et parage (porc, bœuf, volaille)
• Renfort d’équipes sur lignes de découpe
• Accompagnement technique sur postes clés
• Encadrement et pilotage opérationnel
• Intégration, suivi et formation des équipes

AgroForce Prestation s’adresse aux abattoirs, ateliers de découpe, industriels de la viande et groupes agroalimentaires recherchant une solution sérieuse, professionnelle et durable.

Notre objectif est simple : contribuer directement à la performance de vos ateliers en plaçant la qualité, la stabilité et l’humain au cœur du service.

 Pour toute demande d’information ou pour étudier un besoin spécifique, contactez-nous directement via LinkedIn ou par message.

Name: GustoBel
Description:
GustoBel is een Belgisch vleesverwerkingsbedrijf met specialisatie in het wild vlees, maar GustoBel is meer dan wild alleen.

Elke dag brengen we een stukje natuur op uw bord!


In 1971 startten vader Fernand Vermeersch en moeder Nicole een kleine beenhouwerij aan de rand van Sint-Michiels.

Zijn bezoeken aan de Ardennen brachten hem op het idee om groot wild in Vlaanderen te verkopen. Dat was meteen de oprichting van Wildhandel Vermeersch in 1973.

Als broers –Kristof en Didier– zijn we als het ware tussen het wild opgegroeid en na jaren in het bedrijf gewerkt te hebben, namen we eind jaren ’90 de fakkel over.

Wildhandel Vermeersch werd Wild Vermeersch en er werd toen al volop geïnvesteerd in groei door innovatie en klantgerichtheid.

De naam van de vennootschap werd in 2024 gewijzigd in GustoBel, omdat we meer aanbieden dan wild alleen.

Het wildmerk ‘Wild Vermeersch’ blijft het onbetwiste vlaggenschip. Daarnaast worden nu ook andere vleesproducten aangeboden zodat onze klanten ook buiten het wildseizoen van onze topproducten en service kunnen genieten.

We also specialize in custom processing of beef and pork, catering to both farmers and individuals with specific needs. Our skilled team ensures every cut is processed with the utmost precision, meeting your exact specifications and guaranteeing satisfaction.

Legacy Meat Co. was founded on the principles of resilience and service, rooted in our veteran ownership. We strive to build lasting relationships with our customers, grounded in mutual trust and a shared passion for quality food. Our connection to the community of Flora and its rich agricultural heritage inspires us to contribute positively through our services and products.

More than just a meat company, Legacy Meat Co. represents a fusion of tradition and innovation. Here, quality is paramount, and every customer is part of the family. Experience the legacy of excellence with us, and join in celebrating the depth of flavor and community spirit that sets our offerings apart. Welcome to Legacy Meat Co., where we deliver on our promise of excellence.

Name: Bertoni Carni S.r.l.
Description:
Fornitore di numerosi marchi tra i piu' importanti della GDO italiana, Bertoni Carni S.r.l. è una delle principali realtà per la macellazione e il sezionamento nel settore cunicolo.

Nasce nel 1997 in un luogo ricco di storia e tradizione culinaria, al centro dell'Appennino Tosco-Emiliano. Qui la famiglia Bertoni, già in possesso di un piccolo macello fondato negli anni ?70, inizia un processo di innovazione costante, con forte impegno sul fronte delle tematiche di qualità, sicurezza alimentare e sostenibilità.

Nel corso degli anni l'azienda ha continuato ad investire per aggiornare i propri processi di macellazione e sezionamento, arrivando nel 2018 ad introdurre sul mercato un prodotto a Peso Minimo Garantito.

Name: Jiraffa.kz
Description:
Компания Jiraffa – это, в первую очередь, высококачественный и безопасный продукт и надежный профессиональный партнер для отрасли HoReCa и частных клиентов в Казахстане
Поставки
За 14 лет накоплен серьезный опыт поставок высококачественной говядины из США, Австралии и Новой Зеландии. Мы гордимся своими доверительными отношениями с заводами, производящими убой, разделку и упаковку продукции. И тем, что участвуем в международных конференциях и семинарах, постоянно повышая профессиональный уровень.
Безопасность
Одним из главных вопросов, которому мы уделяем наибольшее внимание – это безопасность. Наша компания имеет собственный, отвечающий всем требованиям, ветеринарный склад для хранения охлажденной и замороженной продукции. Этот склад внесен в государственный реестр ветеринарных складов. В штате компании работает ветеринарный врач. За эти годы мы прошли множество проверок самого серьезного уровня и не получили не одного отрицательного результата.
Логистика
95% нашей продукции прилетает к нам самолетами. Логистика для нас имеет приоритетное значение. На всем протяжении следования груза мы отслеживаем температурный режим. Наш норматив- это 4 часа от прилета до склада. Обработка заявок и доставка продукции в городе Алматы занимает не более 2 часов (если клиенты не высказывают иных пожеланий). Наши партнеры в Казахстане: Нур-Султан (Астана), Чимкент, Актау, Атырау и другие - всегда спокойны - в течение 24 часов они получат нашу продукцию для своего ресторана.
Мастер-классы
В 2015 году мы создали и проводим программы обучения для шеф поваров Казахстана. Это -10 семинаров (мастер – классов) в год, на которых знакомим профессионалов отрасли с новыми отрубами, поступающими на рынок Казахстана. Их проводят именитые шеф повара из разных стан мира, которых мы тщательно отбираем согласно тематике предстоящего мероприятия. Несколько лет мы успешно сотрудничаем с USMEF в области продвижения и создания лояльного отношения к нашей продукции среди населения Казахстана.

Name: Delwingz
Description:
Tired of the stingy smell, questionable hygiene, and uncertainty of traditional meat shops? So were we! Delwingz, born in the vibrant heart of Pink city Jaipur, is on a mission to transform how India gets its protein. We're not just selling Poultry meats and Seafood we're delivering freshness, health, and peace of mind straight to your doorstep.

Did you know? A staggering 73% of Indians suffer from protein deficiency. At Delwingz, we believe everyone deserves access to clean, high-quality protein sources to build a healthier, stronger India. We meticulously source, process, and deliver Poultry meats and Seafood so exceptionally clean and fresh, you can skip the washing step and cook with confidence! Our commitment? Pristine hygiene, unmatched freshness, and fueling your wellness journey.

Imagine: 90% of India's meat market operates in the unorganized sector. That means most chicken and fish come from places lacking consistent quality, cold-chain integrity, and basic hygiene standards. Compromised freshness and potential contamination are real concerns.

Convenience Redefined: Skip the chaotic market. Enjoy premium quality protein delivered safely and conveniently to your home.
Choose Delwingz: Choose Confidence. Choose Quality. Choose Freshness.

Name: Geflügelspezialitäten Steinfeld GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
GEFLÜGEL aus gutem Hause

Höchste Geflügelqualität braucht besondere Aufmerksamkeit und wertschätzenden Umgang mit Mensch und Tier. Weil es immer wichtiger wird, zu wissen, was auf den Teller kommt – weil es immer wichtiger wird, zu wissen, wo es herkommt. Darum sind wir hier zuhause. Hier, wo wir unsere Erzeuger beim Namen kennen, weil wir ganz einfach Nachbarn sind. So garantieren wir kurze Wege und vertraute Frische.

Dass wir einander per du sind und uns auf Augenhöhe begegnen, ist für uns selbstverständlich. Unsere Erzeuger sollen sich wohlfühlen. So wie unser Geflügel. Es bekommt besonders viel Platz für Auslauf, besonders gutes Futter und besonders viel Zeit, um gesund zu wachsen. So entsteht Qualität von Anfang an – mit der Wertschätzung gegenüber Tier und Mensch.

Name: Metzgerei Klingler GmbH & Co.KG
Description:
110 Jahre - Metzgerei Klingler in Fellbach.

Wenn ein handwerkliches Familienunternehmen auf ein 110 jähriges Bestehen zurückblicken kann, dann ist das nicht nur eine stolze Zahl und ein äußerst seltenes Ereignis, sondern auch der Beweis für eine bemerkenswerte Familien und Handwerkstradition.

Aus kleinsten Anfängen beginnend, hat stets der Sohn das Handwerk und den Betrieb des Vaters übernommen und weitergeführt. Jetzt in der vierten Generation, ist daraus ein geachtetes und in jeder Hinsicht leistungsfähiges Unternehmen entstanden, das rund 45 Mitarbeiter zählt und in modernsten Produktions- und Verkaufsräumen hochwertige Erzeugnisse herstellt und vertreibt.

Zukunft braucht Herkunft

Unsere handwerkliche Tradition und Berufserfahrung ist heute mit neuesten Erkenntnissen des Metzgerhandwerks und der Nahrungsmittelkunde harmonisch verbunden.

Baltic Smoked
Description: More than 40 types of meat products are made by the company. The company offers chicken meat, pork, turkey, meat rolls, sausages and Latvian kebab (šašliks) for roasting on spits. The products are made only from the best Georgian non frozen meat, ensuring that the produce that ends up at the store isn’t stripped of its defining qualities. Our products excel in that the meat is smoked according to age-old Latvian traditions, using only alder firewood and pure alder chips.

Name: Spice Village Halal Meat & Foods
Description:
At Spice Village Halal Meat & Foods, our journey began over 20 years ago with the opening of our first restaurant, Spice Village. It didn’t take long for our flavourful dishes and warm hospitality to capture the hearts of our community. Thanks to the love and loyalty of our customers, our small idea grew into a beloved name, and today, we proudly operate two bustling restaurants that are always alive with the chatter of regular customers enjoying meals made with passion and care.

As we continued to grow, we faced a challenge that inspired our next step: ensuring the quality and reliability of the meat and ingredients we used in our kitchens. We wanted our chefs to have access to nothing but the best, so we decided to take matters into our own hands and opened a meat factory. This move allowed us to carefully select suppliers who not only adhered to the highest halal standards but also prioritised animal welfare. By partnering with trusted farms and suppliers, we ensured that every cut of meat met our high standards, providing premium-quality ingredients for the dishes our customers have come to love.

Our commitment to quality and excellence didn’t stop there. As our meat factory grew, so did our vision. We began supplying other restaurants and caterers, sharing our dedication to halal excellence far and wide. Yet, through it all, we always felt a pull to reconnect with our roots and the community that started it all. That’s why we decided to open Spice Village Halal Meat & Foods, a butcher shop dedicated to serving our customers directly.

Here, we bring the same passion and commitment from our restaurants into your homes. Our butcher shop offers premium halal meat and ingredients, so you can create delicious, home-cooked meals for your loved ones. Whether you’re preparing a cherished family recipe or trying something new, you can trust that our products are of the highest quality, ethically sourced, and full of flavour.

Name: Heinrich Manten
Description:
Heinrich Manten GmbH & Co. KG is a family-owned meat processing company based in Geldern in the Lower Rhine region of Germany. It is a company that values tradition but is also modern in its management style. Since 1951, we have stood for quality, reliability and responsibility – towards our customers, partners, employees and society.

In 2026, we will celebrate our 75th anniversary – a milestone that stands for continuity, experience and sustainable growth. Over the decades, we have established ourselves as a reliable partner in the slaughtering and cutting of pigs and supply customers at home and abroad with high-quality meat products.

Our processes are IFS-certified and are continuously being developed to ensure the highest standards of food safety, hygiene and transparency. Sustainable practices are just as important to us as treating animals, people and the environment with respect.

Around 500 dedicated employees work hard every day to ensure that we live up to our claim: quality through responsibility.
As part of a strong, family-run group of companies, we combine craftsmanship with modern technology and forward-thinking – for high-quality products, fair partnerships and a secure future.

Name: Hathers Inc
Description:
Premier Meat Processing Plant coming to Delta, CO in Mid 2026

Together, we’re building a future where humane treatment, environmental stewardship, and the well-being of local economies go hand in hand, ensuring a thriving food system for generations to come. We partner with local farmers, ranchers and livestock producers to strengthen the local economy, create jobs, and promote sustainable practices that benefit the entire region. By challenging the status quo of large-scale meat production, we provide consumers with ethically sourced, environmentally conscious products they can trust, while reinvesting in the health and vitality of local communities. 

Hathers currently operates a 428-acre ranch on the Delta/Montrose County line, along Highway 50. With a feedlot capacity of 650 head of feeder calves, Hathers will provide a steady supply of high-quality, ethically raised beef. The company’s mission is to revolutionize the meat industry by creating a sustainable and humane farm-to-table food chain.

Unser Ziel war es, das Engagement und die Leidenschaft von Fleischerei Harold für das Wohl ihrer Tullnerfelder Schweine und die hohe Qualität ihrer Produkte zu vermitteln. Name: Carmangeria Roxana - Romanian Traditional Smoked Meat Products
Description:
We create traditional Romanian, smoked meat products.

Smoking is an art form; lengthy smokes using beechwood at low temperatures harmoniously combine meat, fire and spice. 

What is On Our Menu?

The Meats: 

Smoked ribs, pork breast, kaizer, smoked pork chop, white ham, pork chop, pork pastrami, smoked pork, peasant ham, jellied smoked meat. 

Our local Romanian Delicacies:

 Babicul Of Buzău - Homemade smoked spiced salami
 Pituşcă of  Buzău – Spiced ground meats, similar to hamburger 
 Sausages of  Pituşcă - Traditional spiced meat mix from Babic  
 Sausages from Pleşcoi - Sheep sausages

Carmangeria Roxana is a family business founded in 1994 by Mircea Sandu. With 26 years of experience in meat processing, we have a line of 50 traditional meat products. 

Our mission is to deliver the cleanest meats with authentic taste.

Our vision has always been to create a healthy recipe for our smoked meats, and revive the spirit of Romania's traditional gastronomic delights. 

All of our products are made in our own production and processing circuit, using natural ingredients.  

Even Napoleon Loved Our Meats!

Yes, Napoleon himself stoped in Plescoi, in the region where our store is located today. He was delighted by this amazing meat, which we serve...Babic Salami.

Stop by and give some a try!

  +40 747 536 643

Name: Mali Gıda ve İnş. San. Tic. Ltd. Şti.
Description:
Dönerin yenilikçi ve kaliteli adresi; Dönerci Ali Efendi...

       İstanbul’da altı, Ankara’da bir şubesiyle lezzet tutkunlarına hizmet veren Dönerci Ali Efendi, günde 1 tonu aşkın döner servis ediyor. Kalite, lezzet ve hijyen anlayışıyla öne çıkan Dönerci Ali Efendi, tüm şubelerinde aynı standartlarda hizmet sunuyor. 
       90'lı yıllarda semt pazarlarında döner satılarak temelleri atılan marka, bugün hızla zincirleşme yolunda. 2006 yılında ilk şubesini açan Dönerci Ali Efendi restoranlarında kullanılan etler, Trakya bölgesinin çeşitli noktalarından tek tek seçiliyor. Seçilen etler dinlendirilip marine edildikten sonra tekrar dinlendiriliyor. Etin kalitesine büyük önem verilen Dönerci Ali Efendi'de, hayvanların beslenmesi ve bulundukları yöredeki şartlar araştırılıyor. Genellikle körpe danalar ve genç kuzular seçilerek etin daha lezzetli olması sağlanıyor. Etlerin sadece belirli bölümleri dönerde kullanılıyor. Lezzet ve hijyene büyük önem verilen Dönerci Ali Efendi şubelerinde, kullanılan temizlik maddeleri de büyük bir özenle seçiliyor. 
       Dönerci Ali Efendi, müşterilerini doğal ve sıcak bir ortamda ağırlıyor; onları evlerinde gibi rahat hissettiriyor.  Marka; Türk Gıda Kodeksi'ne uygun izin belgeleriyle üretim yapıyor. KÖTÜ SÜRPRİZ YOK! Tüm restoranlarında önceden belirlenmiş standartlarda ve ölçütlerde pişirme ve servis hizmeti veren Dönerci Ali Efendi, bu sayede şubelerinde sürprizleri ortadan kaldırmış oluyor.

Name: Mesarstvo Čadež
Description: Na Visokem pri Kranju se že več kot petindvajset let razvija zgodba o mesu, mesnih izdelkih in slastno pripravljenih jedeh. Mesarstvo Čadež ima tukaj svoje korenine. Oče vsega tega prizadevanja je Anton Čadež, ki je leta 1987 začel razvijati sodobno mesarsko obrt. S ženo Marijo sta zasnovala najprej manjšo obrtno mesarsko delavnico, ki se je razvila v sodobno družinsko podjetje s 50 zaposlenimi, kjer družinsko tradicijo nadaljujeta sin Tomaž in hči Tonja. Tu je postala kakovost osrednji motiv druženja z mesom in mesnimi izdelki. Iz te delavnice se je postopoma razvilo sodobno središče mesno predelovalnega prizadevanja, ki je postopoma razširilo svoje veje na šest lastnih mesnic in na preko 1000 velikih odjemalcev širom Slovenije, katere oskrbujemo z mesom vzrejenim na gorenjskih kmetijah in z mesninami iz lastne proizvodnje. Name: Ingredion agricultural products
Description: Industries in the Food Manufacturing subsector transform livestock and agricultural products into products for intermediate or final consumption. The industry groups are distinguished by the raw materials (generally of animal or vegetable origin) processed into food products. The food products manufactured in these establishments are typically sold to wholesalers or retailers for distribution to consumers, but establishments primarily engaged in retailing bakery and candy products made on the premises not for immediate consumption are included. Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing beverages are classified in Subsector 312, Beverage and Tobacco Product Manufacturing.

Name: Chateau Carpaccio

Vanaf het selecteren van onze boeren tot aan het serveren op uw bord, streven wij naar niets minder dan perfectie.

Wij hechten grote waarde aan langdurige samenwerkingsverbanden, zowel met onze leveranciers als met onze gewaardeerde klanten. Door nauw met hen samen te werken, kunnen wij hun behoeften beter begrijpen en erop anticiperen.

Het is deze betrokkenheid en dit wederzijds vertrouwen die ons onderscheiden en ons in staat stelt om een waardevolle relatie op te bouwen met iedereen die de smaakvolle wereld van Chateau Carpaccio betreedt.

Name: Moya Mechta Uzbekistan
Description:
Мы являемся крупнейшим мясным агрокластером, занимающийся разведением, выращиванием и переработкой мясных пород.

Наша компания является официальным партнёром «Национальной Ассоциации Кролиководов Италия (ANCI)» в Центральной Азии и в странах СНГ, занимающееся разведением итальянских пород кроликов.

Агрокомплекс «Моя Мечта» является крупнейшим в мире кролиководческим кластером, расположенный в экологически чистой зоне Ташкентской области, спроектированный итальянскими специалистами по передовым технологиям, отвечающим всем европейским стандартам.

На основании прав, предоставленных «Национальной Ассоциации Кролиководов Италии (ANCI)», мы занимаемся производством и реализацией генетики кроликов, кроликоматок, кроличьего мяса из представленного генетического кода чистокровных пород — кроличьих прародителей.

Name: Codrul Boieresc
Description:
Codrul Boieresc este o companie cu o reputație solidă și o prezență remarcabilă pe piața produselor naturale din carne. 

Ne mândrim cu faptul că suntem custozii autenticității și căutăm mereu să aducem în casele clienților noștri autenticitatea și calitatea inconfundabilă a produselor noastre.

Suntem dedicați promovării valorilor culturale românești și aducem în prim plan ingredientele naturale și rețetele autentice, prelucrate cu măiestrie pentru a oferi produse autentice și delicioase.

Cu fiecare produs pe care îl oferim, dorim să aducem clienților noștri bucuria gustului autentic și satisfacția de a descoperi aromele tradiționale ale României. Fie că este vorba despre produse naturale din carne, miere pură și nectar de albine, gemuri și dulcețuri făcute manual sau brânzeturi maturate, ne străduim să păstrăm autenticitatea fiecărui ingredient și să evidențiem savoarea și calitatea lor distincte.

La Codrul Boieresc, ne preocupă în mod constant calitatea și siguranța alimentară. Lucrăm cu furnizori de încredere și respectăm cele mai înalte standarde de producție și procesare fiind acreditați FSSC22000. Produsele noastre sunt atent selectate și testate, pentru a ne asigura că oferim clienților noștri doar cele mai bune și autentice produse.

Codrul Boieresc este mult mai mult decât o companie care produce și comercializează produse naturale tradiționale. Suntem un ambasador al tradițiilor românești și ne propunem să promovăm patrimoniul cultural și culinar al țării noastre, atât în România, cât și în străinătate.

Name: Ada Tarım ve Hayvancılık
Description:
Ulusal kırmızı et sektörüne, bilimselliği ilke edinerek yerli ve milli politikamızla giriş yaptık. Doğumundan kesimine kadar incelikle bakımını yaptığımız, sağlıkla büyüyen hayvanlarımız sayesinde gün geçtikçe güçlenen bir çiftliğimiz oldu. Ada Tarım ve Hayvancılık olarak, damızlık ve besi üzerine uzmanlaşmış bir yetiştirici çiftliğiz. Çiftliğimizde özenle yetiştirdiğimiz besi hayvanlarımız, yüksek protein oranına sahip yonca ve macar fiği yeşil otu, enerji ihtiyaçları için arpa ve saman ile beslenerek sağlıklı bir yaşam sürüyor. Hayvanlarımızın sağlığı, sizin ve bizim sağlığımızı etkiler. Bu misyonla, doğumlarından itibaren en iyi koşullarda büyüttüğümüz hayvanlarımızla, et ürünlerimizin lezzetini ve besin değerini maksimum seviyeye çıkarıyoruz. Daha fazlasının değil, daha iyinin peşindeyiz… 

Kendi kendine yetebilen çiftliğimizi, sadece bir iş değil, aynı zamanda ailemizin bir parçası olarak görüyoruz. Bu yaşam tarzını benimseyerek doğal ve güvenilir ürünler üretmek adına her gün titizlikle çalışıyoruz. 3500 dönüm arazimizde, hayvanlarımızın yanı sıra sebzelerimizi, meyvelerimizi ve baklagillerimizi özenle yetiştiriyoruz. Temiz tarım ilkelerine bağlı kalarak, sebzelerimizi ve meyvelerimizi kendi gübre kaynağımız olan hayvanlarımızın katkılarıyla büyütüyoruz. Zararlı pestisitler kullanmıyor, çevreye dost bir üretim gerçekleştiriyoruz. Baharın gelmesiyle birlikte, arılarımız lavanta, ayçiçeği ve elma çiçeklerinden besleniyor, onların sağlığı da sofralarınıza sağlık katıyor. Burada, doğa ile bütünleşerek, sağlıklı ve lezzetli ürünler üretiyoruz. Sizinle bu güzellikleri paylaşmak, soframızı sizinle buluşturmak bizim için bir aile geleneği. Çünkü burada, sizin iyiliğiniz ve sağlığınız, bizim için en değerli miras.

Name: Star Valley Meat Block
Description:
When we purchased the Thayne plant in 2017 it was primarily a seasonal wild game and custom beef processing operation.  In 2019 we started exploring the possibility to become USDA inspected to help our customers market their meat and meat products direct to customers, restaurants, and grocery stores.  After significant investments in plant upgrades and numerous hours spent developing the plans, procedures, protocols, testing procedures, and reporting formats required to become USDA inspected we were thankfully approved in 2020.  Now our business is operating year around and our customers are thriving with their direct marketing efforts.  We take great pride in seeing meats that we processed sold in regional restaurants and markets.  One of our primary goals of being in business is to help our local community anyway we can.  Our goal is to continue processing wild game and custom processing livestock sold locally by local growers and ranchers while growing our USDA sales and on-line presence.

Since we purchased that plant with have continuously tried to improve our facility, customer service and experience, and execution.  This will always be a pillar or our value system.  Please let us know how we can improve.

Personal Regards,

Grant & Tylee Williams

The company is built with a vision to emerge as India’s loved meat food brand by offering premium quality products. In a highly underserved market, ichick as a category-first brand backed by technology, has been able to solve the prevailing customer pain points of quality, hygiene, freshness and convenience in a sustainable manner. Built on the farm to fork business model, Ichick owns the entire back-end supply chain powered by stringent cold chain control to maintain the quality and freshness of each product from the time of procurement, processing, storage to the time it reaches the end consumer.  As a category leader and the largest direct to consumer fresh meat & Eggs brand, Ichick has been able to build differentiation across all dimensions including technology, data science, supply chain, product quality, consumer engagement and category understanding. With seamless supply chain capabilities which are cold chain powered and scientifically maintaining global standard of quality and freshness of each product, Ichick is ahead of the curve and holds a great distinction to drive the meat and Eggs category which has remained highly unorganized.   For more details, please visit https://www.ichick.in/

Name: The Wolf Italian Food s.r.l.
Description:
La The Wolf Italian Food s.r.l.  ad oggi è l’azienda leader nella distribuzione di carni, esclusivamente italiane.

Nasce nel 2017, con l’intento di riscoprire e valorizzare le razze autoctone italiane e le metodologie di allevamento - che contraddistinguono le diverse regioni di Italia - nate e sviluppate per adattarsi alle biodiversità territoriali.

La the Wolf Italian Food s.r.l. vanta ad oggi la lavorazione, commercializzazione e distribuzione di più di quattordici razze italiane bovine, oltre a suini neri, selvaggina e pollame.
I suoi laboratori forniscono al cliente qualsiasi tipo di lavorazione, partendo dalle carcasse intere fino ai tagli più richiesti dalla ristorazione.

La sua piattaforma, inoltre, garantisce le consegne in tutta Italia salvaguardando la freschezza e l’integrità dei prodotti.

Name: Müller Fleisch GmbH
Description:
Der Name Müller ist mit der Frischfleischbranche seit nunmehr über 60 Jahren untrennbar verbunden.
Wir sind DER familiengeführte Produzent von hochwertigem Fleisch in Süddeutschland.
Qualität und Herkunft sind unser Fundament – Nachhaltigkeit ist unser Weg.
Als Familienunternehmen steht für uns fest, dass Erfolg nur mit erstklassigen Produkten erreicht werden kann, das Vertrauen unserer Kunden ist für uns eine Verpflichtung, es prägt unser Selbstverständnis und die Kultur in unserem Unternehmen. Im Mittelpunkt unseres Denkens und Handelns steht die Verantwortung für unser Produkt sowie unserer Kunden wie auch für unsere Mitarbeiter. 
Innovation und Fortschritt ist seit der Unternehmensgründung die Grundlage unserer Expansion. Soziale Verantwortung, Tierschutz sowie Nachhaltigkeit prägen unser tägliches Handeln.
Durch unsere Jahrzehnte gewachsene Kompetenz und Erfahrung in der Produktion und Vermarktung von Fleisch konnte wir uns als MÜLLER GRUPPE auf allen namhaften internationalen Märkten etablieren.
__________________________________________________________________________

Über 1.000 Mitarbeiter geben unserem Hauptstandort in Birkenfeld ein Gesicht. Da wir weiter wachsen, suchen wir zur Verstärkung unseres Teams neben Technikern (m/w/d) auch engagierte Mitarbeiter (m/w/d) in den Bereichen Produktion, Verwaltung und Logistik.

Interessante und anspruchsvolle Aufgaben in einer krisensicheren Branche, tolle Benefits und die Möglichkeit, sich persönlich weiter zu entwickeln und eigene Ideen mit einzubringen, warten auf Sie! 

Schauen Sie noch heute auf unserer Karriere-Plattform vorbei:

Name: Old Salt Co-op
Description: Old Salt Co-op provides meat raised with integrity from Montana landscapes its customers know and care about. The company teams J Bar L, Mannix, Sieben Live Stock and a growing list of other ranches with chefs, butchers and entrepreneurs in an unprecedented effort to rebuild infrastructure for Montana’s meat. More than the meat itself, Old Salt is about connecting customers and producers in a shared purpose: to be stewards, enhancing land, wildlife habitat and community like a pinch of salt in a recipe, like the salt of the earth.

Name: Weinstein Wholesale Meats
Description:
As a staple Chicago meat wholesaler, our mission has been and will always be “Listen to the customer and deliver what the customer wants”. This simple concept has guided our business philosophy for over 60 years.

Today, Weinstein Wholesale Meats is a complete protein provider along with being a licensed Certified Angus Beef (C.A.B.) distributor as well as Safe Quality Food (SQF) and Halal food Certified. Our products are received in every Midwestern state as well as several major hubs in the southern and eastern United States as well as California.

Providing Weinstein Wholesale Meats (WWM) customers with the finest beef, pork, poultry, lamb, and veal products for our growing customer base has been our priority since day one. Over the years, our commitment to listening to the customer and delivering what the customer wants has contributed to our success.

We pride ourselves on the quality and artisan craftsmanship of every product that leaves our 5 temperature zone cold storage 65,000 SqFt Facility. Whether you are looking for retail co-packing and distribution or cold storage. Weinstein Wholesale Meats takes great care to listen to the unique specifications of each chain, wholesale and distributor customers to make sure the finished product is customized to their specific needs. This philosophy extends to our 10,000 SqFt processing room built for cutting and private label services. Customers can trust that any cut product has gone through a rigorous procurement and inspection process. Our standards for quality and excellence insure our customers that they are receiving a superior product with every order.

Name: Meat & Greet
Description:
Good things happen when the right people meet; and that’s exactly why Meat & Greet exists.

We bring together people from across Australia’s meat and agribusiness supply chain to build the kind of connections that make the industry stronger. Our monthly Brisbane events have grown into a genuine hub where processors, producers, suppliers, service providers, and future leaders come together to share ideas, stay connected, and build networks that actually matter.

The industry works best when people know each other, talk openly, and back one another. Every event creates space for those conversations to happen in a relaxed setting, making it easy to expand your network and stay engaged with what’s happening across the wider community.

If you believe the industry is stronger together, and that good things really do happen when the right people meet, you’ll feel at home here.

Follow the page for event dates, photos, and ways to get involved.

Name: Ana Kom Skopje
Description:
Ана Ком ДООЕЛ Скопје, е осована во 2001 и е лоцирана во Скопје, Северна  Македонија.

Ана Ком започнува со увоз на пилешко месо од Грција, со потпишување на договори за ексклузивност со најголемите производители на живина. Со порастот на продажбите, нашата компанија стекна репутација на лидер во индустријата во нашата земја. Со развојот на компанијата, започнавме со увоз на производи и од гоемите и реномирани производители од Западна Европа. Дене, со гордост можеме да истакнеме дека на годишно ниво се увезуваат повеќе од 6000 тони пилешко. 

Константниот развој, рамномерниот поратс на продажбите, како и нашата експертиза во полето на увоз и продажба на пилешко месо доведе до градење на професионален однос и долгогодишна соработка со најголемите компании за одледување на живина во Европа. 

Компанијата е најголемиот импортер на замрзнато пилешко месо во Серверна Македонија, нашата догогодишна соработка со релевантните индустрии за процесирање на месо во нашата држава ни овозможи раст и присуство на нашите производи во сите поголеми маркети.

Компанијата, денес има 28 вработени, поседува 12 возила за дистрибуција, има сопствен канцелариски простор и склад со површина од 3000м2. Во 2015 погонот за препакување беше официјално отоворен со дневен капацитет од 4000кг.

Name: Best Farmer
Description:
Desde 2015, a Best Farmer produz carne Angus com qualidade consistente, respeitando o bem-estar animal e os princípios da sustentabilidade.
Criada para elevar os padrões da produção nacional, destaca-se pelo acompanhamento rigoroso, pela homogeneidade dos cortes e pelo sabor inconfundível da carne Angus.

Name: Konet
Description:
Bölgenin en yüksek kesim ve parçalama kapasitesine sahip olan KONET, bulunduğu bölgenin %100'ünün, ülkemizin ise %10'unun kırmızı et ihtiyacını karşılayabilmektedir. 45.000 m² tesis alanı, güven temelli çalışma anlayışı ve yenilikçi bakış açısıyla KONET, kalite ve güvenin global temsilcisidir.

KONET, her aşamada gösterdiği titizlik ve sağladığı güven sayesinde Et Balık Kurumları, ulusal zincir marketler, yerel market zincirleri, üniversiteler, Tarım Kredi Kooperatifleri Satış Ofisleri ve devlet kurumlarına hizmet vermektedir.

Satın alımlar, tüm hizmet ve taleplere cevap verebilme kapasitesi ve standart ürün verebilme (sınıflandırılmış) yeterliliği kapsamında KONET Türkiye’nin en büyük işletmesi konumundadır.

Name: Platinum Kebabs and Meat Ltd
Description:
Welcome to Platinum Meat and Kebabs – Your Premium Kebab Partner

At Platinum, we're not just in the business of kebabs; we're in the business of building your reputation! As a trusted, accredited, and quality-driven wholesaler, we understand that the perfect kebab is not just food; it's the heart of your business.

Crafted with Tradition, Delivered with Excellence, 20 years of experience in manufacturing, our expertise brings you the finest kebabs in the trade. Our legacy speaks to our commitment to quality.

Global Flavour, Local Service Platinum isn't just about kebabs; it's about you. We put our customers at the heart of everything we do. Our goal? To create solid relationships and deliver custom-tailored products for your business needs. We offer a wide range of kebabs to meet your specific requirements.

Delivering Perfection to Your Doorstep Rest easy, for every order is a promise. Our fleet of refrigerated vehicles ensures your delivery arrives in pristine condition. Urgent order? We're here to make it happen!

Quality Meets Affordability: Top-notch quality for exceptional products at reasonable prices. Our commitment to regulations means you can trust our label.

Quality Policy - Our Commitment to Excellence Our quality policy is clear: we are dedicated to providing high-quality, safe, and wholesome food products to the market. Your satisfaction is our value!

The Platinum Team is backed by 20 years of industry experience. Our team combines expertise with a passion for customer care. We know that you are the key to our success, and we're here to improve the quality of our product and service continuously.

Dedicated Customer Support: Our aftercare sales team maintains regular contact to ensure you're happy with our service. We're here to discuss new products and ideas to help you maximise your sales and profits.

Name: Great Plains Beef
Description:
Great Plains Beef is the leading purveyor of premium Certified Piedmontese—a rare and exceptional beef that is preferred by meticulous and discerning chefs, specialty retailers, and consumers alike. Held in high regard by some of the country’s leading chefs, Certified Piedmontese beef delivers the unique combination of high-quality nutrition, premium tenderness, and exceptional flavor.

The oversight of Great Plains Beef ensures that Certified Piedmontese cattle are raised on family ranches across the Midwest, where they roam open rangelands and receive only the highest standard of care. Ranchers combine the most up-to-date handling and husbandry practices with classic stockmanship, so cattle are raised humanely and land is managed sustainably.

With our state of the art campus, based in Lincoln, NE, we operate a cold storage facility with high volume meat grinding and portioning capabilities.

We are always looking to hire and expand opportunities to new and existing employees!

Description:

We believe hunters and farmers are the greatest conservationists and we take serious our God-given environmental stewardship command to “subdue” the earth. We believe in responsible farming to include Animal Welfare and Good Agricultural Practices. Our farm practices include low till, pasture raised, 
and rotationally grazed herd management.

As one of the largest protein suppliers in the region, offering beef, lamb, and veal, we have established a solid presence in markets worldwide. While our reach extends globally, our primary focus remains on serving clientele in the UAE, Iraq, Saudi Arabia and Qatar.
At Artagemmeat, integrity, accountability, sustainability, and innovation are the cornerstones of our business philosophy. Factory exploded view and sale:

-Manufacturer of artisan products, sausages and prepared dishes of the 5th range.

Carne Montoro was born from a history of more than 50 years providing quality from the field to your plate. Family tradition of four generations of farmers and ranchers and that has become a project that offers quality, price and service to our customers with the utmost care in its preparation, guaranteeing the quality and traceability of all our products.

All our products have been made in our own and artisan way. Our privileged location, in the middle of the Sierra Morena and very close to the Valle de los Pedroches, guarantees a raw material of the best quality, controlled from the origin.

Thanks to the good work of the people who make up Carnes Montoro and the customers who value our work and the quality of our products, we are becoming more consolidated in the market every day, focused on satisfying our customers efficiently with the maximum guarantees.

Description: Nous proposons de la viande fraîche de bœuf, de mouton, d'agneau et de chèvre, issue d’élevages locaux. Soucieux de votre santé, nous respectons rigoureusement les normes d’hygiène et de salubrité afin de vous garantir des produits de qualité, sains et adaptés à la consommation.

Description: We're Producer Owned Beef, a beef processing company owned by the cattle producers of this great state, setting up shop right here in Amarillo.

Name: Indústria Frigorífica Boa Carne
Description:
O Frigorífico BOA CARNE, foi idealizado por profissionais com mais de 30 anos de atividade no mercado de carnes.
Construído em 2018 para ser uma das mais modernas e tecnológicas plantas industriais do Brasil, iniciou suas atividades em março de 2020 com o objetivo de atender a seus clientes com uma qualidade em produtos e atendimento que exceda as expectativas seja no mercado interno ou externo.
A empresa está estrategicamente localizada no Estado do Mato Grosso com pontos de distribuição em São Paulo e atendimento a maioria dos estados brasileiros. Com uma estrutura logística global e nacional, garante competitividade, agilidade e pontualidade, no mercado nacional e internacional, com presença em vários países do mundo, América do Sul, Oriente Médio, África, Ásia e Europa

Além do investimento feito em uma das plantas mais modernas do Brasil, o Frigorífico BOA CARNE, segue investindo diariamente em melhorias na automação, tecnologias, controle de qualidade e pessoas. Com capacidade de produção de 110.000 toneladas ano, o Frigorífico BOA CARNE gera mais de 600 empregos diretos e tem o objetivo de até 2024 dobrar sua produção.

A principal meta do Frigorífico BOA CARNE é ter excelência em toda a cadeia produtiva, no tratamento com seus funcionários, na rastreabilidade e origem sustentável dos rebanhos, na qualidade de seu produto, tudo isso aliada com um atendimento de excelência a seus clientes no Brasil e no mundo.

Name: Gamekeepers Meat
Description: Gamekeepers is owned and operated by Jerome and Annabelle Hoban. Together they created a customised full-service butchery that allows restaurants and chefs to source all their needs under one roof. When COVID began, they offered their wholesale services to home cooks with a large catalogue of restaurant-quality products, which has proven to be another successful step forward in the evolution of the business.

Name: Gruppo Jubatti
Description:
Da una generazione all’altra, il cammino prosegue nel confronto quotidiano con gli operatori professionali, il trade, i consumatori. L’azienda muove i primi passi nell’antico borgo di Guardiagrele, ai piedi della Majella, grazie alla dedizione e alla passione di una nonna degli anni Quaranta. 
Rispettare l’ambiente e gli animali è per noi una regola di vita. Una forma di riguardo che si riflette sui nostri prodotti in perfetto equilibrio fra tradizione e ritmi contemporanei. 
Perché se abitudini alimentari e stili di vita evolvono, i nuovi modi di stare a tavola non devono intaccare la qualità: mangiare buono e sano è per noi il fulcro della dieta quotidiana, sempre e comunque. 
La sede è evocativa del nostro modo di fare impresa: operare immersi nella natura lussureggiante del Parco Nazionale della Majella ci ha trasmesso una forma di coscienza che ci detta tempi e regole di lavoro quotidianamente applicati in un ogni anello della catena produttiva.

Name: Camaguey
Description: Empresa líder en la industria ganadera colombiana dedicada a la producción,  la conservación y comercialización de la carne y sus subproductos.

Name: Bedford GmbH + Co. KG
Description: Wir sind ein inhabergeführtes Osnabrücker Familienunternehmen und stehen für Wurst und Schinken der Premiumklasse. Unsere Produkte zeichnen sich durch traditionelle Handwerkskunst, modernste Technik und die Liebe zum Detail aus.

Name: Double R Brand Foods, LLC
Description: Founded in 2000, Double R Brand Foods has built a reputation as the finest craft smoked meat manufacturer in the industry. With 2 state of the art BRC Certified facilities, we are passionate about producing the finest best tasting smoked meats on the planet! Our portfolio of private label and award winning brands - Holmes Smokehouse, Burton All Natural Sausage, Ranch Hand, and Beaumont Boudin and Sausage Co, can be found in retailers and restaurants across the country.

Name: Carver & Co Butchery UK
Description:
Carver & Co. Butchery brings you the very best in authentic local craft butchery – all in the same order, delivery and invoice as your regular Brakes shop.

As a Brakes customer, you now have access to an exclusive range of cuts of British and Irish beef, all butchered, prepared, aged, stored and packed by our in-house team of specialist craft butchers. We can also prepare specific cuts to your exact requirements; please contact us to find out more.

Name: AlRaie Company
Description: Al Raie, founded by Al Muhaidib Group and NADEC, is redefining Saudi Arabia’s livestock industry. We combine innovation, sustainability, and the highest standards of quality to deliver premium red meats, supporting Vision 2030’s mission for food security and economic growth. Our commitment to ethical farming practices, from breeding to processing, ensures excellence at every step. Join us and be a part of building a sustainable future that nourishes Saudi Arabia and the world.

Name: Eswatini Meat Industries (Embiveni)
Description: EMI (better known as "Embiveni" within Eswatini) is mainly recognised for its Simunye Beef branded products, we do in fact sell a very broad range of meat products in both Eswatini and Mozambique. These go to a wide variety of customers and, in Eswatini, this includes a large number of entrepreneurs operating small businesses who buy through the Embiveni Shop in Matsapha.

Name: Nolan Meats Pty Ltd
Description:
Nolan Meats is a 100% Australian,  family-owned company founded as a small retail butchery business in Gympie in 1958.    Today, Nolan Meats focuses on producing quality grainfed beef  for the delivery to retailers, further processors, wholesalers and International markets.

The business is vertically integrated throughout the beef chain from breeding to feed lotting, processing, distribution and wholesaling. This allows the business to focus on ‘whole of chain’ value adding and maximising the information flow from consumer to the producer.

The processing plant is export accredited and has the capabilities to process over 2,500 cattle per week. Beef products from the abattoir are distributed around Australia and exports overseas to Brunei, Indonesia, Japan, Korea, Malaysia, Middle East, Africa, Taiwan, USA and other markets.

The feedlot operation (includes a company owned feedlot and three custom feeding sites) turnoff over 100,000 head per annum and supplies over 80% of cattle processed through the abattoir, the remaining cattle being purchased over the hooks or service processed.

Name: HVO Meat B.V.
Description: HVO Meat is een vleesbedrijf gespecialiseerd in het selecteren, uitbenen en versnijden van kalfs- en lamsvlees. Al meer dan 30 jaar levert HVO Meat hoogwaardig kalfs- en lamsvlees aan groothandels, slagerijen en horeca-leveranciers. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in het verwerken van luxe blanke vleeskalveren. Dit kunnen wij leveren in alle gewenste technische delen. Wij zijn een, ambitieus bedrijf waarbij kwaliteit van zowel dienstverlening als het vlees hoog in het vaandel staan. Wij onderscheiden ons door persoonlijke aandacht voor onze klanten, geen nee-verkopen en uitgebreide mogelijkheden. Van een enkele kalfshaas tot hele kalveren, wij helpen u verder!

Name: OVINOS MANCHEGOS SL
Description: Nuestra principal actividad es la producción de Ovino en todas sus etapas: crías, engorde, sacrificio, despiece, congelado y distribución. Respondemos a las necesidades de los clientes con productos de excelente calidad, ofreciendo una alta capacidad de respuesta y servicio, dando como resultado el Ovino más excelente del mercado. Nuestros principales productos son el cordero Fino y Merino, Ovino mayor, Lechal, Caprino y Vacuno.

Name: Beef Project
Description:
Beef Project propose des viandes différenciantes à destination des professionnels à travers des process de transformation uniques : cuissons basse-température, fumaison, mélange d'épices audacieux... 

Nous accompagnons les chefs du CHR et de l'HPA les plus exigeants à travers une gamme de produits complète et versatile : du pastrami de Black Angus à la joue de boeuf confite, sur tous types de restauration : des buffets aux petits-déjeuners des grands hôtels, au coeur d'assiette des brasseries de luxe, où à l'exigence d'envoi à gros volume des parcs d'attraction. 

Beef Project, c'est une nouvelle façon de valoriser la viande, et de donner un sens et une destination à toute la carcasse des animaux, tout en appréhendant les réalités d'approvisionnement et de consommation de demain. 

Beef Project, c'est le futur de la viande, dès maintenant. 

Beef Project. Meat Different.

Name: Beimer Meat B.V.
Description: Vleesliefhebbers in hart en nieren: dat mogen we na de start van ons familiebedrijf in 1957 en met meer dan zestig jaar ervaring inmiddels wel zeggen. Met als oorsprong een eigen slachterij groeiden we uit tot een ondernemende vleesleveranciers. Ons slachthuis is inmiddels vervangen door een eigen vleesproductiebedrijf in Enschede, waar vlees op een verantwoordelijke wijze wordt verwerkt.

Name: Kalieber GmbH
Description: Kalieber GmbH

Name: Goha's
Description:
Wir sind ein junges Team, welches sich zu Herzen genommen hat, den regionalen Markt zu stärken. Unsere Mission ist es eine Plattform zu kreieren, die jeder Österreicherin und jedem Österreicher die Möglichkeit gibt Teil des regionalen Aufschwungs zu sein.

Unsere Devise - von Österreich für Österreich und in die Welt!

Halal beginnt schon mit der Tierhaltung. Dabei achten wir auf Fütterung, Schlachtalter und vorbildliche Haltungsbedingungen. Wir stehen mit unserem Namen dafür
ein, dass die Tiere artgerecht gezüchtet werden. 
Wir bei Goha's bringen dir eine große Auswahl an regionalen, hochwertigen und qualitativen Fleisch- & Wurstprodukten bis an die Wohnungstür. 


Goha's steht für erlesene Produkte von höchster Qualität – und wir wissen, wovon wir reden. Bei uns findest du alles, was dein Herz begehrt. Als Gourmet-Experte legen wir höchste Priorität auf Kundenzufriedenheit. Wir sind für dich da, mit ausgezeichneten Produkten und bestem Service.

Ohne schlechtes Gewissen, das Fleisch genießen!
