Name: MASTER CATERING LTD
Description: MASTER CATERING LTD is doner and chicken manufacturing company.

Name: Master Good
Description:
The Master Good group of companies operates in North-Eastern Hungary, and it is engaged in integrated fodder production, poultry breeding, hatching, broiler fattening, and processing. The group is 100% owned by the Bárány Family.

Four generations of the family have been engaged in poultry farming for 114 years, making it the oldest poultry breeding dynasty of Hungary. The first generation to start the tradition was the estate poultry breeder of the counts of Széchenyi. Their commitment to the profession has been passed down from generation to generation. This legacy is also the key to the group’s current success.

Name: Dolan Foods Inc.
Description:
Dolan Foods locally and globally sources, imports, stores and distributes high-quality, niche protein products across Canada. Our strength is our expert knowledge of the supply and value chains - from the farm to the fork. 

Dolan Foods also includes Gourmet Sausage. Founded on old-school, authentic sausage making from a generation ago - Gourmet Sausage now stands for hand-crafted, expertly butchered, customized, fully cooked, and ready-to-cook meats across Canada. This allows us to manufacture and further process for foodservice and grocery of virtually any size. 

With our own DFI Logistics, we have become a leading force in the food-to-market industry, providing comprehensive services to meet the continuous demand for importing, clearing, and international shipping for perishable foods that are both frozen and fresh..

Name: Akşeker Tarım Et Entegre Tesisleri
Description:
AKŞEKER TARIM ET ENTEGRE TESİSLERİ – Güvenilir, Sağlıklı ve Lezzetli Ürünler

1986 yılında Konya’da kurulan AKŞEKER TARIM ET ENTEGRE TESİSLERİ, geleneksel lezzet anlayışını modern üretim teknikleriyle birleştirerek et ve et ürünleri sektöründe öncü bir marka haline gelmiştir. Helal kesim ve üretim ilkelerine bağlı kalarak, yüksek kalite standartlarında sağlıklı ve güvenilir ürünler sunmayı ilke ediniyoruz.

Sofralara Değer Katan Ürün Çeşitliliği

Geniş ürün yelpazemizle tüketicilerimize lezzet ve kaliteyi bir arada sunuyoruz:
 • Büyükbaş ve küçükbaş etinden elde edilen parçalanmış etler,
 • Şarküteri ürünleri (sucuk, salam, pastırma, kavurma, köfte, döner vb.),
 • Dondurulmuş sakatat ve hayvansal yan ürünlerden üretilen köpek çiğneme ürünleri,
 • Kemik unu ve diğer gıda sanayi bileşenleri.

Her bir ürünümüz, gıda güvenliği ve hijyen standartlarına uygun şekilde üretilerek, titiz kalite kontrol süreçlerinden başarıyla geçmektedir.

Teknoloji ve İnovasyon ile Güçlü Üretim

AKŞEKER olarak, sektörümüzdeki yenilikçi gelişmeleri yakından takip ediyor, en ileri üretim teknolojilerini kullanarak dünya standartlarında et ürünleri üretiyoruz. Modern tesislerimizde hijyenik koşullarda gerçekleştirdiğimiz üretimle, ulusal ve uluslararası gıda mevzuatlarına tam uyum sağlıyoruz.

Misyonumuz

Müşteri memnuniyetini her şeyin önünde tutarak, kaliteli, sağlıklı ve lezzetli et ürünleri sunmak. Doğal beslenmeye katkı sağlayan güvenilir ürünlerle insan sağlığını korumak ve sürdürülebilir üretim anlayışıyla sektörde fark yaratmak.

Vizyonumuz

Sektörümüzdeki liderliğimizi pekiştirerek, ulusal ve uluslararası alanda tanınan, kalite ve güven denince akla ilk gelen marka olmak. Yenilikçi üretim anlayışımızla, sağlıklı ve lezzetli ürünlerimizi dünya çapında sofralarla buluşturmak.

Değerlerimiz
 • Güvenilirlik: Ürünlerimizde her zaman güvenliği ve kaliteyi ön planda tutarız.
 • Sürekli İyileştirme: Teknolojiyi ve inovasyonu takip ederek üretim süreçlerimizi geliştiririz.
 • Çevre Duyarlılığı

Name: Morgana Alimentos
Description:
Nós da Frangos Morgana , a mais de 30 anos produzimos em solo catarinense, produtos que garantem mais sabor e qualidade na mesa de milhares de pessoas. Nossos produtos são repletos de cuidado e segurança, pois temos como principal objetivo, oferecer aos nossos parceiros excelência no atendimento e satisfação com competitividade no mercado em que atuamos.

Focamos nossa gestão evolutiva com respeito, transparência e ética, beneficiando todos os envolvidos na cadeia produtiva, logística e comercial. Nous utilisons des méthodes traditionnelles, sélectionnons avec rigueur et selon des standards de qualité rigoureux, les meilleures viandes. 

Nous sommes heureux de vous accueillir dans notre univers où se mêlent tradition, qualité et générosité.

Somos o Grupo Avigro, dedicados a fornecer produtos de frango da mais alta qualidade para supermercados e consumidores exigentes. Acreditamos que a qualidade e o sabor fazem toda a diferença. Investimos continuamente em processos inovadores e rigorosos padrões de controle para garantir que cada produto que leva o nome Avigro supere as expectativas.

Nosso objetivo é contar a história do sabor e da tradição através de nossos produtos. Cada pedaço de frango Avigro é preparado com carinho e cuidado, refletindo nossa dedicação em proporcionar uma experiência culinária única e deliciosa.

Para nós, não se trata apenas de vender frango, mas de criar memórias e momentos especiais ao redor da mesa.

Para saber mais e acompanhar nossas novidades:
https://www.instagram.com/grupoavigro

Name: Sprehe Geflügel- und Tiefkühlfeinkost Handels GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Moin bei Sprehe!
Angefangen hat unsere Geschichte vor über 35 Jahren mit einem kleinen Produktionsbetrieb im Oldenburger Münsterland. Heute ist unser Familienunternehmen ein innovativer Produktionsbetrieb für eine Vielzahl von Wurst- und Fleischprodukten. 

Gemeinsam mit unseren ca. 3.400 Mitarbeitern sind wir stetig auf der Suche nach zukunftsweisen Konzepten und Produktlösungen. Produkte von Sprehe findet man in nahezu allen namenhaften Supermarktketten Deutschlands sowie im Großhandel, der den gesamten Außer-Haus-Markt beliefert. Darüber hinaus werden die Produkte zur Weiterverarbeitung in der Lebensmittelindustrie eingesetzt.

An insgesamt zwölf Produktionsstandorten in ganz Deutschland wird täglich für unsere acht Marken der Sprehe Unternehmensgruppe eine breite Angebotspalette hergestellt, die von klassischen Schnitzeln über Burger und Würstchen bis hin zu Snacks wie Nuggets oder Frikadellen reicht. Dabei stellen Produkte aus Geflügelfleisch den Großteil des Angebotes dar. Produkte aus Rind- und Schweinefleisch runden das Sortiment ab. 

Bei Sprehe Feinkost gilt die Unternehmensphilosophie, kompromisslose Qualität durch höchste Standards und permanente Innovationsprozesse sicherzustellen und dies sowohl in der Produktentwicklung als auch in den Herstellungsverfahren.

Name: weRfoods
Description:
Nuestra historia comenzó en 1950, en un pueblo de Girona, cuando Miquel Ramió Serra dio sus primeros pasos en el negocio ganadero. Desde entonces, hemos crecido hasta convertirnos en weRfoods, un grupo alimentario verticalmente integrado, especializado en todas las etapas de la cadena de valor: desde la cría y gestión del ganado hasta la producción y comercialización
de productos cárnicos y derivados.
weRfoods nace de la unión de Novafeed, Agroporc, Friselva, Tripnet, Rafael Baró, Natural Jamón, Gicarns, Bestial y ABF, consolidando nuestra capacidad de ofrecer soluciones alimentarias a través de una integración vertical que nos permite controlar todo el proceso y garantizar máximos estándares de calidad, seguridad y bienestar animal.
Nuestra misión es alimentar vidas con productos de calidad, apostando por la innovación sostenible para minimizar nuestro impacto en el medio ambiente y contribuir a una alimentación más responsable. Con presencia en más de 50 países, seguimos creciendo con el propósito de llevar nuestros productos a nuevos mercados, manteniendo nuestro compromiso con las personas, la sociedad, los animales y el planeta.
Los valores familiares con los que empezamos nos han traído hasta aquí, y siguen guiándonos e inspirándonos cada día: humildad, superación, pasión e integridad. Queremos que weRfoods sea sinónimo de calidad, economía circular y respeto, porque el futuro que estamos nutriendo hoy será el legado que dejemos a las próximas generaciones.

Name: Carmangeria Ozana
Description:
Carmangeria Ozana – Măiestrie premiată, gust autentic

Carmangeria Ozana, cu sediul principal pe strada Jean Steriadi nr. 11, sector 3, București, și prezentă în alte 15 locații din București, Prahova și Dâmbovița, nu este doar un simplu magazin de carne – este spațiul în care tradiția românească se împletește armonios cu standardele internaționale de excelență în arta măcelăriei.

Distinsă cu titlul de câștigătoare a competiției Top Chef Măcelar în edițiile 2022 și 2023, Carmangeria Ozana este un nume de referință în domeniu. Performanțele noastre nu se opresc aici – suntem participanți la prestigioasa competiție World War Butcher și am reprezentat România cu mândrie la Campionatul Mondial de Măcelărie, demonstrând măiestria, precizia și pasiunea cu care tratăm fiecare bucată de carne.

În magazinele noastre te așteaptă o gamă variată de produse proaspete, atent selecționate și preparate după cele mai înalte standarde. Ne mândrim cu transparența, calitatea și prețurile corecte pe care le oferim zilnic clienților noștri.

Te așteptăm să descoperi gustul autentic și să faci parte din povestea noastră – o poveste scrisă cu pasiune, pricepere și recunoaștere internațională.

Name: In2meat
Description:
Welkom bij in2meat, uw nieuwe beenhouwerij in het bruisende centrum van Herzele! Wij zijn verheugd om binnenkort onze deuren te openen en u te voorzien van een uitgebreid assortiment aan kwaliteitsvolle vleesproducten en smakelijke kant-en-klare maaltijden.

Bij in2meat staan we bekend om onze passie voor kwaliteit en welzijn. Als trotse verdeler van het "beter leven" vlees, garanderen wij dat onze producten afkomstig zijn van ethisch verantwoorde bronnen, waar dieren met respect worden behandeld. Hierdoor kunnen onze klanten genieten van heerlijk vlees dat niet alleen lekker smaakt, maar ook bijdraagt aan een duurzame voedselketen.

Wij streven naar klanttevredenheid en hechten veel waarde aan persoonlijke service. Ons deskundige team staat altijd klaar om u te helpen bij het maken van de juiste keuze en om u te voorzien van culinaire inspiratie.

Daarnaast zijn we op zoek naar een gepassioneerde beenhouwer die enthousiast wordt van het idee om betrokken te zijn bij de opstart van een nieuw filiaal. Als jij iemand bent die gepassioneerd is over vlees, oog heeft voor kwaliteit en klanttevredenheid hoog in het vaandel heeft staan, dan willen we graag met jou in contact komen.

Kom binnenkort langs bij in2meat in het centrum van Herzele en ontdek zelf de heerlijke smaken die we te bieden hebben. Samen bouwen we aan een plek waar kwaliteit, smaak en welzijn samenkomen. We kijken ernaar uit u binnenkort te verwelkomen!

Name: Bio-Metzgerei Tauernlamm
Description:
Angesichts des rücksichtslosen Umgangs mit wertvollen Ressourcen und den damit verbunden Problemen für Umwelt, Klima, Artenvielfalt und natürlich auch für uns Menschen, ist es schon lange höchste Zeit nachhaltiger zu denken und nachhaltiger zu handeln!

Tauernlammprodukte sind das Ergebnis notwendiger Rückbesinnung auf eine regionale, natürliche und nachhaltige Lebensweise. Aus Überzeugung von der Richtigkeit dieser Bestrebung, haben sich gleichgesinnte Bauern aus dem Pongau und Pinzgau für eine ökologische Landwirtschaft entschieden. Ökologische bzw. biologische Landwirtschaft bedeutet das komplexe Zusammenspiel zwischen Boden, Pflanzen, Tiere und Menschen im natürlichen Kreislauf zu erkennen und dementsprechend zu handeln. Die ökologische Landwirtschaft basiert auf dem Konzept der Nachhaltigkeit, sowohl unter heutiger und zukünftiger Sicht als auch unter globaler sowie regionaler Perspektive.

Die Regionalität ist für uns, die Tauernlammgenossenschaft, von Anfang an ein wesentlicher Teil des ökologischen Gedankens und des nachhaltigen Handelns. So gehören zu unseren philosophischen Grundwerten die Verarbeitung von Tieren, die in der Gebirgsregion seit jeher heimisch sind sowie die regionale Vermarktung der Produkte. Es ist uns ein großes Anliegen, dass die Tiere artgerecht und für die Region traditionell gehalten werden. Das Geheimnis einer ausgezeichneten Fleischqualität liegt nämlich in den saftigen, grünen Bergwiesen und ganz besonders in der Zeit, die den Tieren gegeben wird, um langsam heranwachsen zu können. Ein möglichst schonender Transport und eine stressfreie Schlachtung sind für uns Selbstverständlichkeiten.

Da die Tiere von Bäuerinnen und Bauern sowie Jägerinnen und Jägern aus der Umgebung stammen, werden nicht nur Transportwege gespart, sondern auch die Wertschöpfung bleibt für die Region in der Region.

Name: Marti Metzgerei AG

Wir wissen nicht, ob unsere Kunden Könige sind. Aber wir behandeln sie, als wären sie Könige. Wir freuen uns auf jeden Kunden.

Das Fleisch ist unser höchstes Gut. Wir lassen das Fleisch wie zu Grosselterns Zeiten eine Woche offen am Knochen abhängen. So wird das Fleisch aromatischer und zarter. Anschliessend wird das Fleisch unter Vakuum während einer bis drei Wochen gereift.   

Unsere geräuchten Spezialitäten lassen wir in einem originalen Küchenrauch in Ferrenberg (Wynigen) zubereiten.

Alle unsere hausgemachten Wurstwaren und Schinkenprodukte sind glutenfrei.

An Sonn- und Feiertagen können vorbestellte Fleisch- und Apéroplatten abgeholt werden.

Wir danken meinen Eltern Hans und Margrit Marti, dass wir ihr 1975 aufgebautes Geschäft im Jahr 2007 übernehmen durften. Ihre Kundenfreundlichkeit und ihr Qualitätsbewusstsein ist uns immer noch Richtschnur.

Entstanden ist die Marke „EDELCUT“ aus einer Metzgerei mit über 120 Jahren Historie am Standort Augsburg.

Welcome to the East Java Provincial Animal Husbandry Service Website. This site is one of the information media in the public service of the East Java Animal Husbandry Service (Disnak). With the availability of Animal Husbandry information in various media, it is hoped that the millennial generation can learn and develop animal husbandry in East Java. So that millennial farmers will emerge who are ready to compete in the field of animal husbandry.

The main challenge in national development is to create intelligent, healthy, quality and productive Human Resources (HR). The intelligence and quality of a nation are highly correlated with the amount of animal protein consumption in a country. Therefore, we express our gratitude to the presence of Almighty God who has given His grace and guidance so that we can carry out our mandate in serving the community, starting from the livestock community in efforts to increase production and welfare to the provision of Safe, Healthy, Whole and Halal livestock products for the community.

In order to support the welfare of the community, the East Java Provincial Animal Husbandry Service uses the potential resources that can be utilized. Books, leaflets, brochures, public service announcements in print and electronic media are resources that have been utilized. At this time the world is undergoing a transformation towards the era of the information society. In an effort to convey information to the public easily, accurately and quickly to access, the effort made is to optimize the website of the East Java Provincial Animal Husbandry Service (Disnak Jatim).

Name: Măcelăria "De la Bâlea"
Description:
În Câmpulung și zona Muscel, numele Bâlea e binecunoscut. Cu o experiență îndelungată în prelucrarea și prepararea cărnii, Ștefan Bâlea, fondatorul afacerii, a înțeles că primul și cel mai important „ingredient" al oricărui produs de carmangerie este calitatea cărnii.
 
În abatorul nostru, de unde provine materia primă pentru preparate, noi ne mândrim cu faptul că nu opărim, ci pârlim carcasele de porc, așa cum se făcea odată, rezultând astfel carne proaspătă de porc si preparate cu o calitate deosebită. Șoricul de la Bâlea este faimos pentru cât de gustos și fraged este. La începuturi, în carmangerie se producea carne tocată, pastă de mici vândută doar vrac și o singură rețetă de cârnați proaspeți și afumați. Tot de atunci păstrăm și rețeta pentru slănina afumată, spre deliciul clienților, dar și pentru toate cărnurile afumate și coapte în celulele clasice. În timp, multe alte preparate delicioase au primit marca „De la Bâlea”, iar aventura continuă.

Atenți la nevoile și preferințele consumatorului actual, îmbinăm tradiția cu modernitatea.
 
Cu fiecare an, am dezvoltat rețete savuroase pentru poftele de 100% carne, fără prea multă grăsime sau gust pregnant și greu de fum. Preparatele De la Bâlea sunt condimentate savuros, coapte în celule de afumare clasice și afumate dulce cu fag. Bunătățile noastre sunt potrivite atât pe un platou din bucătăria tradițională la masa de familie, cât și în pachețelul de școală al copiilor sau pentru o gustare frugală, dar sățioasă a celor cu diete speciale.
 
Produsele noastre (100% carne și fară aditivi) fac azi trecerea NATURAL, SIMPLU și GUSTOS de la cămara cu bunătăți a bunicilor de la țară către coșul de cumpărături al consumatorului urban.

Te invităm să facem împreună turul preparatelor din Casa Gustului Bun De la Bâlea - un suvenir pentru poftele de 100% carne.

Name: HB Slakter
Description:
Traditional, pasture-raised, heritage pork from the country fields of Jefferson County, WI. We bring pride, taste and quality back to our home chef and restaurant clients.

HB Slakter is a natural pork company that is bringing together objectives we feel are essential to the consumers, restaurants and markets who want great-tasting, heritage-breed, healthy pork. 

1. We're bringing the love of naturally raising healthy pigs on wild pastures with wild forage into our livestock and pork offering.
2. We're raising only heritage breed pigs. Berkshire, Hampshire, Duroc and others based on the evolving needs of our consumers and pig health and environment.
3. We're a family farm traditionally raising our pigs, traditionally doing business and offering a healthy, traditional cut of pork that we hope people fall in love with. We know we have!
4. We’re doing everything we can to be business-friendly. We believe restaurants, markets and more want to offer the healthiest, tastiest pork to their customers but are often prevented from doing so because small farms like ours are often difficult to do business with. We are doing everything we can to accommodate business who are committed to getting healthy pork in the hands and on the plates of their customers.

Name: MapMeats (Pty) Ltd
Description:
With a decade of experience in the red meat sector, Mapmeats is dedicated to delivering premium-quality products by strategically investing across the meat industry. Our approach centers on owning and integrating key parts of the value chain—including abattoirs, meat outlets, and sister companies in the livestock sector—allowing us to maintain exceptional control over quality, consistency, and supply.

Beyond our own operations, Mapmeats actively partners with smaller businesses, providing them with the resources, expertise, and market access needed to thrive in a competitive industry. By fostering these relationships, we not only strengthen the broader meat ecosystem but also unlock the ability to create bespoke products tailored to specific customer needs. This flexibility, combined with our deep industry integration, allows us to scale quickly and efficiently while maintaining the highest standards in wholesale, export, and retail.

At Mapmeats, everything we do is client-centered—ensuring that our end-to-end approach delivers the best possible product, every time.

Wholesale:
We supply premium beef and lamb carcasses, as well as deboned primals, to wholesalers, butchers, and Supermarkets. With complete control over sourcing and processing, we guarantee high-quality products that meet strict industry and customer specifications.

Export:
As a trusted supplier in the global market, we export beef and lamb carcasses and custom-processed cuts as well as primals to international clients in the middle east and into Africa. Our vertically integrated approach ensures product traceability, compliance with global standards, and tailored solutions for different markets.

Retail:
We partner with retail outlets to provide processed and packaged beef and lamb that align with customer preferences. Whether supplying Primal cuts for Food outlets and restaurants or customized portions for specialty stores, our expertise allows us to create bespoke meat solutions.

Name: Düzgün Europe Food-Solutions GmbH
Description:
Die Düzgün Europe Food-Solutions GmbH ist ein innovatives und wachstumsorientiertes Unternehmen der europäischen Lebensmittelbranche mit Sitz in Deutschland.
Wir entwickeln, produzieren und vertreiben hochwertige Fleisch- und Convenience-Produkte, die für Qualität, Effizienz und Geschmack auf höchstem Niveau stehen.

Mit modernster Technologie, handwerklicher Präzision und einem starken Team setzen wir auf verlässliche Partnerschaften im Großhandel, Einzelhandel und in der Gastronomie. Dabei verbinden wir Tradition und Innovation, um Lebensmittel zu schaffen, die Menschen in ganz Europa begeistern.

Aktuell liegt unser Schwerpunkt auf der Produktion von Premium-Dönerprodukten. Zugleich richten wir unseren Blick in die Zukunft – mit dem Ziel, unser Know-how und unsere Produktionskapazitäten langfristig zu nutzen, um unser Sortiment schrittweise zu erweitern und neue Nahrungsmittelbereiche zu erschließen.

Wir gestalten den Geschmack von morgen – mit Tradition in neuer Perfektion.

Mehr über uns und unsere Produktwelt erfahren Sie auf unserer Website: www.duezguen-europe.de

Name: Wyldmoon Farm
Description:
At Wyldmoon Farm, we prioritize sustainable practices, raising healthy animals while nurturing our land and community with care.

Our animals are fed strictly with non-gmo soy-free organic Free Wing Farms feed- but we believe the ability to forage and good keeping is just as important. This is affirmed watching them root in the soil and bathe in the sun. We believe in providing well to our animals that in return, provide  for us. Our dedication to excellence honors them. Each act is an ode to this cycle. 

We care deeply about the impact of our practices on the health of our consumers, our family, and the animals we raise, striving to embody a holistic approach that harmonizes agriculture and ecology. Join us in our mission to foster a healthier planet for future generations while enjoying the bounties of nature's best offerings.

Name: Aket
Description:
Aket; Sağlık, Kalite ve Lezzet
Kurulduğumuz günden beri, hizmet kalitemizi daha da yükseltmek ve müşterilerimizin beklenti ve isteklerini anlayarak bu ihtiyaç ve beklentileri karşılamak amacıyla, geleneksel üretimden kopmadan, ilgili standart ve mevzuatlara uygun olarak, yüksek kalitede ve farklı lezzetlerde, güvenle tüketilebilecek ürünler üretmeye devam ediyoruz.

Aket, 25 yılı aşkın tecrübesi, gelişen üretim hatları ve uzman personeli ile tüketici odaklı olarak çalışmalarını yönlendirerek sunduğu kaliteden taviz vermeden tüketicisine sonsuz güven vermektedir.

Description: Marco Pasman vlees- en streekproducten is een ambachtelijk bedrijf dat haar producten zelf maakt en verkoopt op lokale markten rondom Lochem.

Name: GL Vlees
Description:
GL Vlees is a Belgian company specializing in Halal meat solutions, focused on delivering safe, standardized, and high-quality products. We operate with responsibility across every stage of production — from raw material selection to final packaging — fully aligned with strict sanitary and Halal requirements.

Our portfolio is structured around two main lines:

• Raw and marinated products – beef and chicken cuts developed with exclusive blends and seasonings, designed for different market profiles. We produce hamburgers, meatballs, skewers, and other customized items for retail and food service channels.

• Cooked chicken products – practical, safe, and consistent solutions for industrial kitchens, distributors, and food manufacturers. We offer shredded, diced, sliced, and whole cooked cuts, ensuring high yield, quality, and taste.

With a structured operation and continuous growth, GL Vlees is strengthening its presence in the national market. Our approach is based on innovation, quality, and long-term partnerships.
We know our place, we understand our customers — and we keep moving forward with purpose.

Name: Suno Ayam
Description:
Suno Ayam (Penyedia Ayam Potong dan Telur) Berkomitmen Membantu Memenuhi Kebutuhan Protein Keluarga. 

Berdiri sejak tahun 2010, Suno Ayam sejauh ini telah mengirimkan 34 ton lebih ayam potong per tahun dari pintu ke pintu, dan tentunya akan terus berlanjut dengan kapasitas yang semakin membesar di tahun-tahun mendatang. Selaku produsen ayam potong dan telur yang berkualitas, Suno Ayam berkomitmen untuk selalu menjaga kualitas ayam dan telur agar sehat serta segar ketika sampai pada konsumen. 

Selain itu, Suno Ayam juga akan terus memastikan ayam-ayam disembelih melalui proses sesuai Syariat Islam (HALAL), sehingga mampu memenuhi asupan protein keluarga. Dan akan menyediakan telur-telur pilihan berkualitas untuk hidangan terbaik

Name: řeznictví Sloupnice s.r.o.
Description:
Řeznictví Sloupnice navazuje od roku 2010 na tradici sloupnického řeznického řemesla z konce 90. let minulého století.
Jsme napojeni na rozvinutou živočišnou výrobu a silnou surovinovou základnu místních zemědělců.
Sortiment výrobků naleznete v našich podnikových prodejnách a u regionálních dodavatelů.

Name: Meatify
Description:
Meatify delivers premium quality meat directly to your doorstep. Our selection of locally sourced and ethically produced options ensure that you receive only the freshest and healthiest products.
Convenient online ordering and flexible delivery options make it easy to enjoy delicious meat at home. Trust Meatify for the best in meat delivery.

Name: Ostrovetskoye Agricultural Group
Description:
Ostrovetskoye Agricultural Group is a vertically integrated agri-food company based in Belarus, specializing in the production, processing, and retail of high-quality turkey and poultry products. With full control over every stage of the value chain — from feed and farming to slaughter, processing, and distribution — we ensure consistency, safety, and taste in every product.

Over the past years, the company has rapidly expanded its operations, opened dozens of branded retail outlets, and implemented modern automation systems to streamline logistics, sales, and inventory. Our approach combines agricultural tradition with innovation and customer orientation.

We are committed to sustainable practices, quality assurance, and building a trusted local food brand that meets the highest standards of animal welfare and product integrity.

Name: IVMAX Poultry Processing
Description:
IVMAX is a trusted poultry slaughterhouse and processing company based in Rzeszów, Podkarpackie, Poland, specializing exclusively in high-quality chicken products. We supply the B2B market including wholesalers, food manufacturers, distributors, and retailers with premium whole birds and precisely calibrated chicken cuts tailored to meet diverse customer needs.
We collaborate closely with local farmers across the region to source healthy live chickens for slaughter, ensuring full traceability, animal welfare, and consistent quality from farm to table. Our modern facility at Marii Konopnickiej 18, 35-211 Rzeszów operates under strict hygiene protocols and is equipped to meet the highest international standards of food safety and quality.
At IVMAX, quality and compliance are at the core of everything we do. We are proud to hold Halal certification, as well as internationally recognized standards such as BRC (British Retail Consortium) and IFS (International Featured Standards). These certifications guarantee that our processes and products meet the most rigorous requirements for food safety, quality assurance, and regulatory compliance.
Whether you’re a large-scale food producer, retail chain, or distributor, IVMAX is committed to being your dependable partner in poultry supply delivering safe, certified, and premium-quality chicken products you can trust
